items.title: Architecting Selective Refresh based Multi-Retention Cache for Heterogeneous System (ARMOUR).
items.abstract: The increasing use of chiplets, and the demand for high-performance yet low-power systems, will result in heterogeneous systems that combine both CPUs and accelerators (e.g., general-purpose GPUs). Chiplet based designs also enable the inclusion of emerging memory technologies, since such technologies can reside on a separate chiplet without requiring complex integration in existing high-performance process technologies. One such emerging memory technology is spin-transfer torque (STT) memory, which has the potential to replace SRAM as the last-level cache (LLC). STT-RAM has the advantage of high density, non-volatility, and reduced leakage power, but suffers from a higher write latency and energy, as compared to SRAM. However, by relaxing the retention time, the write latency and energy can be reduced at the cost of the STT-RAM becoming more volatile. The retention time and write latency/energy can be traded against each other by creating an LLC with multiple retention zones. With a multi-retention LLC, the challenge is to direct the memory accesses to the most advantageous zone, to optimize for overall performance and energy efficiency. We propose ARMOUR, a mechanism for efficient management of memory accesses to a multi-retention LLC, where based on the initial requester (CPU or GPU) the cache blocks are allocated in the high (CPU) or low (GPU) retention zone. Furthermore, blocks that are about to expire are either refreshed (CPU) or written back (GPU). In addition, ARMOUR evicts CPU blocks with an estimated short lifetime, which further improves cache performance by reducing cache pollution. Our evaluation shows that ARMOUR improves average performance by 28.9% compared to a baseline STT-RAM based LLC and reduces the energy-delay product (EDP) by 74.5% compared to an iso-area SRAM LLC.
items.abstract_zh: 小芯片的使用不断增加，以及对高性能低功耗系统的需求，将导致结合 CPU 和加速器（例如通用 GPU）的异构系统。基于小芯片的设计还可以包含新兴的内存技术，因为这些技术可以驻留在单独的小芯片上，而不需要与现有的高性能工艺技术进行复杂的集成。其中一种新兴的内存技术是自旋转移矩 (STT) 内存，它有潜力取代 SRAM 作为末级缓存 (LLC)。 STT-RAM 具有高密度、非易失性和低泄漏功率的优点，但与 SRAM 相比，其写入延迟和能耗更高。然而，通过放宽保留时间，可以减少写入延迟和能量，但代价是 STT-RAM 变得更加不稳定。保留时间和写入延迟/能量可以通过创建具有多个保留区的 LLC 来相互交换。对于多保留 LLC，面临的挑战是将内存访问引导到最有利的区域，以优化整体性能和能源效率。我们提出了 ARMOUR，一种有效管理多保留 LLC 内存访问的机制，其中基于初始请求者（CPU 或 GPU），缓存块被分配在高 (CPU) 或低 (GPU) 保留区域中。此外，即将过期的块要么被刷新（CPU），要么被写回（GPU）。此外，ARMOR 会逐出寿命较短的 CPU 块，从而通过减少缓存污染进一步提高缓存性能。我们的评估表明，与基于 STT-RAM 的基准 LLC 相比，ARMOR 将平均性能提高了 28.9%，与等面积 SRAM LLC 相比，能量延迟积 (EDP) 降低了 74.5%。

items.title: PertNAS: Architectural Perturbations for Memory-Efficient Neural Architecture Search.
items.abstract: Differentiable Neural Architecture Search (NAS) relies on aggressive weight-sharing to reduce its search cost. This leads to GPU-memory bottlenecks that hamper the algorithm’s scalability. To resolve these bottlenecks, we propose a perturbations-based evolutionary approach that significantly reduces the memory cost while largely maintaining the efficiency benefits of weight-sharing. Our approach makes minute changes to compact neural architectures and measures their impact on performance. In this way, it extracts high-quality motifs from the search space. We utilize these perturbations to perform NAS in compact models evolving over time to traverse the search space. Our method disentangles GPU-memory consumption from search space size, offering exceptional scalability to large search spaces. Results show competitive accuracy on multiple benchmarks, including CIFAR10, ImageNet2012, and NASBench-301. Specifically, our approach improves accuracy on ImageNet and NASBench-301 by 0.3% and 0.87%, respectively. Furthermore, the memory consumption of search is reduced by roughly 80% against state-of-the-art weight-shared differentiable NAS works while achieving a search time of only 6 GPU hours.
items.abstract_zh: 可微神经架构搜索 (NAS) 依靠积极的权重共享来降低其搜索成本。这会导致 GPU 内存瓶颈，从而阻碍算法的可扩展性。为了解决这些瓶颈，我们提出了一种基于扰动的进化方法，该方法可以显着降低内存成本，同时在很大程度上保持权重共享的效率优势。我们的方法对紧凑的神经架构进行了微小的改变，并测量了它们对性能的影响。通过这种方式，它从搜索空间中提取高质量的主题。我们利用这些扰动在随时间演变的紧凑模型中执行 NAS，以遍历搜索空间。我们的方法将 GPU 内存消耗与搜索空间大小分开，为大型搜索空间提供卓越的可扩展性。结果显示，在多个基准测试（包括 CIFAR10、ImageNet2012 和 NASBench-301）上的准确性具有竞争力。具体来说，我们的方法将 ImageNet 和 NASBench-301 的准确率分别提高了 0.3% 和 0.87%。此外，与最先进的权重共享可微 NAS 工作相比，搜索的内存消耗减少了大约 80%，同时搜索时间仅为 6 个 GPU 小时。

items.title: Cryogenic In-Memory Matrix-Vector Multiplication using Ferroelectric Superconducting Quantum Interference Device (FE-SQUID).
items.abstract: Next-generation quantum computing (QC) systems, comprising thousands of qubits, are envisioned to accommodate the quantum substrate (qubits) and classical components (control processor, and a digital memory block) in a cryogenic (< 4 Kelvin) environment. Such homogeneous integration will pave the way for superconducting interconnects and reduce the noise arising from thermal gradient. However, in the existing QC systems, cryogenic control processors and memory blocks are still operated following the von Neumann architecture. This leads to significant performance overhead due to the repetitive data movement between physically distinct memory and processing units. Thus, it becomes challenging to implement computationally expensive machine learning (ML) algorithms for efficient error correction and control of qubits in a QC. In-memory implementation of ML algorithms at cryogenic temperature can be a game-changer for a practical QC. Here, we demonstrate a unique technique for cryogenic in-memory matrix vector multiplication (MVM), the most frequently performed operation in ML algorithms, utilizing a ferroelectric superconducting quantum interference device (FE-SQUID)-based memory array. FE-SQUID is a promising cryogenic memory device thanks to its non-volatile nature, voltage-controlled switching, scalability, and compatibility with commercially available superconducting device fabrication processes. Moreover, due to having separate read-write paths, the read operation can be optimized without imposing any limit on the read bias and hence, multiple levels of read current with notable separation can be used to map the inputs for the MVM operation. We use an experimentally-calibrated compact model for FE-SQUID to design and test our proposed system. We evaluate FE-SQUID-based in-memory MVM by performing several classification tasks using MNIST handwritten digits, fashion, and emotion datasets. We achieve 93.83%, 80.49%, and 92.5% accuracy for handwritten digits, fashion, and sentiment classifications, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 下一代量子计算 (QC) 系统由数千个量子位组成，预计可在低温（< 4 开尔文）环境中容纳量子基底（量子位）和经典组件（控制处理器和数字存储块）。这种均匀集成将为超导互连铺平道路，并减少热梯度产生的噪声。然而，在现有的QC系统中，低温控制处理器和存储块仍然遵循冯诺依曼架构运行。由于物理上不同的内存和处理单元之间的重复数据移动，这会导致显着的性能开销。因此，实现计算成本高昂的机器学习 (ML) 算法以实现 QC 中量子位的高效纠错和控制变得具有挑战性。在低温下在内存中实现机器学习算法可以改变实际质量控制的游戏规则。在这里，我们展示了一种独特的低温内存矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 技术，这是机器学习算法中最常执行的操作，利用基于铁电超导量子干涉器件 (FE-SQUID) 的内存阵列。 FE-SQUID 因其非易失性、压​​控开关、可扩展性以及与商用超导器件制造工艺的兼容性而成为一种有前途的低温存储器件。此外，由于具有单独的读写路径，因此可以在不对读取偏置施加任何限制的情况下优化读取操作，因此可以使用具有显着分离的多个级别的读取电流来映射MVM操作的输入。我们使用经过实验校准的 FE-SQUID 紧凑模型来设计和测试我们提出的系统。我们通过使用 MNIST 手写数字、时尚和情感数据集执行多项分类任务来评估基于 FE-SQUID 的内存 MVM。我们对手写数字、时尚和情感分类的准确率分别为 93.83%、80.49% 和 92.5%。

items.title: FPDsim: A Structural Simulator For Power Grid Analysis Of Flat Panel Display.
items.abstract: As the resolution continues to increase, the scale of the power grid of the flat panel display (FPD) becomes huge. This imposes a severe computational challenge for analysis and storage. In this paper, based on the highly periodic FPD structure, we present an efficient simulator which contains a novel stamping scheme and a fast structural solver. Experiments on real industrial cases show that compared to the conventional stamping scheme, our proposed stamping scheme achieves up to 118× speedup in 74× less memory; compared to the state-of-art direct solver, Cholmod, our proposed structural solver achieves up to 17× speedup in 5× less memory.
items.abstract_zh: 随着分辨率的不断提高，平板显示器(FPD)的电网规模变得巨大。这给分析和存储带来了严峻的计算挑战。在本文中，基于高周期性 FPD 结构，我们提出了一种高效的模拟器，其中包含新颖的冲压方案和快速结构求解器。实际工业案例的实验表明，与传统的冲压方案相比，我们提出的冲压方案在减少 74 倍的内存的情况下实现了高达 118 倍的加速；与最先进的直接求解器 Cholmod 相比，我们提出的结构求解器在减少 5 倍的内存的情况下实现了高达 17 倍的加速。

items.title: R-TOSS: A Framework for Real-Time Object Detection using Semi-Structured Pruning.
items.abstract: Object detectors used in autonomous vehicles can have high memory and computational overheads. In this paper, we introduce a novel semi-structured pruning framework called R-TOSS that overcomes the shortcomings of state-of-the-art model pruning techniques. Experimental results on the JetsonTX2 platform show that R-TOSS has a compression rate of 4.4× on the YOLOv5 object detector with a 2.15× speedup in inference time and 57.01% decrease in energy usage. R-TOSS also enables 2.89× compression on RetinaNet with a 1.86× speedup in inference time and 56.31% decrease in energy usage. We also demonstrate significant improvements compared to various state-of-the-art pruning techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆中使用的物体检测器可能具有较高的内存和计算开销。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 R-TOSS 的新型半结构化剪枝框架，它克服了最先进的模型剪枝技术的缺点。 JetsonTX2平台上的实验结果表明，R-TOSS在YOLOv5目标检测器上的压缩率为4.4倍，推理时间加速2.15倍，能耗降低57.01%。 R-TOSS 还在 RetinaNet 上实现了 2.89 倍压缩，推理时间加速 1.86 倍，能源使用量减少 56.31%。与各种最先进的修剪技术相比，我们还展示了显着的改进。

items.title: A Comprehensive Automated Exploration Framework for Systolic Array Designs.
items.abstract: Many researchers studying the performance tuning of systolic arrays have based their works on oversimplified assumptions like considering only divisors for loop tiling or pruning based on off-chip data communication to reduce the design space. In this paper, we present a comprehensive design space exploration tool named Odyssey for systolic array optimization. Odyssey results show that limiting tiling factors to only divisors of the problem size can cause up to 39% performance loss, and pruning the design space based on off-chip data movement can miss optimal designs. We tested Odyssey using various matrix multiplication and convolution kernels and validated the results with FPGA implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 许多研究脉动阵列性能调整的研究人员的工作都基于过于简单化的假设，例如仅考虑循环平铺的除数或基于片外数据通信的修剪以减少设计空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Odyssey 的综合设计空间探索工具，用于脉动阵列优化。 Odyssey 结果表明，将平铺因子限制为问题大小的除数可能会导致高达 39% 的性能损失，并且基于片外数据移动修剪设计空间可能会错过最佳设计。我们使用各种矩阵乘法和卷积核测试了 Odyssey，并通过 FPGA 实现验证了结果。

items.title: Map-and-Conquer: Energy-Efficient Mapping of Dynamic Neural Nets onto Heterogeneous MPSoCs.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous MPSoCs comprise diverse processing units of varying compute capabilities. To date, the mapping strategies of neural networks (NNs) onto such systems are yet to exploit the full potential of processing parallelism, made possible through both the intrinsic NNs’ structure and underlying hardware composition. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to effectively map NNs onto heterogeneous MPSoCs in a manner that enables them to leverage the underlying processing concurrency. Specifically, our approach identifies an optimal partitioning scheme of the NN along its ‘width’ dimension, which facilitates deployment of concurrent NN blocks onto different hardware computing units. Additionally, our approach contributes a novel scheme to deploy partitioned NNs onto the MPSoC as dynamic multi-exit networks for additional performance gains. Our experiments on a standard MPSoC platform have yielded dynamic mapping configurations that are 2.1x more energy-efficient than the GPU-only mapping while incurring 1.7x less latency than DLA-only mapping.
items.abstract_zh: 异构 MPSoC 包含具有不同计算能力的多种处理单元。迄今为止，神经网络 (NN) 到此类系统的映射策略尚未充分利用处理并行性的全部潜力，而处理并行性是通过内在的 NN 结构和底层硬件组合实现的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以有效地将神经网络映射到异构 MPSoC 上，从而使它们能够利用底层处理并发性。具体来说，我们的方法确定了神经网络沿其“宽度”维度的最佳划分方案，这有助于将并发神经网络块部署到不同的硬件计算单元上。此外，我们的方法提供了一种新颖的方案，将分区的神经网络部署到 MPSoC 上作为动态多出口网络，以获得额外的性能增益。我们在标准 MPSoC 平台上进行的实验产生了动态映射配置，其能效比仅 GPU 映射高 2.1 倍，同时延迟比仅 DLA 映射低 1.7 倍。

items.title: Fine-Grained QoS Control via Tightly-Coupled Bandwidth Monitoring and Regulation for FPGA-based Heterogeneous SoCs.
items.abstract: Embedded systems are increasingly adopting heterogeneous templates integrating hardware accelerators and application-specific processors, which poses novel challenges. In particular, it is difficult to have accurate control of task activities in Commercial Off-the-shelf (COTS) System on Chips (SoCs), due to complex main memory sharing mechanisms among different computing engines. To address this problem, bandwidth regulation approaches based on monitoring and throttling are widely adopted. Existing solutions, however, are either too coarse-grained, limiting the control over computing engines activities, or platform-dependent, addressing the problem only for specific SoCs. In this paper we propose an innovative, fine-grained and platform-independent approach that can accurately control main memory bandwidth usage in an FPGA-based Heterogeneous System on Chip (HeSoC). Experimental results conducted on the Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ platform demonstrate that our approach enables solutions not feasible with state-of-the-art bandwidth regulation methods.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式系统越来越多地采用集成硬件加速器和专用处理器的异构模板，这带来了新的挑战。特别是，由于不同计算引擎之间复杂的主存共享机制，很难准确控制商用现成（COTS）片上系统（SoC）中的任务活动。为了解决这个问题，基于监控和​​节流的带宽调节方法被广泛采用。然而，现有的解决方案要么过于粗粒度，限制了对计算引擎活动的控制，要么依赖于平台，仅解决特定 SoC 的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新的、细粒度的、独立于平台的方法，可以精确控制基于 FPGA 的异构片上系统 (HeSoC) 中主存储器带宽的使用。在 Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ 平台上进行的实验结果表明，我们的方法可实现采用最先进的带宽调节方法无法实现的解决方案。

items.title: PUFFER: A Routability-Driven Placement Framework via Cell Padding with Multiple Features and Strategy Exploration.
items.abstract: Placement is a critical stage in VLSI physical design, especially for routability optimization. Due to the large scale and high integration introduced by the advanced semiconductor manufacturing technology, there remains a significant challenge in routability in the placement stage, which will affect the subsequent routing process. This paper proposes a placement framework, called PUFFER, to optimize routability by cell padding and strategy exploration. The framework first estimates congestion by imitating the behaviors of routing detours and clustered cell spreading. Then it calculates cell padding based on multiple features inspired by the characteristics of convolutional and graph neural networks. Besides, it applies a Bayesian-based method to explore a better placement strategy. Compared with a commercial tool and the state-of-the-art academic RePlAce placer, experiments on industrial benchmarks show that our framework achieves the best routability on average, with a 2.7× speedup over the commercial tool.
items.abstract_zh: 布局是 VLSI 物理设计中的关键阶段，特别是对于可布线性优化而言。由于先进半导体制造技术带来的大规模和高集成度，在布局阶段的可布线性仍然存在重大挑战，这将影响后续的布线工艺。本文提出了一种名为 PUFFER 的布局框架，通过单元填充和策略探索来优化可路由性。该框架首先通过模仿路由绕行和集群小区扩散的行为来估计拥塞情况。然后，它根据受卷积和图神经网络特征启发的多个特征计算单元格填充。此外，它应用基于贝叶斯的方法来探索更好的放置策略。与商业工具和最先进的学术 RePlAce 布局器相比，工业基准测试表明，我们的框架平均实现了最佳的可路由性，比商业工具加速了 2.7 倍。

items.title: Improving Standard-Cell Design Flow using Factored Form Optimization.
items.abstract: Factored form is a powerful multi-level representation of a Boolean function that readily translates into an implementation of the function in CMOS technology. In particular, the number of literals in a factored form correlates strongly with the number of transistors in the CMOS implementation. This paper develops novel methods for optimizing factored forms while working on the efficient and-inverter graph (AIG) representation of combinational logic. This is in contrast to the traditional logic synthesis based on logic networks, and other AIG-based methods that minimize the AIG nodes count. Experiments show that applying these methods helps to reduce the area after technology mapping by an additional 2.8% on average, compared to a high-effort area-oriented baseline. It is expected that deploying these methods as part of an industrial standard-cell design flow will reduce design costs and power consumption. Additionally, this work enables efficient transistor-level logic synthesis of large designs with various applications in design automation.
items.abstract_zh: 分解形式是布尔函数的强大多级表示，可以轻松转换为 CMOS 技术中函数的实现。特别是，因子形式的文字数量与 CMOS 实现中晶体管的数量密切相关。本文开发了优化因式分解形式的新颖方法，同时致力于组合逻辑的高效与反相图（AIG）表示。这与基于逻辑网络的传统逻辑综合以及最小化 AIG 节点数量的其他基于 AIG 的方法形成对比。实验表明，与高强度区域导向基线相比，应用这些方法有助于将技术映射后的区域平均减少 2.8%。预计将这些方法部署为工业标准单元设计流程的一部分将降低设计成本和功耗。此外，这项工作还可以对大型设计进行高效的晶体管级逻辑综合，并在设计自动化中实现各种应用。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: RL-LPO: Reinforcement Learning Based Leakage Power Optimization Framework with Graph Neural Network.
items.abstract: Leakage power optimization based on threshold voltage (V<inf>th</inf>) assignment poses great challenge in circuit design due to its tremendous solution space. In this paper, a Reinforcement Learning-based Leakage Power Optimization framework (RL-LPO) is first-ever proposed to formulate V<inf>th</inf> assignment as a reinforcement learning (RL) process by learning timing and physical characteristics of each circuit instance with Graph Neural Networks (GNN). The proposed RL-LPO was validated by the IWLS2005 and Opencores benchmark circuits with TSMC 28nm technology and experimental results demonstrate that our work achieves better leakage power optimization by additional 3% reduction on average than the commercial tool PrimeTime with 6.7× speed up when being transferred to unseen circuits with negligible timing degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 基于阈值电压 (V<inf>th</inf>) 分配的泄漏功率优化由于其巨大的解决方案空间而给电路设计带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，首次提出了基于强化学习的泄漏功率优化框架（RL-LPO），通过使用图神经网络（GNN）学习每个电路实例的时序和物理特性，将 V<inf>th</inf> 分配制定为强化学习（RL）过程。所提出的 RL-LPO 通过采用 TSMC 28nm 技术的 IWLS2005 和 Opencores 基准电路进行了验证，实验结果表明，我们的工作实现了更好的泄漏功率优化，比商业工具 PrimeTime 平均额外减少了 3%，当转移到看不见的电路时，速度提高了 6.7 倍，时序退化可以忽略不计。

items.title: Towards A Formally Verified Fully Homomorphic Encryption Compute Engine.
items.abstract: We present a scalable approach for formally verifying the correctness of the Compute Engine (CE) against its ISA (Instruction Set Architecture) specification in an FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) accelerator, critical to many applications where safety and security of information is of vital importance. It combines algorithmic verification of the micro-architecture modules in the CE against their functional specifications and implementation verification of the CE hardware against its micro-architecture algorithmic specifications. The correctness of the CE is guaranteed by treating micro-architecture modules as semantic-preserving program transformations and leveraging the composability of the semantic-preserving properties well established in compiler design and verification.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的方法，用于在 FHE（全同态加密）加速器中根据其 ISA（指令集架构）规范正式验证计算引擎 (CE) 的正确性，这对于信息安全至关重要的许多应用程序至关重要。它将CE中的微架构模块根据其功能规范进行的算法验证和CE硬件根据其微架构算法规范进行的实现验证结合起来。通过将微体系结构模块视为保留语义的程序转换并利用编译​​器设计和验证中确立的语义保留属性的可组合性，保证了 CE 的正确性。

items.title: VideoFlip: Adversarial Bit Flips for Reducing Video Service Quality.
items.abstract: Video compression is a critical component in streaming applications that maximizes users’ quality of experience (QoE) while satisfying the underlying bandwidth constraints. In this paper, we demonstrate the first hardware-based fault-injection attack on video compression, dubbed VideoFlip. The attack identifies and alters a few bits inside the video compression model to achieve one or more of the following adversarial goals: (1) increasing the bitrate and (2) degrading the quality of the compressed video. Extensive evaluations show VideoFlip irresistibly downgrades video compression performance for various models and video datasets while being resilient to contemporary defenses against hardware-based bit flips.
items.abstract_zh: 视频压缩是流媒体应用程序中的关键组件，可最大限度地提高用户的体验质量 (QoE)，同时满足潜在的带宽限制。在本文中，我们演示了第一个基于硬件的视频压缩故障注入攻击，称为 VideoFlip。该攻击识别并更改视频压缩模型内的一些位，以实现以下一个或多个对抗目标：(1) 提高比特率；(2) 降低压缩视频的质量。广泛的评估表明，VideoFlip 不可抗拒地降低了各种模型和视频数据集的视频压缩性能，同时能够适应针对基于硬件的位翻转的当代防御。

items.title: HDSuper: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Light-weight High-quality Super-Resolution Accelerator.
items.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) networks have been gradually applied to embedded devices with good-quality image reconstruction. However, the hardware performance and power efficiency are limited by a large number of algorithm parameters, computation complexity, and hardware resources, obstructing the development of a high-quality SR accelerator. This paper proposes an end-to-end platform with a lightweight super-resolution network (LSR) and an efficient, high-quality super-resolution architecture HDSuper, to perform algorithm-hardware co-design for the SR accelerator. For algorithm design, we employ depth-wise separable convolution and pixelshuffle to reduce network size and computation complexity by considering the hardware constraints. For hardware design, we provide a unified computing core (UCC) combined with an efficient flattening-and-allocation (F-A) mapping strategy to support various operators with high computational utilization. We adopt the patch training method to reduce the external memory access of the hardware architecture. Based on the evaluation, the proposed algorithm achieves high-quality image reconstruction with 37.44dB PSNR. Finally, we implement the image reconstruction in FPGA demonstration, achieving high-quality image reconstruction with 2.08W power consumption under the lowest hardware resources compared to the state-of-the-art works.
items.abstract_zh: 超分辨率（SR）网络已逐渐应用于嵌入式设备，具有良好的图像重建质量。然而，硬件性能和功效受到大量算法参数、计算复杂度和硬件资源的限制，阻碍了高质量SR加速器的发展。本文提出了一种具有轻量级超分辨率网络（LSR）和高效、高质量超分辨率架构HDSuper的端到端平台，以对SR加速器进行算法-硬件协同设计。对于算法设计，我们考虑硬件限制，采用深度可分离卷积和像素洗牌来减少网络规模和计算复杂度。对于硬件设计，我们提供统一计算核心（UCC）与高效的扁平化和分配（F-A）映射策略相结合，以支持具有高计算利用率的各种算子。我们采用补丁训练方法来减少硬件架构的外部存储器访问。根据评估，该算法实现了PSNR为37.44dB的高质量图像重建。最后，我们在FPGA演示中实现了图像重建，与现有技术相比，在最低的硬件资源下以2.08W的功耗实现了高质量的图像重建。

items.title: G-QED: Generalized QED Pre-silicon Verification beyond Non-Interfering Hardware Accelerators.
items.abstract: Hardware accelerators (HAs) underpin high-performance and energy-efficient digital systems. Correctness of these systems thus depends on the correctness of constituent HAs. Self-consistency-based pre-silicon verification techniques, like A-QED (Accelerator Quick Error Detection), provide a quick and provably thorough HA verification framework that does not require extensive design-specific properties or a full functional specification. However, A-QED is limited to verifying HAs which are non-interfering – i.e., they produce the same result for a given input independent of its context within a sequence of inputs. We present a new technique called G-QED (Generalized QED) which goes beyond non-interfering HAs while retaining A-QED’s benefits. Our extensive results as well as a detailed industrial case study show that: G-QED is highly thorough in detecting critical bugs in well-verified designs that otherwise escape traditional verification flows while simultaneously improving verification productivity 18-fold (from 370 person days to 21 person days). These results are backed by theoretical guarantees of soundness and completeness.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件加速器 (HA) 是高性能和高能效数字系统的基础。因此，这些系统的正确性取决于组成 HA 的正确性。基于自一致性的硅前验证技术，例如 A-QED（加速器快速错误检测），提供了快速且可证明彻底的 HA 验证框架，不需要大量的特定于设计的属性或完整的功能规范。然而，A-QED 仅限于验证非干扰的 HA，即，它们对于给定输入产生相同的结果，而与输入序列中的上下文无关。我们提出了一种称为 G-QED（广义 QED）的新技术，它超越了非干扰 HA，同时保留了 A-QED 的优点。我们的广泛结果以及详细的工业案例研究表明：G-QED 在检测经过充分验证的设计中的关键错误方面非常彻底，否则可以逃避传统的验证流程，同时将验证效率提高 18 倍（从 370 人日到 21 人日）。这些结果得到了合理性和完整性的理论保证的支持。

items.title: Lightning Talk: The Next Wave of High-level Synthesis.
items.abstract: Recent works established new High-Level Synthesis (HLS) solutions translating AI models described in PyTorch to customized AI accelerators automatically. By adopting PyTorch as input for AI designs (instead of traditional C/C++ for HLS), the lines of code and design simulation time can be reduced by about 10× and 100×, respectively. Such AI model-to-RTL flows pave the way for a new wave of HLS that could drive the high-productivity designs of AI circuits with high-density, high-energy efficiency, low cost, and short design cycle. And such high-level model-to-RTL flows can be expanded to other non-AI domains. Meanwhile, we are also facing existing and new challenges for such HLS solutions, such as ensuring the correctness of the high-level design, accommodating accurate low-level timing/energy information, handling the complexity of 3D circuits and/or chiplet-based design flows, and achieving all these in a highly scalable manner. In this paper, we share the state-of-the-art solutions, limitations, and new opportunities facing the emergence of a new wave of the next-generation HLS.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的工作建立了新的高级综合 (HLS) 解决方案，将 PyTorch 中描述的 AI 模型自动转换为定制的 AI 加速器。通过采用 PyTorch 作为 AI 设计的输入（而不是用于 HLS 的传统 C/C++），代码行数和设计仿真时间可以分别减少约 10 倍和 100 倍。这种 AI 模型到 RTL 的流程为新一波 HLS 铺平了道路，可以推动高密度、高能效、低成本和短设计周期的 AI 电路的高生产率设计。这种高级模型到 RTL 的流程可以扩展到其他非人工智能领域。与此同时，我们还面临着此类 HLS 解决方案的现有挑战和新挑战，例如确保高层设计的正确性、容纳准确的低层时序/能量信息、处理 3D 电路和/或基于小芯片的设计流程的复杂性，以及以高度可扩展的方式实现所有这些。在本文中，我们分享了下一代 HLS 新浪潮的出现所面临的最先进的解决方案、局限性和新机遇。

items.title: Graph-Based Simultaneous Placement and Routing for Two-Dimensional Directed Self-Assembly Technology.
items.abstract: Two-dimensional directed self-assembly (2D-DSA) is an emerging lithography technology for advanced process nodes. We can determine the orientations of double posts to guide block copolymers to form feasible 2D guiding template patterns by the 2D-DSA process. This paper presents the first work to handle the 2D-DSA simultaneous placement and routing problem. We first propose a novel graph to model feasible guiding templates with a constant-time update scheme for each double-post assignment. Based on a graph model, we then present an algorithm for 2D-DSA simultaneous placement and routing, with a broadcast-based cost function for 2D-DSA cell placement and a graph-based scheme for DSA-compliant routing. Finally, we employ a strongly effective region property to minimize the cuts in the final layout. Experimental results show that our algorithm can efficiently generate a 2D-DSA placement and routing solution with high routability and a low cut number.
items.abstract_zh: 二维定向自组装（2D-DSA）是一种用于先进工艺节点的新兴光刻技术。我们可以通过2D-DSA过程确定双柱的方向来引导嵌段共聚物形成可行的2D引导模板图案。本文介绍了处理 2D-DSA 同时布局和布线问题的第一项工作。我们首先提出了一种新颖的图来为每个双岗位任务使用恒定时间更新方案来建模可行的指导模板。基于图模型，我们提出了一种用于 2D-DSA 同时布局和布线的算法，以及用于 2D-DSA 单元布局的基于广播的成本函数和用于 DSA 兼容布线的基于图的方案。最后，我们采用了一个非常有效的区域属性来最小化最终布局中的剪切。实验结果表明，我们的算法可以有效地生成具有高可布线性和低切割次数的2D-DSA布局布线解决方案。

items.title: Toward Parallelism-Optimal Topology Generation for Wavelength-Routed Optical NoC Designs.
items.abstract: The wavelength-routed optical network-on-chip (WRONoC) emerges as a promising solution for multi-core system communication, providing high-bandwidth, high-speed, and low-power transmission. As the number of cores in a WRONoC increases, however, some WRONoC topologies could be infeasible with bandwidth and crosstalk constraints if bit-level parallelism is not considered during topology generation. Previous work optimized the parallelism only for the radius selection of microring resonators but not for topology generation. To remedy this drawback, we present a parallelism-aware WRONoC topology generation flow. The proposed flow guarantees to generate a parallelism-optimal topology for full connectivity; and a parallelism-optimal topology for customized connectivity if the netlist meets certain conditions. Compared with the state-of-the-art methods, experimental results show a 67.5% improvement in parallelism.
items.abstract_zh: 波长路由片上光网络（WRONoC）作为多核系统通信的一种有前途的解决方案而出现，提供高带宽、高速和低功耗的传输。然而，随着 WRONoC 中内核数量的增加，如果在拓扑生成期间不考虑位级并行性，则某些 WRONoC 拓扑可能因带宽和串扰限制而变得不可行。先前的工作仅针对微环谐振器的半径选择优化并行性，而没有针对拓扑生成优化并行性。为了弥补这个缺点，我们提出了一种并行感知的 WRONoC 拓扑生成流程。所提出的流程保证生成用于完全连接的并行性最佳拓扑；如果网表满足某些条件，则可以使用并行优化拓扑来实现定制连接。与最先进的方法相比，实验结果显示并行度提高了 67.5%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Analytical Placement for 3D ICs with Multiple Manufacturing Technologies.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a high-quality 3D placement algorithm to determine the positions of standard cells and inter-die vias to optimize wirelength considering multiple manufacturing technologies for different dies. The algorithm consists of three major novel techniques: (1) a multi-technologies weighted-average (MTWA) wirelength model, (2) a weighted inter-die-connection cost controlling the net-degree distribution of the cut set, and (3) a via-cell co-optimization technique to further improve the quality of placement solutions. Compared with the winners at the 2022 CAD Contest at ICCAD on 3D Placement with D2D Vertical Connections, our placer achieves the best results for all nontrivial cases.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种高质量 3D 布局算法，用于确定标准单元和芯片间过孔的位置，以优化线长，同时考虑不同芯片的多种制造技术。该算法由三项主要新技术组成：(1) 多技术加权平均 (MTWA) 线长模型，(2) 控制切割集网络度分布的加权芯片间连接成本，以及 (3) 通孔单元协同优化技术，以进一步提高贴装解决方案的质量。与 2022 年 ICCAD CAD 竞赛中 D2D 垂直连接 3D 布局的获奖者相比，我们的布局器在所有重要情况下都取得了最佳结果。

items.title: UpPipe: A Novel Pipeline Management on In-Memory Processors for RNA-seq Quantification.
items.abstract: RNA sequence quantification is an important analysis method to measure transcript abundances. A key overhead in RNA-seq quantification is to map a set of RNA reads to multiple reference transcripts, i.e., transcriptome. Besides, the performance of RNA-seq quantification is strictly limited by the excessive amounts of data movement between CPU and memory, i.e., memory wall problem on the conventional architecture. As the first publicly commercial processing-in-memory (PIM) system, UPMEM DPU, is proposed, the PIM gradually becomes a promising solution to overcome the memory wall problem. DPUs show great potential to accelerate data-intensive workloads by minimizing off-chip data movement between CPU and memory. Thus, this paper aims to improve the performance of RNA-seq quantification by fully exploiting the strengths of DPU. To achieve that, we propose a novel DPU-aware pipeline design "UpPipe" built on the software layer to address the hardware constraints of DPU. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to enable pipeline management on the DPU system. The evaluation results demonstrate the feasibility of our proposed design and provide a comprehensive study on how to utilize the limited hardware resources of DPUs efficiently.
items.abstract_zh: RNA序列定量是测量转录本丰度的重要分析方法。 RNA-seq 定量的一个关键开销是将一组 RNA 读数映射到多个参考转录本，即转录组。此外，RNA-seq定量的性能受到CPU和内存之间过量数据移动的严格限制，即传统架构上的内存墙问题。随着第一个公开商用的内存处理（PIM）系统UPMEM DPU的提出，PIM逐渐成为克服内存墙问题的有前途的解决方案。 DPU 通过最大限度地减少 CPU 和内存之间的片外数据移动，显示出加速数据密集型工作负载的巨大潜力。因此，本文旨在通过充分利用DPU的优势来提高RNA-seq定量的性能。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于软件层的新型 DPU 感知管道设计“UpPipe”，以解决 DPU 的硬件限制。据我们所知，这是第一个在 DPU 系统上启用管道管理的工作。评估结果证明了我们提出的设计的可行性，并为如何有效利用 DPU 的有限硬件资源提供了全面的研究。

items.title: Unified Agile Accuracy Assessment in Computing-in-Memory Neural Accelerators by Layerwise Dynamical Isometry.
items.abstract: Deploying neural networks (NN) on computing-in-memory (CIM) neural accelerators incurs additional hardware factors in the test accuracy, which add substantial extra evaluation overhead. This work takes the first step to quantitatively analyze how information propagates in CIM neural accelerators as well as how additional CIM factors influence that information propagation. From our analysis, we propose a new metric named Unified-QCN that is theoretically linked to the test accuracy according to layerwise dynamical isometry (LDI), providing us with a compass to avoid direct time-consuming simulations. Our method consistently delivers high correlations with the test accuracy for various NN backbones on different datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 在内存计算 (CIM) 神经加速器上部署神经网络 (NN) 会导致测试准确性受到额外的硬件因素影响，从而增加大量额外的评估开销。这项工作迈出了定量分析信息在 CIM 神经加速器中如何传播以及其他 CIM 因素如何影响信息传播的第一步。根据我们的分析，我们提出了一种名为 Unified-QCN 的新指标，该指标理论上与分层动态等距 (LDI) 的测试精度相关，为我们提供了避免直接耗时模拟的指南针。我们的方法始终为不同数据集上的各种神经网络主干提供与测试准确性的高度相关性。

items.title: IFHE: Intermediate-Feature Heterogeneity Enhancement for Image Synthesis in Data-Free Knowledge Distillation.
items.abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) explores training a compact student network only by a pre-trained teacher without real data. Prevailing DFKD methods mainly consist of image synthesis and knowledge distillation. The synthesized images are crucial to enhance the student network performance. However, the images synthesized by existing methods cause high homogeneity on intermediate features, incurring undesired distillation performance. To address this problem, we propose the Intermediate-Feature Heterogeneity Enhancement (IFHE) method, which effectively enhances the heterogeneity of synthesized images by minimizing the loss between intermediate features and pre-set labels of the synthesized images Our IFHE outperforms the SOTA results on CIFAR-10/100 datasets of representative networks.
items.abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）探索仅由经过预训练的教师在没有真实数据的情况下训练紧凑的学生网络。流行的DFKD方法主要包括图像合成和知识蒸馏。合成图像对于提高学生网络性能至关重要。然而，现有方法合成的图像导致中间特征高度均匀，导致蒸馏性能不理想。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了中间特征异质性增强（IFHE）方法，该方法通过最小化合成图像的中间特征和预设标签之间的损失来有效增强合成图像的异质性。我们的 IFHE 在代表性网络的 CIFAR-10/100 数据集上优于 SOTA 结果。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Weight Decay is ALL You Need for Neural Network Sparsification.
items.abstract: The heuristic iterative pruning strategy has been widely used for neural network sparsification. However, it is challenging to identify the right connections to remove at each pruning iteration with only a one-shot evaluation of weight magnitude, especially at the early pruning stage. The erroneously removed connections, unfortunately, can hardly be recovered. In this work, we propose a weight decay strategy as a substitute for pruning, which let the "insignificant" weights moderately decay instead of being directly clamped to zero. At the end of the training, the vast majority of redundant weights will naturally become close to zero, making it easier to identify which connections could be removed safely. Experimental results show that the proposed weight decay method can achieve an ultra-high sparsity of 99%. Compared to the current pruning strategy, the model size is further reduced by 34%, improving the compression rate from 69× to 106× at the same accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 启发式迭代剪枝策略已广泛用于神经网络稀疏化。然而，仅通过权重大小的一次性评估来确定每次剪枝迭代时要删除的正确连接是具有挑战性的，特别是在早期剪枝阶段。不幸的是，被错误删除的连接很难恢复。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种权重衰减策略作为剪枝的替代品，它让“无关紧要”的权重适度衰减，而不是直接钳制为零。训练结束时，绝大多数冗余权重自然会变得接近于零，从而更容易识别哪些连接可以安全删除。实验结果表明，所提出的权重衰减方法可以实现99%的超高稀疏度。与当前的剪枝策略相比，模型尺寸进一步减小了34%，在相同精度的情况下，压缩率从69×提高到106×。

items.title: Physics-Informed Optical Kernel Regression Using Complex-valued Neural Fields.
items.abstract: Lithography is fundamental to integrated circuit fabrication, necessitating large computation overhead. The advancement of machine learning (ML)-based lithography models alleviates the trade-offs between manufacturing process expense and capability. However, all previous methods regard the lithography system as an image-to-image black box mapping, utilizing network parameters to learn by rote mappings from massive mask-to-aerial or mask-to-resist image pairs, resulting in poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a new ML-based paradigm disassembling the rigorous lithographic model into non-parametric mask operations and learned optical kernels containing determinant source, pupil, and lithography information. By optimizing complex-valued neural fields to perform optical kernel regression from coordinates, our method can accurately restore lithography system using a small-scale training dataset with fewer parameters, demonstrating superior generalization capability as well. Experiments show that our framework can use 31% of parameters while achieving 69× smaller mean squared error with 1.3× higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 光刻是集成电路制造的基础，需要大量的计算开销。基于机器学习 (ML) 的光刻模型的进步减轻了制造工艺费用和能力之间的权衡。然而，以前的所有方法都将光刻系统视为图像到图像的黑盒映射，利用网络参数从大量掩模到航空或掩模到抗蚀剂图像对中死记硬背地学习，导致泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范例，将严格的光刻模型分解为非参数掩模操作，并学习包含行列式源、光瞳和光刻信息的光学内核。通过优化复值神经场以从坐标执行光学核回归，我们的方法可以使用参数较少的小规模训练数据集准确地恢复光刻系统，也表现出卓越的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的框架可以使用 31% 的参数，同时实现比现有技术低 69 倍的均方误差和高 1.3 倍的吞吐量。

items.title: AutoDCIM: An Automated Digital CIM Compiler.
items.abstract: Digital Computing-in-Memory (DCIM) is an emerging architecture that integrates digital logic into memory for efficient AI computing. However, current DCIM designs heavily rely on manual efforts. This increases DCIM design time and limits the optimization space, making it challenging to satisfy the user specifications of diverse AI applications. This paper presents AutoDCIM, the first automated DCIM compiler. Au-toDCIM takes the user specifications as inputs and generates a DCIM macro architecture with an optimized layout. AutoDCIM’s template-based generation balances handcrafted cell design and agile macro development. AutoDCIM’s layout exploration loop analyzes diverse DCIM array partitioning schemes to satisfy user specifications. The auto-generated DCIM macros present competitive efficiency results in comparison with state-of-the-art silicon-verified DCIM macros.
items.abstract_zh: 内存数字计算（DCIM）是一种新兴架构，它将数字逻辑集成到内存中以实现高效的人工智能计算。然而，当前的 DCIM 设计严重依赖手动工作。这增加了 DCIM 设计时间并限制了优化空间，使得满足不同 AI 应用的用户规范变得具有挑战性。本文介绍了 AutoDCIM，第一个自动化 DCIM 编译器。 Au-toDCIM将用户规范作为输入，并生成具有优化布局的DCIM宏架构。 AutoDCIM 基于模板的生成平衡了手工单元设计和敏捷的宏开发。 AutoDCIM 的布局探索循环分析不同的 DCIM 阵列分区方案以满足用户规范。与最先进的硅验证 DCIM 宏相比，自动生成的 DCIM 宏呈现出具有竞争力的效率结果。

items.title: Property-Based Timing Analysis and Optimization for Complex Cyber-Physical Real-Time Systems.
items.abstract: This lightning talk introduces the motivations of the needs of formal properties that can be used modularly to compose safe and tight analysis and optimization for the scheduler design and schedulability test problems for cyber-physical real-time systems. The key challenge is the correct and precise translation from different schedule functions to proper mathematical properties that can be further used for property-based modulable designs.
items.abstract_zh: 这次闪电演讲介绍了形式化属性需求的动机，这些形式化属性可以模块化地用于对网络物理实时系统的调度器设计和可调度性测试问题进行安全、严格的分析和优化。关键的挑战是从不同的调度函数到正确的数学属性的正确和精确的转换，这些属性可以进一步用于基于属性的模块化设计。

items.title: Lift: Exploiting Hybrid Stacked Memory for Energy-Efficient Processing of Graph Convolutional Networks.
items.abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are powerful learning approaches for graph-structured data. GCNs are both computing- and memory-intensive. The emerging 3D-stacked computation-in-memory (CIM) architecture provides a promising solution to process GCNs efficiently. The CIM architecture can provide near-data computing, thereby reducing data movement between computing logic and memory. However, previous works do not fully exploit the CIM architecture in both dataflow and mapping, leading to significant energy consumption.This paper presents Lift, an energy-efficient GCN accelerator based on 3D CIM architecture using software and hardware co-design. At the hardware level, Lift introduces a hybrid architecture to process vertices with different characteristics. Lift adopts near-bank processing units with a push-based dataflow to process vertices with strong re-usability. A dedicated unit is introduced to reduce massive data movement caused by high-degree vertices. At the software level, Lift adopts a hybrid mapping to further exploit data locality and fully utilize the hybrid computing resources. The experimental results show that the proposed scheme can significantly reduce data movement and energy consumption compared with representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）是图结构数据的强大学习方法。 GCNs are both computing- and memory-intensive.新兴的 3D 堆栈内存计算 (CIM) 架构为高效处理 GCN 提供了一种有前途的解决方案。 CIM架构可以提供近数据计算，从而减少计算逻辑和内存之间的数据移动。然而，之前的工作在数据流和映射方面都没有充分利用CIM架构，导致大量的能源消耗。本文提出了Lift，一种基于3D CIM架构、采用软硬件协同设计的节能GCN加速器。在硬件层面，Lift引入了混合架构来处理具有不同特征的顶点。 Lift采用近岸处理单元，采用基于推送的数据流来处理顶点，具有很强的可重用性。引入专用单元来减少高度顶点引起的大量数据移动。在软件层面，Lift采用混合映射，进一步挖掘数据局部性，充分利用混合计算资源。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，所提出的方案可以显着减少数据移动和能耗。

items.title: Mixed-cell-height Placement with Minimum-Implant-Area and Drain-to-Drain Abutment Constraints.
items.abstract: In modern circuits, mixed-cell-height standard cells have been prevailing to meet various requirements and achieve better trade-offs among timing, power, and routability. Besides, the constraints of the minimum-implant-area (MIA) and drain-to-drain-abutment (DDA) arise as emerging challenges at advanced technology nodes. In this paper, we present an algorithm to address the mixed-cell-height placement problem with MIA and DDA constraints in three major stages: (1) post-global placement, (2) legalization, and (3) detailed placement. In the post-global stage, we first align mixed-cell-height standard cells to the desired rows by conjugate gradient method with dynamic step size and then reorder them by the shortest path algorithm to distribute the source nodes evenly. In the legalization stage, we propose a two-step combination algorithm to cluster cells and repack the clusters to minimize the wirelength, after which we presented a queue based method to address the inter-row MIA violations. In the detailed placement, an MIA-aware DDA reduction algorithm is adopted after multi-region partitioning to eliminate DDA violations without introducing MIA violations. Experimental results show that our algorithm can resolve all MIA and almost all DDA violations with a 13% reduction in displacement, a 4% reduction in HPWL, and 25% less runtime compared with the state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代电路中，混合单元高度的标准单元已经盛行，以满足各种要求并在时序、功耗和可布线性之间实现更好的权衡。此外，最小植入面积（MIA）和漏极至漏极基台（DDA）的限制也成为先进技术节点的新挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法来解决具有 MIA 和 DDA 约束的混合单元高度布局问题，分三个主要阶段：(1) 后全局布局，(2) 合法化，以及 (3) 详细布局。在后全局阶段，我们首先通过动态步长的共轭梯度法将混合单元高度的标准单元对齐到所需的行，然后通过最短路径算法将它们重新排序以均匀分布源节点。在合法化阶段，我们提出了一种两步组合算法来对单元进行聚类并重新打包簇以最小化线长，之后我们提出了一种基于队列的方法来解决行间 MIA 违规问题。在具体布局中，多区域划分后采用了MIA感知的DDA缩减算法，在不引入MIA违规的情况下消除DDA违规。实验结果表明，我们的算法可以解决所有 MIA 和几乎所有 DDA 违规，与最先进的工作相比，位移减少 13%，HPWL 减少 4%，运行时间减少 25%。

items.title: Reinforcement Learning-based Analog Circuit Optimizer using gm/ID for Sizing.
items.abstract: Designing analog circuits incurs high time costs because designers must consider numerous design variables or trade-off relationships of circuit performance based on a lot of knowledge and experience. To reduce design time, various machine learning methods have been used to optimize analog circuits by learning the correlation between the device size and the circuit performance. However, it is difficult to train the correlation because of its high non-linearity and wide design space. In this paper, this study proposes a new framework to optimize analog circuit designs by combining reinforcement learning (RL) and the sensitivity analysis with g<inf>m</inf>/I<inf>D</inf> sizing, which is more intuitive for interpreting circuit performance. Furthermore, the universal value function approximator (UVFA), previously proposed in RL, is modified more simply to make it easier to find the target design. Additionally, the dataset is rearranged and sampled by the criteria that are established based on the principle of circuit operation, which helps to orient the agent to learn the circuit operation. Using the proposed methods, we optimize three types of differential amplifiers with common mode feedback circuits and obtain the best circuit design. Compared to baseline, we find the optimal point using modified UVFA, and moreover, reduce the number of iterations by 42.2%, 39.5%, and 37.5%, respectively, for the three test cases.
items.abstract_zh: 设计模拟电路会产生很高的时间成本，因为设计人员必须基于大量的知识和经验来考虑众多的设计变量或电路性能的权衡关系。为了减少设计时间，已经使用各种机器学习方法通​​过学习器件尺寸和电路性能之间的相关性来优化模拟电路。然而，由于其高度非线性和广泛的设计空间，很难训练相关性。在本文中，本研究提出了一种新的框架，通过将强化学习（RL）和灵敏度分析与 g<inf>m</inf>/I<inf>D</inf> 尺寸相结合来优化模拟电路设计，这对于解释电路性能更加直观。此外，之前在强化学习中提出的通用价值函数逼近器（UVFA）经过更简单的修改，以便更容易找到目标设计。此外，根据电路操作原理建立的标准对数据集进行重新排列和采样，这有助于指导智能体学习电路操作。使用所提出的方法，我们优化了三种类型的具有共模反馈电路的差分放大器，并获得了最佳电路设计。与基线相比，我们使用改进的 UVFA 找到了最佳点，并且对于三个测试用例分别减少了 42.2%、39.5% 和 37.5% 的迭代次数。

items.title: RQ-DNN: Reliable Quantization for Fault-tolerant Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are deployed in many real-time and safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles and medical diagnosis. In such applications, quantization is used to compress the model for storage and computation reduction. However, recent research has shown that faults in memory can cause a significant drop in DNN accuracy and conventional quantization methods focus only on model compression. This paper proposes a novel method that performs model quantization while remarkably improving the fault-tolerance of the model. It can be incorporated with other hardware approaches such as Error Correcting Code to further improve fault-tolerance. The proposed method reduces possible error patterns that negatively impact classification accuracy by modifying weight distributions and applying a novel masking-based clipping function. Experimental results show that the proposed method enhances the fault-tolerance of the quantized DNN, which can tolerate 1803× higher bit error rates than the conventional method.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 部署在许多实时和安全关键的应用中，例如自动驾驶汽车和医疗诊断。在此类应用中，量化用于压缩模型以减少存储和计算。然而，最近的研究表明，内存故障会导致 DNN 精度显着下降，而传统的量化方法仅关注模型压缩。本文提出了一种执行模型量化的新方法，同时显着提高了模型的容错性。它可以与其他硬件方法（例如纠错码）结合使用，以进一步提高容错能力。该方法通过修改权重分布和应用一种新颖的基于掩码的裁剪函数，减少了可能对分类精度产生负面影响的错误模式。实验结果表明，该方法增强了量化DNN的容错能力，可以容忍比传统方法高1803倍的误码率。

items.title: AVX Timing Side-Channel Attacks against Address Space Layout Randomization.
items.abstract: Modern x86 processors support an AVX instruction set to boost performance. However, this extension may cause security issues. We discovered that there are vulnerable properties in implementing masked load/store instructions. Based on this, we present a novel AVX timing side-channel attack that can defeat address space layout randomization. We demonstrate the significance of our attack by showing User and Kernel ASLR breaks on the recent Intel and AMD processors in various environments, including cloud computing systems, an SGX enclave (a fine-grained ASLR break), and major operating systems. We further demonstrate that our attack can be used to infer user behavior, such as Bluetooth events and mouse movements. We highlight that stronger isolation or more fine-grained randomization should be adopted to successfully mitigate our presented attacks.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 x86 处理器支持 AVX 指令集以提高性能。但是，此扩展可能会导致安全问题。我们发现在实现屏蔽加载/存储指令时存在易受攻击的属性。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的 AVX 定时旁路攻击，可以击败地址空间布局随机化。我们通过展示各种环境（包括云计算系统、SGX enclave（细粒度 ASLR 中断）和主要操作系统）中最新 Intel 和 AMD 处理器上的用户和内核 ASLR 中断来证明我们攻击的重要性。我们进一步证明我们的攻击可用于推断用户行为，例如蓝牙事件和鼠标移动。我们强调，应该采用更强的隔离或更细粒度的随机化来成功缓解我们提出的攻击。

items.title: ALMOST: Adversarial Learning to Mitigate Oracle-less ML Attacks via Synthesis Tuning.
items.abstract: Oracle-less machine learning (ML) attacks have broken various logic locking schemes. Regular synthesis, which is tailored for area-power-delay optimization, yields netlists where key-gate localities are vulnerable to learning. Thus, we call for security-aware logic synthesis. We propose ALMOST, a framework for adversarial learning to mitigate oracle-less ML attacks via synthesis tuning. ALMOST uses a simulated-annealing-based synthesis recipe generator, employing adversarially trained models that can predict state-of-the-art attacks’ accuracies over wide ranges of recipes and key-gate localities. Experiments on ISCAS benchmarks confirm the attacks’ accuracies drops to around 50% for ALMOST-synthesized circuits, all while not undermining design optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 无 Oracle 机器学习 (ML) 攻击已经破坏了各种逻辑锁定方案。定期综合专为面积功率延迟优化而定制，可生成关键栅极位置容易学习的网表。因此，我们呼吁安全意识逻辑综合。我们提出了 ALMOST，一个对抗性学习框架，通过综合调整来减轻无预言机机器学习攻击。 ALMOST 使用基于模拟退火的合成配方生成器，采用经过对抗训练的模型，可以预测最先进的攻击在各种配方和关键门位置上的准确性。 ISCAS 基准测试证实，对于几乎合成的电路，攻击的准确度下降至 50% 左右，同时不会破坏设计优化。

items.title: SimLL: Similarity-Based Logic Locking Against Machine Learning Attacks.
items.abstract: Logic locking is a promising technique for protecting integrated circuit designs while outsourcing their fabrication. Recently, graph neural network (GNN)-based link prediction attacks have been developed which can successfully break all the multiplexer-based locking techniques that were expected to be learning-resilient. We present SimLL, a novel similarity-based locking technique which locks a design using multiplexers and shows robustness against the existing structure-exploiting oracle-less learning-based attacks. Aiming to confuse the machine learning (ML) models, SimLL introduces key-controlled multiplexers between logic gates or wires that exhibit high levels of topological and functional similarity. Empirical results show that SimLL can degrade the accuracy of existing ML-based attacks to approximately 50%, resulting in a negligible advantage over random guessing.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定是一种在外包制造的同时保护集成电路设计的有前途的技术。最近，基于图神经网络（GNN）的链接预测攻击已经被开发出来，它可以成功地破坏所有基于多路复用器的锁定​​技术，这些技术预计具有学习弹性。我们提出了 SimLL，一种新颖的基于相似性的锁定技术，该技术使用多路复用器锁定设计，并显示出针对现有结构利用无预言机学习的攻击的鲁棒性。为了混淆机器学习 (ML) 模型，SimLL 在逻辑门或线路之间引入了键控多路复用器，这些多路复用器表现出高度的拓扑和功能相似性。经验结果表明，SimLL 可以将现有基于 ML 的攻击的准确性降低至大约 50%，与随机猜测相比，其优势可以忽略不计。

items.title: Any-Angle Routing for Redistribution Layers in 2.5D IC Packages.
items.abstract: Redistribution layers (RDLs) are widely applied for signal transmissions in advanced packages. Traditional redistribution layer (RDL) routers use only 90- and 135-degree turns for routing. With technological advances, routing in RDLs can be any obtuse angle, leading to larger routing solution spaces and shorter total wirelength. This paper proposes the first any-angle routing algorithm in the literature for multiple RDLs. We first give a novel global routing algorithm with accurate routing resource estimation. A multi-net access point adjustment method is then proposed based on dynamic programming and our partial net separation scheme. Finally, we develop an efficient tile routing algorithm to obtain valid routes with fixed access points. Experimental results show that our algorithm can achieve a 15.7% shorter wirelength compared with a traditional RDL router.
items.abstract_zh: 重新分配层（RDL）广泛应用于高级封装中的信号传输。传统的重新分布层 (RDL) 路由器仅使用 90 度和 135 度转弯进行路由。随着技术的进步，RDL 中的布线可以是任何钝角，从而实现更大的布线解决方案空间和更短的总线长。本文提出了文献中第一个针对多个 RDL 的任意角度路由算法。我们首先给出了一种具有精确路由资源估计的新颖的全局路由算法。然后提出了一种基于动态规划和我们的部分网络分离方案的多网络接入点调整方法。最后，我们开发了一种高效的瓦片路由算法，以获得具有固定接入点的有效路线。实验结果表明，与传统的 RDL 路由器相比，我们的算法可以实现缩短 15.7% 的线长。

items.title: Lightning Talk: Scaling Up Quantum Compilation - Challenges and Opportunities.
items.abstract: The past decade witnessed exciting advances in quantum computing (QC) platforms. For example, superconducting qubit systems of over a hundred qubits have been developed and are now commercially available [1] , [2] . Trapped ion systems in long chains or quantum charge-coupled device (CCD) [3] architectures have also been developed, reaching very low gate errors [4] , [5] . Recently, neutral atoms trapped in arrays of optical tweezers emerged as a very promising experimental platform with hundreds of qubits at room temperature for programmable quantum simulations and quantum computation [6] , [7] . Figure 1 illustrates the rapid growth of the capacity of these QC platforms in recent years. With IBM’s recent announcement of the plan for building a 100,000-qubit quantum processing unit (QPU) [8] , there is a strong need to scale up the capacity and performance of quantum compilation tools to match the rapid advances of quantum hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 过去十年见证了量子计算 (QC) 平台令人兴奋的进步。例如，已经开发了超过一百个量子位的超导量子位系统，并且现已投入商业使用 [1] , [2] 。长链或量子电荷耦合器件 (CCD) [3] 架构中的俘获离子系统也已开发出来，达到非常低的门误差 [4] 、 [5] 。最近，光镊阵列中捕获的中性原子成为一个非常有前途的实验平台，在室温下具有数百个量子位，用于可编程量子模拟和量子计算 [6] ， [7] 。图1说明了近年来这些QC平台能力的快速增长。随着IBM最近宣布建造10万量子位的量子处理单元（QPU）的计划[8]，迫切需要扩大量子编译工具的容量和性能，以适应量子硬件的快速发展。

items.title: Automating Constraint-Aware Datapath Optimization using E-Graphs.
items.abstract: Numerical hardware design requires aggressive optimization, where designers exploit branch constraints, creating optimization opportunities that are valid only on a sub-domain of input space. We developed an RTL optimization tool that automatically learns the consequences of conditional branches and exploits that knowledge to enable deep optimization. The tool deploys custom built program analysis based on abstract interpretation theory, which when combined with a data-structure known as an e-graph simplifies complex reasoning about program properties. Our tool fully-automatically discovers known floating-point architectures from the computer arithmetic literature and out-performs baseline EDA tools, generating up to 33% faster and 41% smaller circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 数值硬件设计需要积极的优化，设计人员利用分支约束，创造仅在输入空间的子域上有效的优化机会。我们开发了一种 RTL 优化工具，可以自动学习条件分支的结果，并利用这些知识来实现​​深度优化。该工具部署基于抽象解释理论的定制程序分析，当与称为电子图的数据结构结合时，可以简化有关程序属性的复杂推理。我们的工具全自动从计算机算术文献中发现已知的浮点架构，其性能优于基准 EDA 工具，生成的电路速度提高了 33%，电路尺寸缩小了 41%。

items.title: A Fast Secure Deletion Strategy for High-Density Flash Memory through WOM-v Codes.
items.abstract: High bit-density NAND flash memory, such as quadruple-level cell (QLC) flash, has been widely adopted in emerging storage systems. As voltage-based write-once-memory (WOM-v) codes reduce the erase count of a flash block before storing new data, WOM-v codes are proven feasible to extend the lifetime of high-density flash memory significantly. To ensure data security, secure deletion is widely employed in flash-based storage system.In this paper, we propose FSD, a fast secure deletion strategy for high-density flash memory that cooperates secure deletion with WOM-v codes. FSD classifies request data into secure, and unsecure data by considering data privacy. When secure data deletion command issues to the storage device, FSD cooperates unsecure data program operation to cover secure data. The results show that FSD improves the I/O performance of storage system by 70.37% over the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 高位密度NAND闪存，例如四级单元（QLC）闪存，已在新兴存储系统中广泛采用。由于基于电压的一次写入存储器 (WOM-v) 代码在存储新数据之前会减少闪存块的擦除次数，因此事实证明，WOM-v 代码可以显着延长高密度闪存的使用寿命。为了确保数据安全，安全删除被广泛应用于基于闪存的存储系统中。本文提出了FSD，一种与WOM-v代码配合安全删除的高密度闪存快速安全删除策略。 FSD 考虑到数据隐私，将请求数据分为安全数据和不安全数据。当安全数据删除命令向存储设备发出时，FSD配合非安全数据编程操作来覆盖安全数据。结果表明，FSD使存储系统的I/O性能比现有技术提高了70.37%。

items.title: Efficient Transformer Inference with Statically Structured Sparse Attention.
items.abstract: Self-attention matrices of Transformers are often highly sparse because the relevant context of each token is typically limited to just a few other tokens in the sequence. To reduce the computational burden of self-attention on Transformer inference, we propose static, structured, sparse attention masks that split attention matrices into dense regions, skipping computations outside these regions while reducing computations inside these regions. To support the proposed mask structure, we design an entropy-aware finetuning algorithm to naturally encourage attention sparsity while maximizing task accuracy. Furthermore, we extend a typical dense deep learning accelerator to efficiently exploit our structured sparsity pattern. Compared to a dense baseline, we achieve 56.6% reduction in energy consumption, 58.9% performance improvement with <1% accuracy loss and 2.6% area overhead.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 的自注意力矩阵通常非常稀疏，因为每个标记的相关上下文通常仅限于序列中的几个其他标记。为了减少 Transformer 推理中自注意力的计算负担，我们提出了静态、结构化、稀疏注意力掩模，将注意力矩阵分割成密集区域，跳过这些区域外的计算，同时减少这些区域内的计算。为了支持所提出的掩模结构，我们设计了一种熵感知微调算法，以自然地鼓励注意力稀疏性，同时最大化任务准确性。此外，我们扩展了典型的密集深度学习加速器，以有效地利用我们的结构化稀疏模式。与密集基线相比，我们实现了 56.6% 的能耗降低、58.9% 的性能提升，同时精度损失小于 1%，面积开销为 2.6%。

items.title: Discerning Limitations of GNN-based Attacks on Logic Locking.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML)-based attacks have revealed the possibility of utilizing neural networks to break locked circuits without needing functional chips (Oracle). Among ML approaches, GNN (graph neural networks)-based attacks are the most potent tools that attackers can employ as they exploit graph structures inherent to a circuit’s netlist. Although promising, in this paper, we reveal that GNNs have some impediments in attacking locked circuits. We investigate the limits of the state-of-the-art GNN-based attacks against logic locking and show that we can drastically decrease the accuracy of these attacks by utilizing these limitations in the locking process.
items.abstract_zh: 基于机器学习 (ML) 的攻击揭示了利用神经网络在不需要功能芯片 (Oracle) 的情况下打破锁定电路的可能性。在 ML 方法中，基于 GNN（图神经网络）的攻击是攻击者在利用电路网表固有的图结构时可以使用的最有效的工具。尽管很有希望，但在本文中，我们揭示了 GNN 在攻击锁定电路方面存在一些障碍。我们研究了针对逻辑锁定的最先进的基于 GNN 的攻击的局限性，并表明我们可以通过在锁定过程中利用这些限制来大幅降低这些攻击的准确性。

items.title: Formal Verification of Restoring Dividers made Fast and Simple.
items.abstract: The paper describes a formal verification method for hardware implementation of restoring divider circuits. The method is based on setting select signals to predefined constants to reduce the design to easily verifiable circuit components, followed by their verification using standard equivalence checking and SAT. It is then concluded by a global proof that the composition of those components indeed implements a divider. In contrast to previous approaches, the verification is done on a functional level without any reverse engineering of the internal structure. The results show significant improvement in verification time compared to other methods. The proposed approach can also be used in debugging by localizing the source of a bug. This feature is currently not available in the existing verification tools and will be a subject of future work.
items.abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种恢复分频器电路硬件实现的形式化验证方法。该方法基于将选择信号设置为预定义常数，以将设计简化为易于验证的电路组件，然后使用标准等效检查和 SAT 对其进行验证。然后通过全局证明得出结论，证明这些组件的组合确实实现了分隔器。与以前的方法相比，验证是在功能级别上完成的，无需对内部结构进行任何逆向工程。结果表明，与其他方法相比，验证时间显着缩短。所提出的方法还可以通过定位错误源来用于调试。该功能目前在现有验证工具中不可用，将是未来工作的主题。

items.title: HTVM: Efficient Neural Network Deployment On Heterogeneous TinyML Platforms.
items.abstract: Optimal deployment of deep neural networks (DNNs) on state-of-the-art Systems-on-Chips (SoCs) is crucial for tiny machine learning (TinyML) at the edge. The complexity of these SoCs makes deployment non-trivial, as they typically contain multiple heterogeneous compute cores with limited, programmer-managed memory to optimize latency and energy efficiency. We propose HTVM – a compiler that merges TVM with DORY to maximize the utilization of heterogeneous accelerators and minimize data movements. HTVM allows deploying the MLPerf™ Tiny suite on DIANA, an SoC with a RISC-V CPU, and digital and analog compute-in-memory AI accelerators, at 120x improved performance over plain TVM deployment.
items.abstract_zh: 在最先进的片上系统 (SoC) 上优化部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 对于边缘的微型机器学习 (TinyML) 至关重要。这些 SoC 的复杂性使得部署变得非常重要，因为它们通常包含多个异构计算核心，以及有限的、由程序员管理的内存，以优化延迟和能源效率。我们提出 HTVM——一种将 TVM 与 DORY 合并的编译器，以最大限度地利用异构加速器并最大限度地减少数据移动。 HTVM 允许在 DIANA 上部署 MLPerf™ Tiny 套件，DIANA 是一个带有 RISC-V CPU 的 SoC，以及数字和模拟内存计算 AI 加速器，其性能比普通 TVM 部署提高了 120 倍。

items.title: PIMA-LPN: Processing-in-memory Acceleration for Efficient LPN-based Post-Quantum Cryptography.
items.abstract: Learning parity with noise (LPN) is under intensive research in building advanced cryptography suites and protocols. However, in LPN-based cryptography, the transmission of the large matrices between the memory and the processor units generally incurs a significant latency overhead. In this work, we propose PIMA-LPN, a processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerator for LPN cryptography. Specifically, our PIM architecture can carry out the entire computations of LPN in memory. In this experiment, we demonstrate that PIMA-LPN can be 20.86× ~ 216.8× faster than existing CPU and FPGA implementations of LPN cryptography. Furthermore, we show that using PIMA-LPN, LPN cryptography can achieve similar computational efficiency compared to the post-quantum cryptography standard (i.e., CRYSTALS-Kyber) with 15.4x fewer memory units.
items.abstract_zh: 学习噪声奇偶校验 (LPN) 正在深入研究构建高级密码学套件和协议。然而，在基于 LPN 的密码术中，存储器和处理器单元之间的大型矩阵的传输通常会产生显着的延迟开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PIMA-LPN，一种用于 LPN 加密的内存处理 (PIM) 加速器。具体来说，我们的 PIM 架构可以在内存中执行 LPN 的全部计算。在本实验中，我们证明 PIMA-LPN 的速度比现有的 LPN 加密 CPU 和 FPGA 实现快 20.86 倍 ~ 216.8 倍。此外，我们表明，与后量子密码标准（即 CRYSTALS-Kyber）相比，使用 PIMA-LPN，LPN 密码可以实现类似的计算效率，但内存单元少 15.4 倍。

items.title: HAIMA: A Hybrid SRAM and DRAM Accelerator-in-Memory Architecture for Transformer.
items.abstract: Through the attention mechanism, Transformer-based large-scale deep neural networks (LSDNNs) have demonstrated remarkable achievements in artificial intelligence applications such as natural language processing and computer vision. The matrix-matrix multiplication operation (MMMO) in Transformer makes data movement dominate the inference overhead over computation. A solution for efficient data movement during Transformer inference is to embed arithmetic logic units (ALUs) into the memory array, hence an accelerator-in-memory architecture (AIMA). Existing work along this direction has not considered the heterogeneity of parallelism and resource requirements among Transformer layers. This increases the inference latency and lowers the resource utilization, which is critical for the embedded systems domain. To this end, we propose HAIMA, a hybrid AIMA and the parallel dataflow for Transformer, which exploit the cooperation between SRAM and DRAM to accelerate different MMMOs. Compared to the state-of-the-art Newton and TransPIM, our proposed hardware-software co-design achieves 1.4x-1.5x speedup, and solves the problem of resource under-utilization when DRAM-based AIMA performs the light-weight MMMOs.
items.abstract_zh: 通过注意力机制，基于Transformer的大规模深度神经网络（LSDNN）在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等人工智能应用中展现了令人瞩目的成就。 Transformer 中的矩阵-矩阵乘法运算 (MMMO) 使数据移动在计算的推理开销中占主导地位。在 Transformer 推理期间实现高效数据移动的解决方案是将算术逻辑单元 (ALU) 嵌入到内存阵列中，从而形成内存加速器架构 (AIMA)。沿着这个方向的现有工作没有考虑 Transformer 层之间并行性和资源需求的异构性。这会增加推理延迟并降低资源利用率，这对于嵌入式系统领域至关重要。为此，我们提出了 HAIMA，一种混合​​ AIMA 和 Transformer 的并行数据流，它利用 SRAM 和 DRAM 之间的合作来加速不同的 MMMO。与最先进的Newton和TransPIM相比，我们提出的硬件-软件协同设计实现了1.4x-1.5x的加速，并解决了基于DRAM的AIMA执行轻量级MMMO时资源利用不足的问题。

items.title: A Model-Specific End-to-End Design Methodology for Resource-Constrained TinyML Hardware.
items.abstract: Tiny machine learning (TinyML) becomes appealing as it enables machine learning on resource-constrained devices with ultra low energy and small form factor. In this paper, a model-specific end-to-end design methodology is presented for TinyML hardware design. First, we introduce an end-to-end system evaluation method using Roofline models, which considering both AI and other general-purpose computing to guide the architecture design choices. Second, to improve the efficiency of AI computation, we develop an enhanced design space exploration framework, TinyScale, to enable optimal low-voltage operation for energy-efficient TinyML. Finally, we present a use case driven design selection method to search the optimal hardware design across a set of application use cases. Our model-specific design methodology is evaluated on both TSMC 22nm and 55nm technology for MLPerf Tiny benchmark and a keyword spotting (KWS) SoC design. With the help of our end-to-end design methodology, an optimal TinyML hardware can be automatically explored with significant energy and EDP improvements for a diverse of TinyML use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 微型机器学习 (TinyML) 变得很有吸引力，因为它能够在具有超低能耗和小外形尺寸的资源受限设备上进行机器学习。本文提出了一种针对 TinyML 硬件设计的特定于模型的端到端设计方法。首先，我们介绍了一种使用 Roofline 模型的端到端系统评估方法，该方法同时考虑人工智能和其他通用计算来指导架构设计选择。其次，为了提高人工智能计算的效率，我们开发了一个增强的设计空间探索框架TinyScale，以实现节能TinyML的最佳低压运行。最后，我们提出了一种用例驱动的设计选择方法，用于在一组应用程序用例中搜索最佳硬件设计。我们的模型特定设计方法在 TSMC 22nm 和 55nm 技术上针对 MLPerf Tiny 基准和关键字识别 (KWS) SoC 设计进行了评估。借助我们的端到端设计方法，可以自动探索最佳的 TinyML 硬件，并针对各种 TinyML 用例进行显着的能源和 EDP 改进。

items.title: Accelerating DNN Inference with Heterogeneous Multi-DPU Engines.
items.abstract: The Deep Learning Processor (DPU) programmable engine released by the official Xilinx Vitis AI toolchain has become one of the commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) solutions for Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) inference on Xilinx FPGAs. While modern FPGA devices generally have enough hardware resources to accommodate multi-DPUs simultaneously, the Xilinx toolchain currently only supports the deployment of multiple homogeneous DPUs engines that running independent inference tasks (task-level parallelism). In this work, we demonstrate that deployment of multiple heterogeneous DPU engines makes better resource efficiency for a given FPGA device. Moreover, we show that pipelined execution of a CNN inference task over heterogeneous multi-DPU engines may further improve overall inference throughput with carefully designed CNN layers-to-DPU mapping and scheduling. Finally, for a given CNN model and an FPGA device, we propose a comprehensive framework that automatically determines the optimal heterogeneous DPU deployment, and adaptively chooses the execution scheme between task-level and pipelined parallelism. Compared with the state-of-the-art solution with homogeneous multi-DPU engines and network-level parallelism, the proposed framework shows an average improvement of 13% (up-to 19%) and 6.6% (up-to 10%) on the Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104 and ZCU102 platforms, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: Xilinx Vitis AI 官方工具链发布的深度学习处理器 (DPU) 可编程引擎已成为 Xilinx FPGA 上卷积神经网络 (CNN) 推理的商用现成 (COTS) 解决方案之一。虽然现代 FPGA 设备通常具有足够的硬件资源来同时容纳多个 DPU，但 Xilinx 工具链目前仅支持部署运行独立推理任务（任务级并行性）的多个同构 DPU 引擎。在这项工作中，我们证明了部署多个异构 DPU 引擎可以提高给定 FPGA 设备的资源效率。此外，我们还表明，通过精心设计的 CNN 层到 DPU 映射和调度，通过异构多 DPU 引擎流水线执行 CNN 推理任务可以进一步提高整体推理吞吐量。最后，对于给定的 CNN 模型和 FPGA 设备，我们提出了一个综合框架，可以自动确定最佳异构 DPU 部署，并在任务级和流水线并行之间自适应选择执行方案。与具有同构多 DPU 引擎和网络级并行性的最先进解决方案相比，所提出的框架在 Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104 和 ZCU102 平台上的平均性能分别提高了 13%（高达 19%）和 6.6%（高达 10%）。

items.title: Lightning Talk: The New Era of Computational Cognitive Intelligence.
items.abstract: The triple whammy of variability in platforms (e.g., process variability), applications (e.g., dynamic use cases in autonomous systems), and the environment (e.g., context) renders ineffective the classical computational/algorithmic/numerical computing paradigm in dealing with the inherent runtime dynamism and uncertainty faced by emerging systems. We posit that this requires a fundamental change from classical "static" computing to a new era that deploys a computational cognitive intelligence (CCI) paradigm that is able to learn and evolve at runtime. The CCI paradigm empowers systems to be adaptable and evolvable by exploiting biologically-inspired cognitive intelligence principles.
items.abstract_zh: 平台（例如，流程可变性）、应用程序（例如，自治系统中的动态用例）和环境（例如，上下文）的可变性的三重打击使得经典计算/算法/数值计算范式在处理新兴系统所面临的固有运行时动态性和不确定性时变得无效。我们认为，这需要从经典的“静态”计算到部署能够在运行时学习和进化的计算认知智能（CCI）范式的新时代进行根本性改变。 CCI 范式通过利用生物启发的认知智能原理，使系统具有适应性和可进化性。

items.title: Lightning Talk 6: Bringing Together Foundation Models and Edge Devices.
items.abstract: Deep learning models have been widely used in natural language processing and computer vision. These models require heavy computation, large memory, and massive amounts of training data. Deep learning models may be deployed on edge devices when transferring data to cloud is infeasible or undesirable. Running these models on edge devices require significant improvement in the efficiency by reducing the models’ resource demands. Existing methods to improve efficiency often require new architectures and retraining. The recent trend in machine learning is to create general-purpose models (called foundation models). These pre-trained models can be repurposed for different applications. This paper reviews the methods for improving efficiency of machine learning models, the rise of foundation models, challenges and possible solutions improving efficiency of pre-trained models. Future solutions for better efficiency should focus on improving existing trained models with no or limited training.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型已广泛应用于自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域。这些模型需要大量计算、大量内存和大量训练数据。当将数据传输到云不可行或不合需要时，深度学习模型可以部署在边缘设备上。在边缘设备上运行这些模型需要通过减少模型的资源需求来显着提高效率。现有的提高效率的方法通常需要新的架构和重新训练。机器学习的最新趋势是创建通用模型（称为基础模型）。这些预先训练的模型可以重新用于不同的应用。本文回顾了提高机器学习模型效率的方法、基础模型的兴起、提高预训练模型效率的挑战和可能的解决方案。未来提高效率的解决方案应侧重于在没有或有限训练的情况下改进现有的训练模型。

items.title: When Monte-Carlo Dropout Meets Multi-Exit: Optimizing Bayesian Neural Networks on FPGA.
items.abstract: Bayesian Neural Networks (BayesNNs) have demonstrated their capability of providing calibrated prediction for safety-critical applications such as medical imaging and autonomous driving. However, the high algorithmic complexity and the poor hardware performance of BayesNNs hinder their deployment in real-life applications. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes a novel multi-exit Monte-Carlo Dropout (MCD)-based BayesNN that achieves well-calibrated predictions with low algorithmic complexity. To further reduce the barrier to adopting BayesNNs, we propose a transformation framework that can generate FPGA-based accelerators for multi-exit MCD-based BayesNNs. Several novel optimization techniques are introduced to improve hardware performance. Our experiments demonstrate that our auto-generated accelerator achieves higher energy efficiency than CPU, GPU, and other state-of-the-art hardware implementations. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/os-hxfan/MCME_FPGA_Acc.git
items.abstract_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络 (BayesNNs) 已经证明了其为医疗成像和自动驾驶等安全关键应用提供校准预测的能力。然而，贝叶斯神经网络的高算法复杂性和较差的硬件性能阻碍了其在实际应用中的部署。为了弥补这一差距，本文提出了一种新颖的基于多出口蒙特卡罗辍学（MCD）的贝叶斯神经网络，它以较低的算法复杂度实现了良好校准的预测。为了进一步减少采用 BayesNN 的障碍，我们提出了一个转换框架，可以为基于多出口 MCD 的 BayesNN 生成基于 FPGA 的加速器。引入了几种新颖的优化技术来提高硬件性能。我们的实验表明，我们自动生成的加速器比 CPU、GPU 和其他最先进的硬件实现具有更高的能效。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/os-hxfan/MCME_FPGA_Acc.git

items.title: AmgR: Algebraic Multigrid Accelerated on ReRAM.
items.abstract: Solving systems of linear equations is a fundamental problem in scientific computing, which has been extensively researched for decades. One of the most well-known solvers is Algebraic Multigrid (AMG), which is widely used in high performance computing due to its good scalability. But currently accelerating AMG relies on the traditional von Neumann architecture of storage and computation separation, which leads to a large data transmission overhead. In this work, we propose a ReRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture named AmgR, which overcomes the limitations of the traditional von Neumann architecture for AMG acceleration.However, accelerating AMG on ReRAM is non-trivial, because (1) AMG has many computing kernels of various types; (2) there are irregular operations that cannot be directly performed using matrix-vector multiplication suitable for ReRAM, i.e., aggregation operation; (3) ReRAM has poor write endurance, and a lot of data during AMG acceleration needs to be rewritten into ReRAM, resulting in high write cost. To address these issues, firstly, we propose a flexible architecture, which can realize each kernel of AMG and is reused by many kernels to improve resource utilization. Secondly, we propose a dedicated unit to realize the aggregation operation. Finally, we present a new mapping strategy to greatly reduce the number of data handling and writes. The experimental results show that the performance of AmgR is improved by an average of one and two orders of magnitude compared to HYPRE on the CPU and AmgX on the GPU, respectively, while the energy consumption is reduced by an average of two and three orders of magnitude.
items.abstract_zh: 求解线性方程组是科学计算中的一个基本问题，几十年来已经得到广泛研究。最著名的求解器之一是代数多重网格（AMG），由于其良好的可扩展性而广泛应用于高性能计算。但目前加速AMG依赖于存储与计算分离的传统冯诺依曼架构，导致数据传输开销较大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 AmgR 的基于 ReRAM 的内存处理（PIM）架构，它克服了传统冯·诺依曼架构对于 AMG 加速的限制。然而，在 ReRAM 上加速 AMG 并非易事，因为（1）AMG 拥有许多各种类型的计算内核； (2)存在无法直接使用适合ReRAM的矩阵向量乘法进行的不规则运算，即聚合运算； （3）ReRAM的耐写能力较差，AMG加速时大量数据需要重写到ReRAM中，导致写入成本较高。为了解决这些问题，首先，我们提出了一种灵活的架构，它可以实现AMG的每个内核，并被许多内核重用，以提高资源利用率。其次，我们提出了一个专用单元来实现聚合操作。最后，我们提出了一种新的映射策略，以大大减少数据处理和写入的次数。实验结果表明，AmgR在CPU上的性能相比HYPRE和GPU上的AmgX分别平均提升了1个和2个数量级，而能耗则平均降低了2个和3个数量级。

items.title: vPIM: Efficient Virtual Address Translation for Scalable Processing-in-Memory Architectures.
items.abstract: 3D-stacked memory technologies make it possible to integrate computation logic into the memory stack to reduce data movement between CPU and memory, enabling processing-in-memory (PIM). PIM systems scale in capacity and bandwidth by connecting multiple PIM stacks through a memory network. They also need to be programmable, where having virtual memory support is critical. Existing address translation schemes, however, are not optimized for a scalable PIM system. In this work, we propose VPIM, a virtual address translation scheme for scalable, multi-stack PIM systems. VPIM optimizes contention of the memory network in a PIM system and reduces translation time with pre-translation. Our evaluation shows a speedup of 4.4× and 1.7× compared to conventional radix and cuckoo hash page tables in eight memory-intensive workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 堆栈内存技术可以将计算逻辑集成到内存堆栈中，以减少 CPU 和内存之间的数据移动，从而实现内存处理 (PIM)。 PIM 系统通过内存网络连接多个 PIM 堆栈来扩展容量和带宽。它们还需要可编程，其中虚拟内存支持至关重要。然而，现有的地址转换方案并未针对可扩展的 PIM 系统进行优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 VPIM，一种用于可扩展、多堆栈 PIM 系统的虚拟地址转换方案。 VPIM 优化 PIM 系统中内存网络的争用，并通过预翻译减少翻译时间。我们的评估显示，在 8 个内存密集型工作负载中，与传统基数和布谷鸟哈希页表相比，速度分别提高了 4.4 倍和 1.7 倍。

items.title: Robust Tickets Can Transfer Better: Drawing More Transferable Subnetworks in Transfer Learning.
items.abstract: Transfer learning leverages feature representations of deep neural networks (DNNs) pretrained on source tasks with rich data to empower effective finetuning on downstream tasks. However, the pre-trained models are often prohibitively large for delivering generalizable representations, which limits their deployment on edge devices with constrained resources. To close this gap, we propose a new transfer learning pipeline, which leverages our finding that robust tickets can transfer better, i.e., subnetworks drawn with properly induced adversarial robustness can win better transferability over vanilla lottery ticket subnetworks. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that our proposed transfer learning pipeline can achieve enhanced accuracy-sparsity trade-offs across both diverse downstream tasks and sparsity patterns, further enriching the lottery ticket hypothesis.
items.abstract_zh: 迁移学习利用在具有丰富数据的源任务上预训练的深度神经网络 (DNN) 的特征表示，以实现对下游任务的有效微调。然而，预训练的模型通常对于提供可概括的表示来说太大，这限制了它们在资源有限的边缘设备上的部署。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种新的转移学习管道，它利用了我们的发现，即稳健的彩票可以更好地转移，即，通过适当诱导的对抗稳健性绘制的子网络可以比普通彩票子网络赢得更好的可转移性。大量的实验和消融研究验证了我们提出的迁移学习管道可以在不同的下游任务和稀疏模式之间实现增强的准确性-稀疏性权衡，进一步丰富了彩票假设。

items.title: Invited: Algorithms and Architectures for Accelerating Long Read Sequence Analysis.
items.abstract: Genome sequencing is continuing to revolutionize the medical, forensics, agricultural, and biosecurity fields. The enormous amounts of data from modern sequencing technology, require significant time and cost to obtain accurate results using general-purpose computing resources. The emergence of third-generation sequencers called nanopore sequencers offers small, cheap, and portable genome sequencing capabilities. However, the bottleneck during computational analysis limits scalability and portability. This paper introduces the necessity for one, optimization of existing algorithms; two, efficient utilization of existing heterogeneous systems; and three, novel algorithms and domain-specific architectures for rapid in situ analysis of third-generation sequencing data. State-of-the-art examples are described and future challenges are outlined.
items.abstract_zh: 基因组测序正在继续彻底改变医学、法医学、农业和生物安全领域。现代测序技术产生的大量数据需要大量时间和成本才能使用通用计算资源获得准确的结果。称为纳米孔测序仪的第三代测序仪的出现提供了小型、廉价且便携式的基因组测序功能。然而，计算分析过程中的瓶颈限制了可扩展性和可移植性。介绍一、优化现有算法的必要性；二、高效利用现有异构系统；第三，用于第三代测序数据快速原位分析的新颖算法和特定领域架构。描述了最先进的示例并概述了未来的挑战。

items.title: RoSE: Robust Analog Circuit Parameter Optimization with Sampling-Efficient Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Design automation of analog circuits has been a long-standing challenge in the integrated circuit field. Recently, multiple methods based on learning or optimization have demonstrated great promise in automating device sizing for analog circuits. However, they often ignore the strong susceptibility of analog circuits to process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations or suffer from low sampling efficiency to train algorithms. To address these critical limitations, this paper proposes RoSE, the first Robust analog circuit parameter optimization framework with high Sampling Efficience by synergistically combining Bayesian Optimization (BO) and reinforcement learning (RL). Its core is to use the fast convergence of BO to find an optimized starting point for the backbone RL agent to notably improve its sampling efficiency during the learning process. With this pre-optimization, we further leverage the RL’s superior optimization ability to achieve robust device sizing by incorporating sufficient features of PVT variations into the representation learning loop. Experimental results of our proposed method on exemplary circuits show 3.25×∼16× improvement of sampling efficiency and 6.8× ∼ 24× improvement of figure-of-merit (FoM, defined with design efficiency and design accuracy) as compared to prior methods.
items.abstract_zh: 模拟电路的设计自动化一直是集成电路领域长期面临的挑战。最近，基于学习或优化的多种方法在自动化模拟电路器件尺寸调整方面展现出了巨大的前景。然而，他们经常忽视模拟电路对处理、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化的强烈敏感性，或者训练算法时采样效率低。为了解决这些关键限制，本文提出了 RoSE，这是第一个通过协同结合贝叶斯优化（BO）和强化学习（RL）来实现高采样效率的鲁棒模拟电路参数优化框架。其核心是利用BO的快速收敛为骨干强化学习代理找到一个优化的起点，以显着提高其学习过程中的采样效率。通过这种预优化，我们进一步利用 RL 的卓越优化能力，通过将 PVT 变化的足够特征纳入表示学习循环来实现稳健的设备尺寸调整。我们提出的方法在示例电路上的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，采样效率提高了 3.25×∼16×，品质因数（FoM，由设计效率和设计精度定义）提高了 6.8×∼24×。

items.title: Energy-Efficient On-Chip Training for Customized Home-based Rehabilitation Systems.
items.abstract: Rehabilitation is an essential process for patients suffering from motor disorders. It is generally performed by experts in a clinical environment. Home-based rehabilitation systems allow patients to perform rehabilitation without going to clinics, thus, reducing the commute and healthcare costs. Human joint estimation allows visualization of body movements required for rehabilitation. However, the estimations can be inaccurate if they are not customized for the specific patient. Therefore, we propose a personalized rehabilitation system customized to new patients utilizing energy-efficient on-chip training with in-memory acceleration. Experiments show that it customizes to new patients successfully with an average 28.01% lower error and provides energy-efficient estimates of human joint coordinates with 611.1× lower inference energy and 14.0× faster training.
items.abstract_zh: 对于患有运动障碍的患者来说，康复是一个重要的过程。它通常由专家在临床环境中执行。家庭康复系统允许患者无需去诊所即可进行康复，从而减少通勤和医疗费用。人体关节估计可以实现康复所需的身体运动的可视化。然而，如果不是针对特定患者定制的，则估计可能不准确。因此，我们提出了一种针对新患者定制的个性化康复系统，利用具有内存加速功能的节能片上训练。实验表明，它成功地为新患者进行了定制，平均误差降低了 28.01%，并提供了人体关节坐标的节能估计，推理能量降低了 611.1 倍，训练速度提高了 14.0 倍。

items.title: Power Side-Channel Vulnerability Assessment of Lightweight Cryptographic Scheme, XOODYAK.
items.abstract: This work presents a power side-channel analysis (SCA) of a lightweight cryptography (LWC) algorithm, XOODYAK, implemented on an FPGA. First, we perform generic leakage detection tests for two phases of authenticated encryption with associated data (AEAD) mode, namely INITIALIZE, and ABSORB. Second, we develop novel hypothetical attack models for correlation power analysis (CPA) and demonstrate a success rate (SR) of 92%/82% and minimum-traces-to-disclosure (MTD)=13K/38K on the INITIALIZE/ABSORB phases, respectively. Third, we evaluate ABSORB against Profiled SCA using convolutional neural network (CNN), and achieve SR=96%/64% and MTD=2K/16K on the test set for the same/different keys used for training, respectively. Finally, we suggest low-overhead countermeasures to protect against these SCA attacks.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了在 FPGA 上实现的轻量级加密 (LWC) 算法 XOODYAK 的功率侧通道分析 (SCA)。首先，我们对关联数据认证加密 (AEAD) 模式的两个阶段（即 INITIALIZE 和 ABSORB）执行通用泄漏检测测试。其次，我们开发了用于相关功率分析 (CPA) 的新型假设攻击模型，并在 INITIALIZE/ABSORB 阶段分别证明了 92%/82% 的成功率 (SR) 和最小泄露痕迹 (MTD)=13K/38K。第三，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）针对 Profiled SCA 评估 ABSORB，并在用于训练的相同/不同密钥的测试集上分别实现 SR=96%/64% 和 MTD=2K/16K。最后，我们建议采取低开销对策来防范这些 SCA 攻击。

items.title: Condense: A Framework for Device and Frequency Adaptive Neural Network Models on the Edge.
items.abstract: With the popularity of battery-powered edge computing, an important yet under-explored problem is the supporting of DNNs for diverse edge devices.
