items.abstract: In-storage Near-Data Processing (NDP) architectures can reduce data movement between the host and the storage device by offloading computing tasks to the storage. This encourages many studies on building NDP applications, such as recommendation systems and databases, on computational SSDs. However, in the data path of existing NDP architectures, an NDP application has to find out the address of the requested file data by calling the I/O stacks of the kernel on the host, which incurs large overhead for transferring data between the host and the computational SSD. In this paper, we present File Semantics Retriever (FSR) to optimize the data path of NDP architectures by locating and fetching the requested file data directly in the computational SSD. The key idea is to recognize the file system layout and the metadata structures in the storage with the collaboration of a user-space library and a handler in the firmware of the computational SSD. We implement a prototype of FSR and evaluate it on the Cosmos plus OpenSSD, a widely-used computational SSD platform. The experimental results show that FSR outperforms existing NDP architectures in both benchmarks and real-world NDP applications.
items.abstract_zh: 存储内近数据处理（NDP）架构可以通过将计算任务卸载到存储来减少主机和存储设备之间的数据移动。这鼓励了许多在计算 SSD 上构建 NDP 应用程序的研究，例如推荐系统和数据库。然而，在现有NDP架构的数据路径中，NDP应用程序必须通过调用主机上内核的I/O堆栈来找出所请求的文件数据的地址，这会在主机和计算SSD之间传输数据带来很大的开销。在本文中，我们提出了文件语义检索器（FSR），通过直接在计算 SSD 中定位和获取请求的文件数据来优化 NDP 架构的数据路径。关键思想是通过用户空间库和计算 SSD 固件中的处理程序的协作来识别存储中的文件系统布局和元数据结构。我们实现了 FSR 原型，并在广泛使用的计算 SSD 平台 Cosmos plus OpenSSD 上对其进行评估。实验结果表明，FSR 在基准测试和实际 NDP 应用中都优于现有的 NDP 架构。

items.title: FIONA: Fine-grained Incoherent Optical DNN Accelerator Search for Superior Efficiency and Robustness.
items.abstract: Incoherent optical DNN accelerators (OAs) are booming thanks to unparalleled performance-per-watt and excellent scalability. To boost their innovative development, a recent work revolutionarily proposed automatic OA search. However, the robustness and the acceleration performance of the generated OAs are below expectation, because the impacts of inter-tile data transfer and fabrication process & thermal variations (i.e., PTVs) on OAs were ignored. Both hinder OA design automation from being a reality. To resolve theses challenges, we develop FIONA, a novel framework for Fine-grained Incoherent Optical DNN Accelerator search towards both superior acceleration efficiency and inference robustness. Compared against 5 state-of-the-art incoherent OAs on 9 DNN benchmarks, extensive experiments and ablation studies validate the effectiveness of FIONA, achieving up to 198.01× acceleration efficiency improvement based on guaranteed robustness.
items.abstract_zh: 由于无与伦比的每瓦性能和出色的可扩展性，非相干光学 DNN 加速器 (OA) 正在蓬勃发展。为了促进他们的创新发展，最近的一项工作革命性地提出了自动OA搜索。然而，生成的 OA 的鲁棒性和加速性能低于预期，因为忽略了瓦片间数据传输和制造工艺以及热变化（即 PTV）对 OA 的影响。两者都阻碍了 OA 设计自动化成为现实。为了解决这些挑战，我们开发了 FIONA，这是一种用于细粒度非相干光学 DNN 加速器搜索的新型框架，可实现卓越的加速效率和推理鲁棒性。与 9 个 DNN 基准上的 5 个最先进的不相干 OA 相比，大量的实验和消融研究验证了 FIONA 的有效性，在保证鲁棒性的基础上实现了高达 198.01 倍的加速效率提升。

items.title: Input-Aware Dynamic Timestep Spiking Neural Networks for Efficient In-Memory Computing.
items.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have recently attracted widespread research interest as an efficient alternative to traditional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) because of their capability to process sparse and binary spike information and avoid expensive multiplication operations. Although the efficiency of SNNs can be realized on the In-Memory Computing (IMC) architecture, we show that the energy cost and latency of SNNs scale linearly with the number of timesteps used on IMC hardware. Therefore, in order to maximize the efficiency of SNNs, we propose input-aware Dynamic Timestep SNN (DT-SNN), a novel algorithmic solution to dynamically determine the number of timesteps during inference on an input-dependent basis. By calculating the entropy of the accumulated output after each timestep, we can compare it to a predefined threshold and decide if the information processed at the current timestep is sufficient for a confident prediction. We deploy DT-SNN on an IMC architecture and show that it incurs negligible computational overhead. We demonstrate that our method only uses 1.46 average timesteps to achieve the accuracy of a 4-timestep static SNN while reducing the energy-delay-product by 80%.
items.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 作为传统人工神经网络 (ANN) 的有效替代品，最近引起了广泛的研究兴趣，因为它们能够处理稀疏和二进制尖峰信息并避免昂贵的乘法运算。尽管 SNN 的效率可以在内存计算 (IMC) 架构上实现，但我们表明 SNN 的能源成本和延迟与 IMC 硬件上使用的时间步数呈线性关系。因此，为了最大限度地提高 SNN 的效率，我们提出了输入感知动态时间步长 SNN (DT-SNN)，这是一种新颖的算法解决方案，可在依赖于输入的基础上动态确定推理过程中的时间步数。通过计算每个时间步后累积输出的熵，我们可以将其与预定义的阈值进行比较，并确定当前时间步处理的信息是否足以进行置信预测。我们在 IMC 架构上部署 DT-SNN，并表明它产生的计算开销可以忽略不计。我们证明，我们的方法仅使用 1.46 个平均时间步长即可达到 4 时间步长静态 SNN 的精度，同时将能量延迟积减少 80%。

items.title: Orchestrating Measurement-Based Quantum Computation over Photonic Quantum Processors.
items.abstract: Quantum computing has rapidly evolved in recent years and has established its supremacy in many application domains. While matter-based qubit platforms such as superconducting qubits have received the most attention so far, there is a rising interest in photonic qubits lately, which show advantages in parallelism, speed, and scalability. Photonic qubits are best served by the paradigm of measurement-based quantum computation (MBQC). To deliver the promise of measurement-based photonic quantum computing (MBPQC), the photon cluster state depth and photon utilization are two of the most important metrics. However, little attention has been paid to optimizing the depth and utilization when mapping quantum circuits to the photon clusters. In this paper, we propose a compiler framework that achieves automatic and dynamic depth and utilization optimizations. Our approach consists of an MBPQC mapping mechanism that maps optimized measurement patterns on a cluster state and a cluster state pruning strategy that removes all possible redundancies without impacting the circuit functions. Experimental results on five quantum benchmark with three different qubit numbers indicate our approach achieves an average of 63.4% cluster depth reduction and 22.8% photon utilization improvements.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算近年来迅速发展，并在许多应用领域确立了其霸主地位。虽然超导量子位等基于物质的量子位平台迄今为止受到了最多的关注，但最近人们对光子量子位的兴趣日益浓厚，它在并行性、速度和可扩展性方面表现出优势。基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）范式最好地服务于光子量子位。为了实现基于测量的光子量子计算（MBPQC）的承诺，光子簇状态深度和光子利用率是两个最重要的指标。然而，在将量子电路映射到光子簇时，很少有人关注优化深度和利用率。在本文中，我们提出了一种编译器框架，可实现自动动态深度和利用率优化。我们的方法由MBPQC映射机制和集群状态修剪策略组成，MBPQC映射机制将优化的测量模式映射到集群状态，集群状态修剪策略在不影响电路功能的情况下消除所有可能的冗余。具有三个不同量子比特数的五个量子基准的实验结果表明，我们的方法平均实现了 63.4% 的簇深度减少和 22.8% 的光子利用率提高。

items.title: Privacy-Preserving DNN Training with Prefetched Meta-Keys on Heterogeneous Neural Network Accelerators.
items.abstract: The embedded software may migrate the collected data to the server for DNN computation acceleration, which may compromise privacy. We propose a DNN computation framework that combines TEE and NNA to address the privacy leakage problem. We design an NNA-friendly encryption method that enables NNA to correctly compute the encrypted linear input. Facing the overhead of TEE-NNA interaction, we design a pipeline-based prefetch mechanism that can reduce the TEE interaction overhead. Experimentally, our approach proves to be compatible with a wide range of NPUs and TPUs, and improves the performance by 8-19 times over the TEE scheme.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式软件可能会将收集到的数据迁移到服务器以进行 DNN 计算加速，这可能会损害隐私。我们提出了一种结合 TEE 和 NNA 的 DNN 计算框架来解决隐私泄露问题。我们设计了一种 NNA 友好的加密方法，使 NNA 能够正确计算加密的线性输入。面对TEE-NNA交互的开销，我们设计了一种基于管道的预取机制，可以减少TEE交互开销。实验证明，我们的方法可以兼容多种 NPU 和 TPU，并且性能比 TEE 方案提高 8-19 倍。

items.title: On EDA-Driven Learning for SAT Solving.
items.abstract: We present DeepSAT, a novel end-to-end learning framework for the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) problem. Unlike existing solutions trained on random SAT instances with relatively weak supervision, we propose applying the knowledge of the well-developed electronic design automation (EDA) field for SAT solving. Specifically, we first resort to logic synthesis algorithms to pre-process SAT instances into optimized and-inverter graphs (AIGs). By doing so, the distribution diversity among various SAT instances can be dramatically reduced, which facilitates improving the generalization capability of the learned model. Next, we regard the distribution of SAT solutions being a product of conditional Bernoulli distributions. Based on this observation, we approximate the SAT solving procedure with a conditional generative model, leveraging a novel directed acyclic graph neural network (DAGNN) with two polarity prototypes for conditional SAT modeling. To effectively train the generative model, with the help of logic simulation tools, we obtain the probabilities of nodes in the AIG being logic ‘1’ as rich supervision. We conduct comprehensive experiments on various SAT problems. Our results show that, DeepSAT achieves significant accuracy improvements over state-of-the-art learning-based SAT solutions, especially when generalized to SAT instances that are relatively large or with diverse distributions.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepSAT，一种针对布尔可满足性（SAT）问题的新颖的端到端学习框架。与在监督相对较弱的随机 SAT 实例上训练的现有解决方案不同，我们建议应用成熟的电子设计自动化 (EDA) 领域的知识来解决 SAT 问题。具体来说，我们首先采用逻辑综合算法将 SAT 实例预处理为优化的逆变器图（AIG）。通过这样做，可以大大减少各种 SAT 实例之间的分布多样性，这有利于提高学习模型的泛化能力。接下来，我们将 SAT 解的分布视为条件伯努利分布的乘积。基于这一观察，我们使用条件生成模型来近似 SAT 求解过程，利用新颖的有向无环图神经网络 (DAGNN) 和两个极性原型进行条件 SAT 建模。为了有效地训练生成模型，借助逻辑仿真工具，我们获得AIG中节点为逻辑“1”的概率作为丰富的监督。我们对各种 SAT 问题进行了全面的实验。我们的结果表明，与最先进的基于学习的 SAT 解决方案相比，DeepSAT 的准确性显着提高，特别是在推广到相对较大或具有不同分布的 SAT 实例时。

items.title: EENet: Energy Efficient Neural Networks with Run-time Power Management.
items.abstract: Deep learning approaches, such as convolution neural networks (CNNs), have achieved tremendous success in versatile applications. However, one of the challenges to deploy the deep learning models on resource-constrained systems is its huge energy cost. As a dynamic inference approach, early exit adds exiting layers to the networks, which can terminate the inference earlier with accurate results to save energy. The current passive decision-making for energy regulation of early exit cannot adapt to ongoing inference status, varying inference workloads, and timing constraints, let alone guide the reasonable configuration of the computing platforms alongside the inference proceeds for potential energy saving. In this paper, we propose an Energy Efficient Neural Networks (EENet), which introduces a plug-in module to the state-of-the-art networks by incorporating run-time power management. Within each inference, we establish prediction of where the network will exit and adjust computing configurations (i.e., frequency and voltage) accordingly over a small timescale. Considering multiple inferences over a large timescale, we provide frequency and voltage calibration advice, given inference workloads and timing constraints. Finally, the dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) governor configures voltage and frequency to execute the network according to the prediction and calibration. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that EENet achieves up to 63.8% energy-saving compared with classic deep learning networks and 21.5% energy-saving compared with the early exit under state-of-the-art exiting strategies, together with improved timing performance.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习方法，例如卷积神经网络（CNN），在多种应用中取得了巨大的成功。然而，在资源受限的系统上部署深度学习模型的挑战之一是其巨大的能源成本。作为一种动态推理方法，早期退出向网络添加了退出层，可以更早地终止推理并获得准确的结果，从而节省能量。当前提前退出的能量调节的被动决策无法适应持续的推理状态、不断变化的推理工作负载和时间限制，更不用说指导计算平台的合理配置以及推理收益以实现潜在的节能。在本文中，我们提出了一种节能神经网络（EENet），它通过结合运行时电源管理向最先进的网络引入了插件模块。在每个推论中，我们对网络将退出的位置进行预测，并在较小的时间尺度内相应地调整计算配置（即频率和电压）。考虑到大时间范围内的多次推理，我们在给定推理工作负载和时序限制的情况下提供频率和电压校准建议。最后，动态电压和频率调节（DVFS）调节器根据预测和校准配置电压和频率以执行网络。大量实验结果表明，EENet 与经典深度学习网络相比节能高达 63.8%，与现有最先进策略下的提前退出相比节能 21.5%，同时提高了时序性能。

items.title: RLAlloc: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-Assisted Resource Allocation Framework for Enhanced Both I/O Throughput and QoS Performance of Multi-Streamed SSDs.
items.abstract: Multi-streamed Solid-State Disks (SSDs) have attracted increasing adoption in modern flash storage devices. Despite their excellent promise, effective flash resource allocation is still limiting both their achievable I/O performance and practical implementation. To this end, we develop the first-of-its-kind framework dubbed RLAlloc, which for the first time demonstrates deep Reinforcement Learning-assisted resource Allocation for boosting both I/O throughput and QoS performance of multi-streamed SSDs. Extensive experiments consistently validate the effectiveness of RLAlloc, improving up to 39.9% on I/O throughput and 44.0% on QoS performance over the state-of-the-art competitors.
items.abstract_zh: 多流固态磁盘 (SSD) 在现代闪存存储设备中的应用越来越广泛。尽管它们有着出色的前景，但有效的闪存资源分配仍然限制了它们可实现的 I/O 性能和实际实施。为此，我们开发了名为 RLAlloc 的首个框架，该框架首次展示了深度强化学习辅助资源分配，可提高多流 SSD 的 I/O 吞吐量和 QoS 性能。大量实验一致验证了 RLAlloc 的有效性，与最先进的竞争对手相比，I/O 吞吐量提高了 39.9%，QoS 性能提高了 44.0%。

items.title: APPEND: Rethinking ASIP Synthesis in the Era of AI.
items.abstract: Application-specific instruction-set processors (ASIP) has been widely used to speedup specific applications based on general-purpose processor (CPU) ISA-extension and scalar/vector units customization. However, as deep neural processing unit (NPU) becomes a dominant IP in nowadays system-on-chip (SoC) designs, the rich computational and memory resource of the NPUs integrated into advanced CPUs should also be utilized to achieve an even better application performance boost than vector/scalar compute-unit customization only. In this paper, we propose APPEND, a novel framework that tries to enrich the ASIP design methodology by taking the co-designing of both NPU and RISC-V CPU into consideration. To fully utilize and customize the resources of CPU and NPU, APPEND automatically (1) identifies the NPU-compatible kernels from the target application and partition the applications in between the NPU and RISC-V CPU core, (2) based on the application performance specification, applies the necessary hardware parameterization and customization based on the RISC-V CPU and NPU templates, and also (3) generates the extended NPU instructions to accelerate the critical and compatible kernels of the target application.
items.abstract_zh: 专用指令集处理器 (ASIP) 已被广泛用于加速基于通用处理器 (CPU) ISA 扩展和标量/向量单元定制的特定应用程序。然而，随着深度神经处理单元 (NPU) 成为当今片上系统 (SoC) 设计中的主导 IP，集成到高级 CPU 中的 NPU 丰富的计算和内存资源也应该被利用，以实现比仅矢量/标量计算单元定制更好的应用程序性能提升。在本文中，我们提出了 APPEND，这是一种新颖的框架，试图通过考虑 NPU 和 RISC-V CPU 的协同设计来丰富 ASIP 设计方法。为了充分利用和定制CPU和NPU的资源，APPEND自动（1）从目标应用程序中识别NPU兼容内核，并将应用程序在NPU和RISC-V CPU内核之间进行分区，（2）根据应用程序性能规范，基于RISC-V CPU和NPU模板应用必要的硬件参数化和定制，并且（3）生成扩展NPU指令以加速目标应用程序的关键和兼容内核。

items.title: Global Floorplanning via Semidefinite Programming.
items.abstract: A major task in chip design involves identifying the location and shape of each major design block/module in the layout footprint. This is commonly known as floorplanning. The first step of this task is known as global floorplanning and involves identifying a location for each module that minimizes wire length and leaves sufficient area for each module. Existing global floorplanning methods either have a non-convex problem formulation, or have trivial global solutions with no guarantee on the quality of the result. Here, we model the global floorplanning as a Semi-Definite Programming (SDP) problem with a rank constraint. We replace the rank constraint with a direction matrix and convexify the problem, whose solution is shown to be a global optimum if an appropriate direction matrix is chosen. To calculate the direction matrix, a convex iteration algorithm is used where the problem is decomposed into two SDP sub-problems. Furthermore, we introduce a series of techniques that enhance the flexibility, accuracy, and efficiency of our algorithm. Design experiments demonstrate that our proposed method reduces the average wirelength up to 20% for different benchmarks and outline aspect ratios.
items.abstract_zh: 芯片设计的一项主要任务涉及确定布局足迹中每个主要设计块/模块的位置和形状。这通常称为布局规划。此任务的第一步称为全局布局规划，涉及确定每个模块的位置，以最大限度地减少电线长度并为每个模块留出足够的区域。现有的全局布局规划方法要么具有非凸问题表述，要么具有微不足道的全局解决方案，无法保证结果的质量。在这里，我们将全局布局规划建模为具有秩约束的半定规划（SDP）问题。我们用方向矩阵代替秩约束并对问题进行凸化，如果选择适当的方向矩阵，则其解决方案将是全局最优的。为了计算方向矩阵，使用凸迭代算法将问题分解为两个 SDP 子问题。此外，我们引入了一系列技术来增强算法的灵活性、准确性和效率。设计实验表明，对于不同的基准和轮廓纵横比，我们提出的方法将平均线长减少了 20%。

items.title: Orchestrated Scheduling and Partitioning for Improved Address Translation in GPUs.
items.abstract: Unified Virtual Memory (UVM) is a promising feature in CPU-GPU heterogeneous systems that allows data structures to be accessed by both CPU and GPUs through unified pointers without explicit data copying. However, the delivered performance of UVM significantly relies on the efficiency of address translation. The current GPU thread block (TB) management is not aware of the translation process and heavily thrashes the per-streaming multiprocessor (SM) private Translation Look-ahead Buffers (TLBs). In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive characterization of 10 GPU benchmarks and quantify the translation reuses among the thread blocks. Our observation reveals that there exists substantial translation reuse within TBs rather than across the TBs. Moreover, the inter-TB interference significantly enlarges the intra-TB translation reuse distances. To this end, we propose a translation-aware TB scheduling and lightweight GPU L1 TLB partitioning to effectively mitigate the contention. Experimental results show that our proposed approach improves the L1 TLB hit rate, and this improvement translates to, on average, a 12.5% execution time reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 是 CPU-GPU 异构系统中一项很有前途的功能，它允许 CPU 和 GPU 通过统一指针访问数据结构，而无需显式数据复制。然而，UVM 的交付性能很大程度上依赖于地址转换的效率。当前的 GPU 线程块 (TB) 管理不知道转换过程，并且会严重影响每个流式多处理器 (SM) 私有转换先行缓冲区 (TLB)。在本文中，我们对 10 个 GPU 基准测试进行了全面的表征，并量化了线程块之间的转换重用。我们的观察表明，TB 内部而非跨 TB 之间存在大量翻译重用。此外，TB间干扰显着扩大了TB内翻译重用距离。为此，我们提出了一种翻译感知的 TB 调度和轻量级 GPU L1 TLB 分区，以有效缓解争用。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法提高了 L1 TLB 命中率，这种改进平均意味着执行时间减少了 12.5%。

items.title: Invited: Algorithm-Software-Hardware Co-Design for Deep Learning Acceleration.
items.abstract: With the development of AI techniques, it is appealing but challenging to efficiently deploy deep neural networks on resource-constrained devices. This paper presents two novel algorithm-software-hardware co-designs for improving the performance of deep neural networks. The first part introduces a hardware-efficient adaptive token pruning framework for Vision Transformers (ViTs) on FPGA, which achieves significant speedup under similar model accuracy. The second part introduces a design automation flow for crossbar-based Binary Neural Network (BNN) accelerators using the emerging technique Adiabatic Quantum-Flux-Parametron (AQFP). The proposed method significantly improves energy efficiency by combining AQFP with BNN together, which achieves over 100× better energy efficiency compared with the previous representative AQFP-based framework. Both proposed designs demonstrate superior performance compared to existing methods.
items.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能技术的发展，在资源受限的设备上有效部署深度神经网络很有吸引力，但也充满挑战。本文提出了两种新颖的算法-软件-硬件协同设计，用于提高深度神经网络的性能。第一部分介绍了 FPGA 上的 Vision Transformers (ViTs) 的硬件高效自适应令牌剪枝框架，该框架在相似的模型精度下实现了显着的加速。第二部分介绍了使用新兴技术绝热量子通量参量管 (AQFP) 的基于交叉的二元神经网络 (BNN) 加速器的设计自动化流程。该方法通过将 AQFP 与 BNN 相结合，显着提高了能源效率，与之前基于 AQFP 的代表性框架相比，能源效率提高了 100 倍以上。与现有方法相比，两种提议的设计都表现出优越的性能。

items.title: SE3: Sequential Equivalence Checking for Non-Cycle-Accurate Design Transformations †.
items.abstract: In high-level design explorations, many useful optimizations transform a circuit into another with different operating cycles for a better trade-off between performance and resource usage. How to efficiently check their equivalence is critical and challenging since most existing equivalence checkers are designed for cycle-accurate circuits. This paper presents SE3, an efficient sequential equivalence checker without assumption on cycle-accuracy, latch mapping, or I/O interface of the checked circuits. It proves the equivalence of two circuits by computing an equivalence relation between the states of the two circuits and utilizes syntax abstraction to accelerate this process. Experimental results show that SE3 is significantly faster than state-of-the-art sequential equivalence checking algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 在高级设计探索中，许多有用的优化将一个电路转换为具有不同操作周期的另一个电路，以便在性能和资源使用之间更好地权衡。如何有效地检查它们的等效性至关重要且具有挑战性，因为大多数现有的等效性检查器都是针对周期精确电路而设计的。本文提出了 SE3，一种高效的顺序等价检查器，无需对被检查电路的周期精度、锁存器映射或 I/O 接口进行假设。它通过计算两个电路状态之间的等价关系来证明两个电路的等价性，并利用语法抽象来加速这个过程。实验结果表明，SE3 明显快于最先进的顺序等价检查算法。

items.title: NMExplorer: An Efficient Exploration Framework for DIMM-based Near-Memory Tensor Reduction.
items.abstract: Various DIMM-based near-memory processing (DIMM-NMP) architectures have been proposed to accelerate tensor reduction. With careful evaluation, we find that diverse scenarios exhibit distinct performance on DIMM-NMP architectures adopting different design configurations. However, given a tensor reduction scenario, there is a lack of a fast and accurate solution to identify a proper DIMM-NMP architecture. To tackle this problem, we propose an efficient exploration framework called NMExplorer. Given a scenario and hardware parameters, NMExplorer can generate and explore a wide range of potential design configurations. Experiments show that the recommended designs can outperform state-of-the-art DIMM-NMP accelerators by up to 1.95× in performance and 3.69× in energy.
items.abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种基于 DIMM 的近内存处理 (DIMM-NMP) 架构来加速张量缩减。经过仔细评估，我们发现采用不同设计配置的 DIMM-NMP 架构在不同场景下表现出不同的性能。然而，考虑到张量缩减场景，缺乏快速准确的解决方案来识别合适的 DIMM-NMP 架构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 NMExplorer 的高效探索框架。给定场景和硬件参数，NMExplorer 可以生成并探索各种潜在的设计配置。实验表明，推荐的设计在性能上比最先进的 DIMM-NMP 加速器高出 1.95 倍，在能耗上高出 3.69 倍。

items.title: Memory-Efficient and Real-Time SPAD-based dToF Depth Sensor with Spatial and Statistical Correlation.
items.abstract: Single Photon Avalanche Diode (SPAD)-based direct time-of-flight (dToF) depth sensors are widely used in Internet of Things (IoT) devices due to their high accuracy. Existing SPAD-based dToF sensors measure depth by continually accumulating the depth-measured value in a histogram. However, histogram-based methods typically have low convergence speed (~10 frames per second (FPS)) and large memory overhead (MB-level), hindering their use in real-time embedded IoT devices. To overcome these two challenges, we propose SSC, a histogram-free Spatial and Statistical Correlation based depth measurement method. On the one hand, SSC applies the spatial correlation of the adjacent pixels to accelerate the convergence speed. On the other hand, SSC explores the statistical correlation of depth measurements to reduce the memory overhead. In order to implement SSC with small hardware area and low power, we design mert-dToF, a memory-efficient and real-time dToF sensor for efficient execution. mert-dToF abstracts mainly operations in SSC into four basic operators and designs corresponding hardware with a fine-grained pipeline to maximize resource reuse and computational parallelism. Extensive experiments show that compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) histogram-based dToF sensors, mert-dToF achieves ~8% accuracy improvement and 7.80× speedup (from 6.24 FPS to 48.70 FPS). The memory overhead is reduced by up to 60.91% (from 48 KB to 18.75 KB).
items.abstract_zh: 基于单光子雪崩二极管 (SPAD) 的直接飞行时间 (dToF) 深度传感器因其高精度而广泛应用于物联网 (IoT) 设备。现有的基于 SPAD 的 dToF 传感器通过不断累积直方图中的深度测量值来测量深度。然而，基于直方图的方法通常具有较低的收敛速度（每秒约 10 帧（FPS））和较大的内存开销（MB 级），阻碍了它们在实时嵌入式物联网设备中的使用。为了克服这两个挑战，我们提出了 SSC，一种基于无直方图空间和统计相关性的深度测量方法。一方面，SSC应用相邻像素的空间相关性来加快收敛速度​​。另一方面，SSC 探索深度测量的统计相关性以减少内存开销。为了以小硬件面积和低功耗实现SSC，我们设计了mert-dToF，一种内存高效且实时的dToF传感器，以实现高效执行。 mert-dToF将SSC中的主要操作抽象为四个基本算子，并设计相应的具有细粒度管道的硬件，以最大限度地提高资源重用和计算并行性。大量实验表明，与最先进 (SOTA) 的基于直方图的 dToF 传感器相比，mert-dToF 实现了约 8% 的精度提升和 7.80 倍的加速（从 6.24 FPS 到 48.70 FPS）。内存开销减少高达 60.91%（从 48 KB 减少到 18.75 KB）。

items.title: DRPTM: A Decoupled Read-efficient High-scalable Persistent Transactional Memory.
items.abstract: Persistent transactional memory (PTM) exploits transactions to provide an easy crash-consistent interface for persistent memory (PM). However, because of the substantial reader-side overhead brought on by the low bandwidth and long persistence latency of PM, present PTM research cannot scale effectively. This paper proposes a highly scalable PTM system, DRPTM, which allows nearly non-overhead reads without lowering the isolation level. DRPTM decouples persistence latency from concurrency control and traces the read-only copy maintained in logs as a lightweight read set. The evaluation shows that DRPTM significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art PTM systems for various workloads and achieves near-linear scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 持久事务内存 (PTM) 利用事务为持久内存 (PM) 提供简单的崩溃一致接口。然而，由于 PM 的低带宽和长持久延迟带来了大量的读取器端开销，目前的 PTM 研究无法有效扩展。本文提出了一种高度可扩展的 PTM 系统 DRPTM，它允许几乎无开销的读取而不降低隔离级别。 DRPTM 将持久性延迟与并发控制解耦，并将日志中维护的只读副本作为轻量级读取集进行跟踪。评估表明，DRPTM 在各种工作负载上显着优于最先进的 PTM 系统，并实现了近线性的可扩展性。

items.title: Response Time Analysis and Optimization of DAG Tasks Exploiting Mutually Exclusive Execution.
items.abstract: There is an increasing move towards implementing embedded real-time systems upon multiprocessors with parallel applications, which are usually modeled as Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs). Plentiful work has been presented to optimize the bound of Worst-Case Response Time (WCRT) since the cornerstone work proposed by Graham in 1969. However, all these works are developed on the basis of Graham’s bound and failed to tackle the root of pessimism in it. In this work, we present a novel method to optimize the WCRT bound of a DAG task by designing mutually exclusive groups so that a sequential execution is enforced for some nodes, under which the problem of bounding WCRT becomes a problem of identifying a mutually exclusive path and thus does not suffer the pessimism in Graham’s bound. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our method against other WCRT optimization approaches in the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 人们越来越倾向于在具有并行应用程序的多处理器上实现嵌入式实时系统，这些系统通常建模为有向无环图 (DAG)。自Graham于1969年提出基石工作以来，已经提出了大量的工作来优化最坏情况响应时间（WCRT）的界限。然而，所有这些工作都是在Graham的界限的基础上发展起来的，未能解决其中悲观主义的根源。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过设计互斥组来优化 DAG 任务的 WCRT 边界的新方法，以便对某些节点强制执行顺序执行，在这种方法下，边界 WCRT 的问题变成了识别互斥路径的问题，因此不会遭受格雷厄姆边界中的悲观主义。进行实验是为了评估我们的方法相对于其他最先进的 WCRT 优化方法的性能。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Test Selection For RTL Coverage By Unsupervised Learning From Fast Functional Simulation.
items.abstract: Functional coverage closure is an important but RTL simulation intensive aspect of constrained random verification. To reduce these computational demands, we propose test selection for functional coverage via machine learning (ML) based anomaly detection in the structural coverage space of fast functional simulators. We achieve promising results on two units from a state-of-the-art production GPU design. With our approach, an up to 85% RTL simulation runtime reduction can be achieved when compared to baseline constrained random test selection while achieving the same RTL functional coverage.
items.abstract_zh: 功能覆盖收敛是约束随机验证的一个重要但 RTL 模拟密集的方面。为了减少这些计算需求，我们建议通过快速功能模拟器的结构覆盖空间中基于机器学习（ML）的异常检测来进行功能覆盖的测试选择。我们通过最先进的生产 GPU 设计在两台设备上取得了令人鼓舞的结果。通过我们的方法，与基线约束随机测试选择相比，可以实现高达 85% 的 RTL 仿真运行时间减少，同时实现相同的 RTL 功能覆盖率。

items.title: Hybrid Gate-Pulse Model for Variational Quantum Algorithms.
items.abstract: Current quantum programs are mostly synthesized and compiled on the gate-level, where quantum circuits are composed of quantum gates. The gate-level workflow, however, introduces significant redundancy when quantum gates are eventually transformed into control signals and applied on quantum devices. For superconducting quantum computers, the control signals are microwave pulses. Therefore, pulse-level optimization has gained more attention from researchers due to their advantages in terms of circuit duration. Recent works, however, are limited by their poor scalability brought by the large parameter space of control signals. In addition, the lack of gate-level "knowledge" also affects the performance of pure pulse-level frameworks. We present a hybrid gate-pulse model that can mitigate these problems. We propose to use gate-level compilation and optimization for "fixed" part of the quantum circuits and to use pulse-level methods for problem-agnostic parts. Experimental results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed framework in discrete optimization tasks. We achieve a performance boost at most 8% with 60% shorter pulse duration in the problem-agnostic layer.
items.abstract_zh: 目前的量子程序大多是在门级上综合和编译的，其中量子电路是由量子门组成的。然而，当量子门最终转换为控制信号并应用于量子设备时，门级工作流程会引入显着的冗余。对于超导量子计算机，控制信号是微波脉冲。因此，脉冲级优化因其在电路持续时间方面的优势而受到了研究人员的更多关注。然而，最近的工作受到控制信号参数空间大带来的可扩展性差的限制。此外，缺乏门级“知识”也影响了纯脉冲级框架的性能。我们提出了一种混合栅极脉冲模型，可以缓解这些问题。我们建议对量子电路的“固定”部分使用门级编译和优化，并对与问题无关的部分使用脉冲级方法。实验结果证明了所提出的框架在离散优化任务中的效率。我们在与问题无关的层中将脉冲持续时间缩短了 60%，从而实现了最多 8% 的性能提升。

items.title: On a Moreau Envelope Wirelength Model for Analytical Global Placement.
items.abstract: Analytical placement is proven to be effective in global placement. The differentiability of wirelength models is very critical to gradient-based numerical optimization. Most previous works approximate the non-smooth half-perimeter wirelength (HPWL) model with various differentiable functions. In this paper, we propose a new differentiable wirelength model using the Moreau envelope to approximate HPWL. By combining the state-of-the-art electrostatic-based placement algorithm, the experimental results demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve up to 5.4% HPWL improvement and more than 1% on average compared to the most widely-used nonlinear wirelength model.
items.abstract_zh: 事实证明，分析性布局在全球布局中是有效的。线长模型的可微性对于基于梯度的数值优化非常关键。大多数先前的工作都使用各种可微函数来近似非光滑半周长线长（HPWL）模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的可微分线长模型，使用 Moreau 包络来近似 HPWL。通过结合最先进的基于静电的布局算法，实验结果表明，与最广泛使用的非线性线长模型相比，我们提出的算法可以实现高达 5.4% 的 HPWL 改进，平均超过 1%。

items.title: Work or Sleep: Freshness-Aware Energy Scheduling for Wireless Powered Communication Networks with Interference Consideration.
items.abstract: This paper explores how to schedule energy to optimize the information freshness in wireless powered communication networks (WPCNs) when considering channel interference among adjacent sensor nodes. We introduce Age of Information (AoI) to quantitatively evaluate the information freshness and formulate the AoI optimization problem. Unlike prior works focusing on system optimization for WPCNs while ignoring channel interference in energy transfer, this work reveals situations where channel interference among adjacent sensor nodes cannot be neglected and explores optimizing information freshness with interference consideration. To take the phenomena into account, we propose an energy scheduling solution to detect the channel interference and then judiciously determine the energy and time allocation for individual sensor nodes to improve the AoI performance as well as the system throughput. We implement a multi-node WPCN testbed to validate the functional correctness of the proposed solution, and extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed solution. The experimental results show that the proposed solution can reduce the average AoI by 54.7% and the average throughput by 49.8% on average compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了在考虑相邻传感器节点之间的信道干扰时如何调度能量以优化无线供电通信网络（WPCN）中的信息新鲜度。我们引入信息时代（AoI）来定量评估信息新鲜度并制定 AoI 优化问题。与之前专注于 WPCN 系统优化而忽略能量传输中的信道干扰的工作不同，这项工作揭示了相邻传感器节点之间的信道干扰不可忽视的情况，并探索在考虑干扰的情况下优化信息新鲜度。考虑到这些现象，我们提出了一种能量调度解决方案来检测信道干扰，然后明智地确定各个传感器节点的能量和时间分配，以提高 AoI 性能和系统吞吐量。我们实现了多节点 WPCN 测试床来验证所提出解决方案的功能正确性，并且大量实验证明了所提出解决方案的有效性。实验结果表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，所提出的解决方案可以将平均 AoI 降低 54.7%，平均吞吐量降低 49.8%。

items.title: Scalable Optimal Layout Synthesis for NISQ Quantum Processors.
items.abstract: Due to its effect on the success rate of a quantum circuit, quantum layout synthesis is a crucial step for circuit compilation. As such, having a layout synthesis tool that provides high solution quality is important to maximize circuit performance and fidelity for NISQ application. Previous heuristic approaches have been shown to be far from optimal when evaluated on known-optimal benchmarks. Alternatively, exact layout synthesis tools can generate optimal results with the aid of constraint solvers but generally suffer from scalability issues because of inefficient encodings and slow optimization methods. In this paper, we propose a scalable optimal layout synthesis tool that improves upon previous works, through a more succinct problem formulation as well as better encoding techniques. Additionally, we implement a depth and SWAP count optimization feature that performs iterative refinement under a fixed time budget. Experimental results show that for depth optimization, our tool can achieve a 692× speedup over the state-of-the-art optimal layout synthesis, and for SWAP optimization, we can obtain a 6,957× speedup on average. Compared to a leading heuristic-based synthesizer, for depth optimization, we can solve circuits consisting of 54 program qubits and 1726 gates within 11 hours with an 18× depth reduction and by 12× SWAP count reduction on average.
items.abstract_zh: 由于量子布局综合影响量子电路的成功率，因此量子布局综合是电路编译的关键步骤。因此，拥有一个提供高解决方案质量的布局综合工具对于最大限度地提高 NISQ 应用的电路性能和保真度非常重要。在已知的最佳基准上进行评估时，以前的启发式方法已被证明远非最佳。或者，精确布局综合工具可以借助约束求解器生成最佳结果，但由于编码效率低下和优化方法缓慢，通常会遇到可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的最佳布局综合工具，该工具通过更简洁的问题表述以及更好的编码技术来改进以前的工作。此外，我们还实现了深度和交换计数优化功能，可在固定时间预算下执行迭代细化。实验结果表明，对于深度优化，我们的工具可以比最先进的最佳布局综合实现 692 倍的加速，而对于 SWAP 优化，我们可以获得平均 6,957 倍的加速。与领先的基于启发式的合成器相比，对于深度优化，我们可以在 11 小时内解决由 54 个程序量子位和 1726 个门组成的电路，平均深度减少 18 倍，SWAP 计数减少 12 倍。

items.title: AdaS: A Fast and Energy-Efficient CNN Accelerator Exploiting Bit-Sparsity.
items.abstract: Bit-sparsity has shown its promise in CNN acceleration. However, prior bit-sparse accelerators have two drawbacks: 1) a large number of zero values are involved in the computation and data movement; 2) the distribution of non-zero bits is not considered in PE design. To address these issues, we propose AdaS. At the multiplier level, we dynamically serialize the operands that have fewer non-zero bits. At the dataflow level, we propose a group-wise bi-directional inner-join for workload extraction and balancing. Results show that AdaS can achieve 3.28×, 2.05× speedup, and 1.99×, 1.80× energy efficiency over Bit-Pragmatic and Laconic, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 位稀疏性在 CNN 加速中展现了它的前景。然而，现有的位稀疏加速器有两个缺点：1）计算和数据移动涉及大量零值； 2）PE设计中没有考虑非零位的分布。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 AdaS。在乘法器级别，我们动态序列化具有较少非零位的操作数。在数据流级别，我们提出了一种用于工作负载提取和平衡的分组双向内连接。结果表明，AdaS 比 Bit-Pragmatic 和 Laconic 分别能实现 3.28 倍、2.05 倍加速和 1.99 倍、1.80 倍能源效率。

items.title: Intermittent-Aware Neural Network Pruning.
items.abstract: Deep neural network inference on energy harvesting tiny devices has emerged as a solution for sustainable edge intelligence. However, compact models optimized for continuously-powered systems may become suboptimal when deployed on intermittently-powered systems. This paper presents the pruning criterion, pruning strategy, and prototype implementation of iPrune, the first framework which introduces intermittency into neural network pruning to produce compact models adaptable to intermittent systems. The pruned models are deployed and evaluated on a Texas Instruments device with various power strengths and TinyML applications. Compared to an energy-aware pruning framework, iPrune can speed up intermittent inference by 1.1 to 2 times while achieving comparable model accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 针对能量收集微型设备的深度神经网络推理已成为可持续边缘智能的解决方案。然而，针对连续供电系统优化的紧凑型模型在部署在间歇供电系统上时可能会变得次优。本文介绍了 iPrune 的剪枝标准、剪枝策略和原型实现，iPrune 是第一个将间歇性引入神经网络剪枝以产生适用于间歇系统的紧凑模型的框架。修剪后的模型在具有各种功率强度和 TinyML 应用程序的 Texas Instruments 设备上进行部署和评估。与能量感知剪枝框架相比，iPrune 可以将间歇推理速度提高 1.1 至 2 倍，同时实现相当的模型精度。

items.title: GenFuzz: GPU-accelerated Hardware Fuzzing using Genetic Algorithm with Multiple Inputs.
items.abstract: Hardware fuzzing has emerged as a promising automatic verification technique to efficiently discover and verify hardware vulnerabilities. However, hardware fuzzing can be extremely time-consuming due to compute-intensive iterative simulations. While recent research has explored several approaches to accelerate hardware fuzzing, nearly all of them are limited to single-input fuzzing using one thread of a CPU-based simulator. As a result, we propose Gen-Fuzz, a GPU-accelerated hardware fuzzer using a genetic algorithm with multiple inputs. Measuring experimental results on a real industrial design, we show that GenFuzz running on a single A6000 GPU and eight CPU cores achieves 80× runtime speed-up when compared to state-of-the-art hardware fuzzers.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件模糊测试已成为一种有前途的自动验证技术，可以有效地发现和验证硬件漏洞。然而，由于计算密集型迭代模拟，硬件模糊测试可能非常耗时。虽然最近的研究探索了多种加速硬件模糊测试的方法，但几乎所有方法都仅限于使用基于 CPU 的模拟器的一个线程进行单输入模糊测试。因此，我们提出了 Gen-Fuzz，这是一种 GPU 加速的硬件模糊器，使用具有多个输入的遗传算法。通过测量真实工业设计的实验结果，我们发现，与最先进的硬件模糊器相比，在单个 A6000 GPU 和 8 个 CPU 内核上运行的 GenFuzz 实现了 80 倍的运行时加速。

items.title: Seeking the Yield Barrier: High-Dimensional SRAM Evaluation Through Optimal Manifold.
items.abstract: Being able to efficiently obtain an accurate estimate of the failure probability of SRAM components has become a central issue as model circuits shrink their scale to submicrometer with advanced technology nodes. In this work, we revisit the classic norm minimization method. We then generalize it with infinite components and derive the novel optimal manifold concept, which bridges the surrogate-based and importance sampling (IS) yield estimation methods. We then derive a sub-optimal manifold, optimal hypersphere, which leads to an efficient sampling method being aware of the failure boundary called onion sampling. Finally, we use a neural coupling flow (which learns from samples like a surrogate model) as the IS proposal distribution. These combinations give rise to a novel yield estimation method, named Optimal Manifold Important Sampling (OPTIMIS), which keeps the advantages of the surrogate and IS methods to deliver state-of-the-art performance with robustness and consistency, with up to 3.5x in efficiency and 3x in accuracy over the best of SOTA methods in High-dimensional SRAM evaluation.
items.abstract_zh: 随着模型电路通过先进技术节点将其尺寸缩小到亚微米，能够有效地准确估计 SRAM 组件的故障概率已成为一个中心问题。在这项工作中，我们重新审视经典的范数最小化方法。然后，我们用无限分量对其进行概括，并推导出新颖的最优流形概念，该概念将基于替代的方法和重要性采样（IS）产量估计方法联系起来。然后，我们推导出一个次优流形，即最优超球面，这导致了一种能够识别故障边界的有效采样方法，称为洋葱采样。最后，我们使用神经耦合流（从代理模型等样本中学习）作为 IS 提议分布。这些组合产生了一种新颖的良率估计方法，称为最佳流形重要采样 (OPTIMIS)，该方法保留了替代方法和 IS 方法的优点，以鲁棒性和一致性提供最先进的性能，与高维 SRAM 评估中最好的 SOTA 方法相比，效率高达 3.5 倍，精度高达 3 倍。

items.title: Rethinking Programming Frameworks for In-Storage Processing.
items.abstract: In-storage processing (ISP) is the most commercialized implementation of the near-data processing (NDP) model that executes tasks near their storage locations. However, programming ISP devices is complicated as it requires programmers to work closely with the underlying hardware, and even highly-optimized code can easily lead to suboptimal performance.This paper introduces ActivePy. ActivePy makes the programmer completely agnostic to ISP hardware. ActivePy automatically, transpartently, and dynamically generates high-performance code to balance system-wide trade-offs and max-imize the benefits of ISP. Our real system implementation shows that ActivePy can use ISP as efficiently as conventional C-based frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 存储内处理 (ISP) 是近数据处理 (NDP) 模型最商业化的实现，它在存储位置附近执行任务。然而，ISP设备的编程很复杂，因为它需要程序员与底层硬件紧密合作，即使是高度优化的代码也很容易导致性能不佳。本文介绍了ActivePy。 ActivePy 使程序员完全不知道 ISP 硬件。 ActivePy 自动、透明、动态地生成高性能代码，以平衡系统范围的权衡并最大限度地发挥 ISP 的优势。我们的真实系统实现表明，ActivePy 可以像传统的基于 C 的框架一样有效地使用 ISP。

items.title: Compact and High-Performance TCAM Based on Scaled Double-Gate FeFETs.
items.abstract: Ternary content addressable memory (TCAM), widely used in network routers and high-associativity caches, is gaining popularity in machine learning and data-analytic applications. Ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs) are a promising candidate for implementing TCAM owing to their high ON/OFF ratio, non-volatility, and CMOS compatibility. However, conventional single-gate FeFETs (SG-FeFETs) suffer from relatively high write voltage, low endurance, potential read disturbance, and face scaling challenges. Recently, a double-gate FeFET (DG-FeFET) has been proposed and outperforms SG-FeFETs in many aspects. This paper investigates TCAM design challenges specific to DG-FeFETs and introduces a novel 1.5T1Fe TCAM design based on DG-FeFETs. A 2-step search with early termination is employed to reduce the cell area and improve energy efficiency. A shared driver design is proposed to reduce the peripherals area. Detailed analysis and SPICE simulation show that the 1.5T1Fe DGTCAM leads to superior search speed and energy efficiency. The 1.5T1Fe TCAM design can also be built with SG-FeFETs, which achieve search latency and energy improvement compared with 2FeFET TCAM.
items.abstract_zh: 三态内容可寻址存储器 (TCAM) 广泛用于网络路由器和高关联性缓存，在机器学习和数据分析应用中越来越受欢迎。铁电 FET (FeFET) 因其高开/关比、非易失性和 CMOS 兼容性而成为实现 TCAM 的有前途的候选者。然而，传统的单栅极 FeFET (SG-FeFET) 面临相对较高的写入电压、较低的耐用性、潜在的读取干扰以及面临缩放挑战。最近，人们提出了双栅 FeFET（DG-FeFET），它在许多方面都优于 SG-FeFET。本文研究了 DG-FeFET 特有的 TCAM 设计挑战，并介绍了一种基于 DG-FeFET 的新型 1.5T1Fe TCAM 设计。采用提前终止的两步搜索来减少小区面积并提高能源效率。提出了共享驱动器设计以减少外围设备面积。详细分析和 SPICE 仿真表明，1.5T1Fe DGTCAM 具有卓越的搜索速度和能源效率。 1.5T1Fe TCAM 设计还可以使用 SG-FeFET 构建，与 2FeFET TCAM 相比，它实现了搜索延迟和能量改进。

items.title: A Matching Based Escape Routing Algorithm with Variable Design Rules and Constraints.
items.abstract: Escape routing is a critical problem in PCB routing, and its quality greatly affects the PCB design cost. Unlike the traditional escape routing that works mainly for the BGA package with unique line width and space, this paper presents a high-performance escape routing algorithm to handle problems with variable design rules and manual constraints, including variable line widths/spaces, the neck mode of wires, and the pad entry for differential pairs. We first propose a novel obstacle-avoiding method to project pins to the boundary and construct a channel projection graph. We then construct a bi-projection graph and propose a matching-based hierarchical sequencing algorithm to consider manual constraints. We perform global routing for each pin/differential pair by congestion-avoiding path initialization and rip-up and reroute path optimization. Finally, we complete detailed routing in every face, ensuring the wire angle and pad entry constraints. Experimental results show that our algorithm can achieve 100% routability without any design rule violation for all given industrial PCB instances, while two state-of-the-art routers cannot complete routing.
items.abstract_zh: 逃逸布线是PCB布线中的一个关键问题，其质量极大地影响PCB设计成本。与主要针对具有独特线宽和间距的BGA封装的传统逃逸布线不同，本文提出了一种高性能逃逸布线算法，用于处理可变设计规则和手动约束的问题，包括可变线宽/间距、导线的颈部模式和差分对的焊盘入口。我们首先提出了一种新颖的避障方法，将引脚投影到边界并构建通道投影图。然后，我们构建了一个双投影图，并提出了一种基于匹配的分层排序算法来考虑手动约束。我们通过拥塞避免路径初始化以及撕裂和重新路由路径优化来为每个引脚/差分对执行全局路由。最后，我们完成每个面的详细布线，确保导线角度和焊盘入口约束。实验结果表明，对于所有给定的工业 PCB 实例，我们的算法可以实现 100% 的可布线性，而不会违反任何设计规则，而两个最先进的路由器无法完成布线。

items.title: HyperAttack: An Efficient Attack Framework for HyperDimensional Computing.
items.abstract: HyperDimensional Computing (HDC) is emerging as a lightweight computational model for robust and efficient learning on resource-constrained hardware. Since HDC often runs on edge devices, the security challenge of HDC is a pressing issue confronting all the practitioners. Meanwhile, the security challenge of HDC’s parameters stored in memory has not been well studied. In this work, we are the first to propose a novel HDC attack framework called HyperAttack, which can crush a robust HDC model (i.e., binary HDC) by maliciously flipping an extremely few amount of bits within its memory system (i.e., DRAM) that stores the associative memory. Since the bit-flip operation can be conducted by the well-known Row Hammer attack, HyperAttack maximizes the accuracy degradation with the minimum number of bit-flips by identifying the bits closely related to the classification accuracy of hyperdimensional vectors (stored in the associative memory as binary vectors) in HDC. The proposed HyperAttack is based on the concept of fuzzing, combining dimensional ranking and distributions of features in hypervectors to identify the bits to be flipped. Our evaluation shows that HyperAttack can successfully attack a binary HDC by flipping only 10% bits of hyperdimensional vectors to decrease top-1 accuracy from 90.9% to 10%, while randomly flipping merely degrades the accuracy by less than 2%.
items.abstract_zh: 超维计算 (HDC) 是一种轻量级计算模型，可在资源受限的硬件上实现稳健、高效的学习。由于HDC通常运行在边缘设备上，HDC的安全挑战是所有从业者面临的紧迫问题。同时，HDC存储在内存中的参数的安全挑战尚未得到很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们第一个提出了一种名为 HyperAttack 的新型 HDC 攻击框架，该框架可以通过恶意翻转存储关联内存的内存系统（即 DRAM）中的极少量位来破坏稳健的 HDC 模型（即二进制 HDC）。由于众所周知的 Row Hammer 攻击可以进行位翻转操作，HyperAttack 通过识别 HDC 中与超维向量（作为二进制向量存储在关联存储器中）的分类精度密切相关的位，以最少的位翻转次数最大限度地降低精度。所提出的 HyperAttack 基于模糊测试的概念，结合超向量中的维度排序和特征分布来识别要翻转的位。我们的评估表明，HyperAttack 可以通过仅翻转超维向量的 10% 位来成功攻击二进制 HDC，将 top-1 精度从 90.9% 降低到 10%，而随机翻转仅使精度降低不到 2%。

items.title: Invited: Waving the Double-Edged Sword: Building Resilient CAVs with Edge and Cloud Computing.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement of edge and cloud computing platforms, vehicular ad-hoc networks, and machine learning techniques have brought both opportunities and challenges for next-generation connected and automated vehicles (CAVs). On the one hand, these technologies can enable vehicles to leverage more computing power from edge and cloud servers and to share information with each other and surrounding infrastructures for better situation awareness and more intelligent decision making. On the other hand, the more distributed computing process and the wireless nature of V2X (vehicle-to-everything) communication expose vulnerabilities to various disturbances and attacks. In this paper, we discuss the security and safety challenges for edge- and cloud-enabled CAVs, particularly when they are under environment interferences, execution errors, and malicious attacks, and we will introduce our recent work and future directions in developing system-driven, end-to-end methodologies and tools to address these challenges and ensure system resiliency under uncertainties.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘和云计算平台、车载自组织网络和机器学习技术的快速发展为下一代联网和自动驾驶汽车（CAV）带来了机遇和挑战。一方面，这些技术可以使车辆利用边缘和云服务器的更多计算能力，并与彼此和周围基础设施共享信息，以实现更好的态势感知和更智能的决策。另一方面，更加分布式的计算过程和 V2X（车对万物）通信的无线特性暴露了容易受到各种干扰和攻击的漏洞。在本文中，我们讨论了边缘和云支持的 CAV 的安全挑战，特别是当它们受到环境干扰、执行错误和恶意攻击时，我们将介绍我们在开发系统驱动的端到端方法和工具方面的近期工作和未来方向，以应对这些挑战并确保不确定情况下的系统弹性。

items.title: DeepOHeat: Operator Learning-based Ultra-fast Thermal Simulation in 3D-IC Design.
items.abstract: Thermal issue is a major concern in 3D integrated circuit (IC) design. Thermal optimization of 3D IC often requires massive expensive PDE simulations. Neural network-based thermal prediction models can perform real-time prediction for many unseen new designs. However, existing works either solve 2D temperature fields only or do not generalize well to new designs with unseen design configurations (e.g., heat sources and boundary conditions). In this paper, for the first time, we propose DeepOHeat, a physics-aware operator learning framework to predict the temperature field of a family of heat equations with multiple parametric or non-parametric design configurations. This framework learns a functional map from the function space of multiple key PDE configurations (e.g., boundary conditions, power maps, heat transfer coefficients) to the function space of the corresponding solution (i.e., temperature fields), enabling fast thermal analysis and optimization by changing key design configurations (rather than just some parameters). We test DeepOHeat on some industrial design cases and compare it against Celsius 3D from Cadence Design Systems. Our results show that, for the unseen testing cases, a well-trained DeepOHeat can produce accurate results with 1000× to 300000× speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 热问题是 3D 集成电路 (IC) 设计中的一个主要问题。 3D IC 的热优化通常需要大量昂贵的 PDE 模拟。基于神经网络的热预测模型可以对许多未见过的新设计进行实时预测。然而，现有的工作要么仅解决二维温度场，要么不能很好地推广到具有未见过的设计配置（例如热源和边界条件）的新设计。在本文中，我们首次提出 DeepOHeat，一种物理感知算子学习框架，用于预测具有多个参数或非参数设计配置的热方程族的温度场。该框架学习从多个关键 PDE 配置（例如边界条件、功率图、传热系数）的函数空间到相应解决方案（即温度场）的函数空间的函数映射，通过更改关键设计配置（而不仅仅是某些参数）来实现快速热分析和优化。我们在一些工业设计案例上测试了 DeepOHeat，并将其与 Cadence Design Systems 的摄氏度 3D 进行比较。我们的结果表明，对于未见过的测试用例，训练有素的 DeepOHeat 可以以 1000 倍到 300000 倍的加速产生准确的结果。

items.title: Leaky MDU: ARM Memory Disambiguation Unit Uncovered and Vulnerabilities Exposed.
items.abstract: Memory Disambiguation Unit (MDU) is widely used on modern processors to speculatively execute load instructions and improve pipeline performance. Given that the MDU design details on ARM processors are not available to the public, it is unclear whether there are any security vulnerabilities associated with its MDU. In this paper, we first reverse engineer the undocumented features of ARM MDU, then we discover three potential user-privilege attacks to leak secret data via MDU: cross-process attack that allows users to communicate through a convert channel, cross-domain attack that leaks kernel information and a new variant of inner-process and inter-processes Spectre attacks. These attacks pose serious security challenges as they can bypass both all the known countermeasures against cache side-channel attacks and those against transient execution attacks. Potential mitigation against the proposed MDU-based attacks are also discussed.
items.abstract_zh: 内存消歧单元 (MDU) 广泛用于现代处理器上，用于推测性地执行加载指令并提高管道性能。鉴于ARM处理器上的MDU设计细节尚未向公众公开，目前尚不清楚其MDU是否存在任何安全漏洞。在本文中，我们首先对 ARM MDU 未记录的功能进行逆向工程，然后发现三种潜在的用户权限攻击，通过 MDU 泄露秘密数据：允许用户通过转换通道进行通信的跨进程攻击、泄露内核信息的跨域攻击以及进程内和进程间 Spectre 攻击的新变体。这些攻击带来了严重的安全挑战，因为它们可以绕过所有已知的针对缓存侧通道攻击和瞬时执行攻击的对策。还讨论了针对所提议的基于 MDU 的攻击的潜在缓解措施。

items.title: Layout Decomposition via Boolean Satisfiability.
items.abstract: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) has been introduced in the integrated circuits manufacturing industry to enhance feature density as the technology node advances. A crucial step of MPL is assigning layout features to different masks, namely layout decomposition. Exact algorithms like integer linear programming (ILP) can solve layout decomposition to optimality but lacks scalability for very dense patterns. Approximation algorithms (e.g., linear programming, semi-definite programming) and heuristics (e.g., Exact-Cover) are capable of handling large cases but can only get inferior solutions. In this paper, we propose a new exact algorithm that tackles layout decomposition by solving a series of boolean satisfiability instances. Our algorithm can preserve optimality and achieve more than 4× speedup compared to ILP. In addition, we provide an approximation algorithm by reformulating the layout decomposition to a bilevel optimization problem. Experiments show that our approximation algorithm can attain higher solution quality compared to SDP and heuristics within faster convergence.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点的进步，多重图案化光刻（MPL）已被引入集成电路制造行业以提高特征密度。 MPL 的一个关键步骤是将布局特征分配给不同的掩模，即布局分解。整数线性规划 (ILP) 等精确算法可以解决布局分解的最优问题，但对于非常密集的图案缺乏可扩展性。近似算法（例如线性规划、半定规划）和启发式算法（例如 Exact-Cover）能够处理大型情况，但只能得到较差的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的精确算法，通过求解一系列布尔可满足性实例来解决布局分解问题。与 ILP 相比，我们的算法可以保持最优性并实现超过 4 倍的加速。此外，我们通过将布局分解重新表述为双层优化问题来提供近似算法。实验表明，与 SDP 和启发式算法相比，我们的近似算法可以在更快的收敛速度内获得更高的解质量。

items.title: DARIC: A Data Reuse-Friendly CGRA for Parallel Data Access via Elastic FIFOs.
items.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) are a promising architecture for data-intensive applications. For parallel data accesses, uniform memory partitioning is usually introduced to CGRA for better pipelining performance. However, uniform memory partitioning not only suffers from a local minimum, but also introduces non-negligible overhead for banking function, which may greatly degrade the performance of CGRA. To this end, this paper introduces non-uniform memory partitioning and proposes a data-reuse-friendly CGRA (DARIC). With well elaborated configurable bank groups cooperated with register chains, elastic FIFOs can be achieved for non-uniform memory partitioning. Based on the resource graph of DARIC, a mapping algorithm supporting path sharing is proposed. Finally, the experimental results show that DARIC can achieve 2.35 × throughput and 2.59 × energy efficiency while having even less area and power overhead, as compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 是数据密集型应用程序的一种很有前景的架构。对于并行数据访问，CGRA 通常会引入统一的内存分区，以获得更好的流水线性能。然而，统一内存分区不仅会受到局部最小值的影响，还会给银行功能带来不可忽略的开销，这可能会大大降低 CGRA 的性能。为此，本文引入非均匀内存分区，并提出了一种数据重用友好的CGRA（DARIC）。通过精心设计的可配置存储体组与寄存器链配合，可以实现弹性 FIFO 以实现非均匀内存分区。基于DARIC资源图，提出一种支持路径共享的映射算法。最后，实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，DARIC 可以实现 2.35 倍的吞吐量和 2.59 倍的能源效率，同时具有更少的面积和功率开销。

items.title: Disjoint-Path and Golden-Pin Based Irregular PCB Routing with Complex Constraints.
items.abstract: PCB routing becomes time-consuming as the complexity of PCB design increases. Unlike traditional schemes that treat the two essential PCB routing processes separately, namely, escape and bus routing, we consider the continuity between them and present a golden-pin-based routing scheme to find the desired solution with angle and topology constraints. Further, conventional rip-up and reroute methods are often ineffective and inefficient for congestion alleviation and routability optimization. We construct a component graph by modeling components as vertices and applying the minimum weight vertex covering method to improve the routability. A self-adaptable ordering method is presented for escape routing to arrange the pin order on the component boundary, guaranteeing successful bus routing. In addition, escape routing is performed based on a disjoint path method. We construct a dynamic Hanan grid in bus routing and utilize a novel congestion adjustment technique to improve solution quality. Compared with FreeRouting and Allegro, the experiment results show that our algorithm achieves high routability and a significant 90% runtime reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 PCB 设计复杂性的增加，PCB 布线变得非常耗时。与分别处理两个基本 PCB 布线过程（即逃逸布线和总线布线）的传统方案不同，我们考虑它们之间的连续性，并提出基于金针的布线方案，以在角度和拓扑约束下找到所需的解决方案。此外，传统的中断和重新路由方法对于拥塞缓解和可路由性优化通常是无效且低效的。我们通过将组件建模为顶点并应用最小权重顶点覆盖方法来构建组件图以提高可路由性。提出了一种用于逃逸布线的自适应排序方法，以在组件边界上安排引脚顺序，保证总线布线的成功。此外，逃逸路由是基于不相交路径方法来执行的。我们在公交路线中构建了动态哈南网格，并利用新颖的拥塞调整技术来提高解决方案质量。与FreeRouting和Allegro相比，实验结果表明，我们的算法实现了较高的可路由性，并且运行时间显着减少了90%。

items.title: Concurrent Sign-off Timing Optimization via Deep Steiner Points Refinement.
items.abstract: Timing closure is crucial across the circuit design flow. Since obtaining sign-off performance needs a time-consuming routing flow, all the previous early-stage timing optimization works only focus on improving early timing metrics, e.g., rough timing estimation using linear RC model or pre-routing path-length. However, there is no consistency guarantee between early-stage metrics and sign-off timing performance. To enable explicit early-stage optimization on the sign-off timing metrics, we propose a novel timing optimization framework, TSteiner. This paper demonstrates the ability of the learning framework to perform robust and efficient timing optimization in the early stage with comprehensive and convincing experimental results on real-world designs.
items.abstract_zh: 时序收敛在整个电路设计流程中至关重要。由于获得签核性能需要耗时的路由流程，因此之前所有的早期时序优化工作都只关注于改进早期时序指标，例如使用线性 RC 模型或预路由路径长度进行粗略时序估计。然而，早期指标和签核时序性能之间不存在一致性保证。为了实现签核时序指标的显式早期优化，我们提出了一种新颖的时序优化框架 TSteiner。本文展示了学习框架在早期阶段执行稳健且高效的时序优化的能力，并在实际设计中提供了全面且令人信服的实验结果。

items.title: EDGE: Efficient DAG-based Global Routing Engine.
items.abstract: Routing is one of the most time-consuming steps in the modern VLSI design flow. A well-designed global routing algorithm can effectively shrink the overall routing time and improve the quality of design after routing. Unlike many global routers that rely heavily on time-consuming path search algorithms like maze routing to resolve overflows, we propose to use directed acyclic graph (DAG) to explore the routing space more efficiently and create detours only when necessary. Experimental results on the ICCAD’19 benchmarks show that our algorithm improves the state-of-the-art quality of result by 1.4% and runs with a single thread faster than the fastest multi-threaded global router.
items.abstract_zh: 布线是现代 VLSI 设计流程中最耗时的步骤之一。设计良好的全局布线算法可以有效缩短整体布线时间，提高布线后的设计质量。与许多严重依赖迷宫路由等耗时的路径搜索算法来解决溢出问题的全局路由器不同，我们建议使用有向无环图（DAG）来更有效地探索路由空间，并仅在必要时才创建绕路。 ICCAD’19 基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的算法将结果的最先进质量提高了 1.4%，并且单线程运行速度比最快的多线程全局路由器更快。

items.title: Rethinking AIG Resynthesis in Parallel.
items.abstract: The efficiency issue of logic optimization becomes critical as the scale of VLSI designs grows. Since various algorithms are interleaved during optimization to ensure quality, it is necessary to accelerate those commonly used algorithms for obtaining substantial total speed-up. This paper proposes novel parallel algorithms for AIG refactoring and AND-balancing. Equipped with delicately designed parallel-friendly, data-race-free frameworks and GPU data structures, our algorithms obtain significant speed-up and enable the resyn2 sequence to be fully GPU-parallelized when combined with GPU rewriting. Experiments show that on large AIGs, we achieve average accelerations up to 45.9×over ABC with comparable or better qualities.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 VLSI 设计规模的增长，逻辑优化的效率问题变得至关重要。由于优化期间各种算法交织在一起以确保质量，因此有必要对那些常用算法进行加速以获得显着的总加速比。本文提出了用于 AIG 重构和 AND 平衡的新型并行算法。凭借精心设计的并行友好、无数据竞争的框架和 GPU 数据结构，我们的算法获得了显着的加速，并使 resyn2 序列在与 GPU 重写相结合时能够完全 GPU 并行。实验表明，在大型 AIG 上，我们的平均加速度比 ABC 提高了 45.9 倍，且质量相当或更好。

items.title: Ising-CF: A Pathbreaking Collaborative Filtering Method Through Efficient Ising Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Due to the Ising model’s strong expressivity and Ising machines’ unique computational power, it is highly desired if Ising-based learning can be used in real-world applications. Unfortunately, the challenges in learning the Ising model and gaps between the practical accuracy of Ising machines and the theoretical accuracy of the Ising model impede the realization of Ising machines’ potential. Hence, we propose an Ising Machine Learning framework, Ising-CF, for collaborative filtering, a widely-used recommendation method. Specifically, Ising-CF uses Linear Neural Networks with Besag’s pseudo-likelihood and voltage polarization for fast, accurate Ising model learning and an Ising-specific logarithmic quantization for ns-level Ising machine inference with near-theoretical accuracy, 7.3% over SOTA.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 Ising 模型强大的表达能力和 Ising 机器独特的计算能力，基于 Ising 的学习能否应用于实际应用是非常令人期待的。不幸的是，学习伊辛模型的挑战以及伊辛机的实际精度与伊辛模型的理论精度之间的差距阻碍了伊辛机潜力的实现。因此，我们提出了一种 Ising 机器学习框架 Ising-CF，用于协作过滤（一种广泛使用的推荐方法）。具体来说，Ising-CF 使用具有 Besag 伪似然和电压极化的线性神经网络来实现快速、准确的 Ising 模型学习，并使用 Ising 特定的对数量化来实现 ns 级 Ising 机器推理，其精度接近理论精度，比 SOTA 高出 7.3%。

items.title: Fault-Tolerance-Oriented Physical Design for Fully Programmable Valve Array Biochips.
items.abstract: As a new generation of flow-based microfluidics, the Fully Programmable Valve Array (FPVA) biochips have become a popular biochemical experimental platform that provide higher flexibility and programmability. Due to environmental and human factors, however, there are usually some physical faults in the manufacturing process such as channel blockage and leakage, which, undoubtedly, can affect the results of bioassays and even cause execution failure. Accordingly, we focus on the fault-tolerant design of FPVA biochips for the first time in this paper, and present three dynamic fault-tolerant techniques including a cell function conversion method, a bidirectional redundancy scheme, and a fault mapping method. By integrating these techniques into the component placement and channel routing stages, we further realize an efficient and effective fault-tolerance-oriented physical design approach for FPVA biochips, thus ensuring the robustness of chip architecture and correctness of assay outcomes. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks confirm that the proposed approach can generate fault-tolerant FPVA architectures with both high execution efficiency and low fabrication cost.
items.abstract_zh: 作为新一代基于流的微流控，完全可编程阀阵列（FPVA）生物芯片已成为流行的生化实验平台，提供更高的灵活性和可编程性。然而，由于环境和人为因素，制造过程中常常会出现一些通道堵塞、泄漏等物理故障，这无疑会影响生物测定的结果，甚至导致执行失败。因此，本文首次关注 FPVA 生物芯片的容错设计，提出了三种动态容错技术，包括单元功能转换方法、双向冗余方案和故障映射方法。通过将这些技术集成到组件布局和通道布线阶段，我们进一步实现了 FPVA 生物芯片高效且有效的面向容错的物理设计方法，从而确保了芯片架构的稳健性和检测结果的正确性。多个基准测试的实验结果证实，所提出的方法可以生成具有高执行效率和低制造成本的容错 FPVA 架构。

items.title: Bit-Serial Cache: Exploiting Input Bit Vector Repetition to Accelerate Bit-Serial Inference.
items.abstract: Bit-serial computation has demonstrated superiority in processing precision-varying DNNs by slicing multi-bit vectors into multiple single-bit vectors and computing the inner product using multiple steps of shift-and-adds. In this paper, we identify that performing real-world DNNs inference with bit-serial computation exhibits high input bit vector locality, where up to 85.7% of non-zero input bit vectors, as well as their associated computation, are previously-seen and previously-done ones. We propose Bit-Serial Cache to transfer the identified locality into performance and energy efficiency gains. The key design strategy is to store recently-computed partial sums of input bit vectors to a cache and utilize cache accesses to replace redundant computations. In addition to the bit-serial computation architecture, we also present: 1) request clustering and 2) interleaved scheduling, to further enhance the performance and energy efficiency.Our experiments using six popular DNNs (in both 8-b and 4-b) show that Bit-Serial Cache speeds up DNN inference by up to 2.72×, 1.82×, and 4.03×, energy efficiency by 3.19×, 3.29×, and 2.82×, area efficiency by 1.35×, 1.24×, and 2.76× over state-of-the-art Loom, DPRed Loom, and Laconic.
items.abstract_zh: 位串行计算通过将多位向量切片为多个单位向量并使用多个移位和相加步骤计算内积，在处理精度变化的 DNN 方面展现了优越性。在本文中，我们发现通过位串行计算执行现实世界的 DNN 推理表现出较高的输入位向量局部性，其中高达 85.7% 的非零输入位向量及其相关计算是先前见过和先前完成的。我们建议使用位串行缓存将已识别的位置转化为性能和能源效率增益。关键的设计策略是将最近计算的输入位向量的部分和存储到缓存中，并利用缓存访问来代替冗余计算。除了位串行计算架构之外，我们还提出：1）请求集群和2）交错调度，以进一步提高性能和能源效率。我们使用六种流行的DNN（8-b和4-b）进行的实验表明，位串行缓存将DNN推理速度提高了2.72×，1.82×和4.03×，能源效率提高了3.19×，与最先进的 Loom、DPRed Loom 和 Laconic 相比，面积效率提高了 3.29 倍和 2.82 倍，面积效率提高了 1.35 倍、1.24 倍和 2.76 倍。

items.title: Morphable CIM: Improving Operation Intensity and Depthwise Capability for SRAM-CIM Architecture.
items.abstract: SRAM-based computing in memory (SRAM-CIM) supports weight-stationary dataflows and in-situ computation, successfully achieving lower weight SRAM traffic and hence better operation intensity (OI) than Von Neumann architecture. However, sticking to weight-stationary dataflows is sub-optimal since some layers of CNNs, e.g., depth-wise and input-dominant, suffer from large activation traffic and underutilization.We propose Morphable CIM to address the above challenges, in which the key contributions are: 1) We propose a dataflow-morphable SRAM-CIM architecture that adaptively switches between weight-stationary and input-stationary dataflow to enhance the overall operation intensity (OI) and computation utilization. 2) We propose an input-stationary systolic dataflow and a word-wise mapping to efficiently achieve dataflow reconfigurability for SRAM-CIM. 3) We propose a depthwise-capable CIM macro to improve the utilization of processing depth-wise layers.The experimental results on ten workloads show that our proposed SRAM-CIM architecture successfully outperforms the traffic-optimized and the performance-optimized baselines by up to 16.7× performance speedup, 3.6× higher energy efficiency, and 94.8% memory traffic reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (SRAM-CIM) 支持重量平稳数据流和原位计算，成功实现了较低重量的 SRAM 流量，从而比冯·诺依曼架构具有更好的操作强度 (OI)。然而，坚持权重平稳数据流并不是最优的，因为 CNN 的某些层（例如深度方向和输入主导）会受到大激活流量和利用率不足的影响。我们提出 Morphable CIM 来解决上述挑战，其中的关键贡献是：1）我们提出了一种数据流可变形 SRAM-CIM 架构，该架构可在权重平稳和输入平稳数据流之间自适应切换，以提高整体操作强度（OI）和计算利用率。 2）我们提出了输入稳态脉动数据流和逐字映射，以有效实现 SRAM-CIM 的数据流可重构性。 3）我们提出了一种具有深度能力的CIM宏，以提高处理深度层的利用率。十个工作负载的实验结果表明，我们提出的SRAM-CIM架构成功地超越了流量优化和性能优化的基准，性能加速高达16.7倍，能源效率提高了3.6倍，内存流量减少了94.8%。

items.title: RL-CCD: Concurrent Clock and Data Optimization using Attention-Based Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Concurrent Clock and Data (CCD) optimization is a well-adopted approach in modern commercial tools that resolves timing violations using a mixture of clock skewing and delay fixing strategies. However, existing CCD algorithms are flawed. Particularly, they fail to prioritize violating endpoints for different optimization strategies correctly, leading to flow-wise globally sub-optimal results. In this paper, we overcome this issue by presenting RL-CCD, a Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent that selects endpoints for useful skew prioritization using the proposed EP-GNN, an endpoint-oriented Graph Neural Network (GNN) model, and a Transformer-based self-supervised attention mechanism. Experimental results on 19 industrial designs in 5 − 12nm technologies demonstrate that RL-CCD achieves up to 64% Total Negative Slack (TNS) reduction and 66.5% number of violating endpoints (NVE) improvement over the native implementation of a commercial tool.
items.abstract_zh: 并发时钟和数据 (CCD) 优化是现代商业工具中广泛采用的方法，它结合使用时钟偏差和延迟修复策略来解决时序违规问题。然而，现有的 CCD 算法存在缺陷。特别是，他们无法正确地优先考虑不同优化策略的违规端点，从而导致流程方面的全局次优结果。在本文中，我们通过提出 RL-CCD 来克服这个问题，这是一种强化学习（RL）代理，它使用所提出的 EP-GNN、面向端点的图神经网络（GNN）模型和基于 Transformer 的自监督注意力机制来选择有用的倾斜优先级的端点。采用 5 – 12 纳米技术的 19 种工业设计的实验结果表明，与商业工具的本机实现相比，RL-CCD 的总负裕度 (TNS) 减少量高达 64%，违规端点数 (NVE) 改善量达 66.5%。

items.title: ZoneKV: A Space-Efficient Key-Value Store for ZNS SSDs.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose a new space-efficient key-value store called ZoneKV for ZNS (Zoned Namespace) SSDs. We observe that existing work on adapting RocksDB to ZNS SSDs will cause fragmentation of zones and severe space amplification. Thus, we propose a lifetime-based zone storage model and a level-specific zone allocation algorithm to store SSTables with a similar lifetime in the same zone. We evaluate ZoneKV on a real ZNS SSD. The results show that ZoneKV can reduce up to 60% space amplification and maintain higher throughputs than two competitors, RocksDB and ZenFS.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们为 ZNS（分区命名空间）SSD 提出了一种名为 ZoneKV 的新的节省空间的键值存储。我们观察到现有的将 RocksDB 适配到 ZNS SSD 的工作将导致区域碎片和严重的空间放大。因此，我们提出了一种基于生命周期的区域存储模型和特定于级别的区域分配算法，以在同一区域中存储具有相似生命周期的 SSTable。我们在真实的 ZNS SSD 上评估 ZoneKV。结果表明，与两个竞争对手 RocksDB 和 ZenFS 相比，ZoneKV 可以减少高达 60% 的空间放大，并保持更高的吞吐量。

items.title: An FPGA-Compatible TRNG with Ultra-High Throughput and Energy Efficiency.
items.abstract: In this paper, we design an energy-efficient true random number generator with ultra-high throughput for FPGA. Only four ring oscillators constructed using eight LUTs are sampled by multiple sampling points to fully exploit the randomness of the entropy source, which provides high-quality and over 275 Mbps random sequences while consuming 13 slices. An end-to-end implementation and testing framework is tailored for easy deployment and portability on Xilinx 7 serials FPGAs. The proposed architecture passes the NIST SP 800-22 and 800-90B tests without post-processing and outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of minimum entropy and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们为FPGA设计了一种具有超高吞吐量的节能真随机数生成器。仅使用 8 个 LUT 构建的 4 个环形振荡器通过多个采样点进行采样，以充分利用熵源的随机性，在消耗 13 个切片的同时提供高质量且超过 275 Mbps 的随机序列。端到端实施和测试框架专为在 Xilinx 7 串行 FPGA 上轻松部署和移植而定制。所提出的架构无需后处理即可通过 NIST SP 800-22 和 800-90B 测试，并且在最小熵和能源效率方面优于最先进的技术。

items.title: Heterogeneous Reconfigurable Accelerators: Trends and Perspectives.
items.abstract: Heterogeneity and reconfigurability have both been adopted by accelerators to improve their flexibility and efficiency for a wide variety of applications, from cloud computing to embedded systems. This paper provides an overview of the trends of heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerators including field-programmable gate arrays and coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays, and the related design automation approaches for enhancing design quality and designer productivity of these accelerators. We shall also discuss how recent advances in technology, such as multi-level co-design, heterogeneous Function-as-a-Service and meta-programming, would help address the challenges in engineering next-generation heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerators and beyond.
items.abstract_zh: 加速器采用异构性和可重构性来提高从云计算到嵌入式系统等各种应用的灵活性和效率。本文概述了包括现场可编程门阵列和粗粒度可重构阵列在内的异构可重构加速器的发展趋势，以及用于提高这些加速器的设计质量和设计人员生产力的相关设计自动化方法。我们还将讨论多层协同设计、异构功能即服务和元编程等技术的最新进展如何帮助解决下一代异构可重构加速器等工程中的挑战。

items.title: Rubick: A Synthesis Framework for Spatial Architectures via Dataflow Decomposition.
items.abstract: Dataflows are critical for spatial architectures designed for tensor applications. Prior works develop various notations and hardware generation frameworks for dataflows. However, due to the semantic gap between notations and low-level details, analysis based on these notations cannot capture the detailed architectural features between different dataflows, so these works failed to provide architectural optimization and efficient design space exploration (DSE) at the same time.We propose Rubick, a synthesis framework for spatial architecture. Rubick decomposes the dataflow into two low-level intermediate representations including access entry and data layout. Access entry specifies how data enter into the PE arrays from memory, while data layout specifies how data are arranged and accessed. Based on this decomposition, Rubick provides efficient DSE and generates optimized hardware. Experiments show that the DSE time is accelerated by up to 1.1×10<sup>5</sup>X and performance on FPGA is improved by 13%.
items.abstract_zh: 数据流对于为张量应用程序设计的空间架构至关重要。先前的工作为数据流开发了各种符号和硬件生成框架。然而，由于符号和低级细节之间的语义差距，基于这些符号的分析无法捕获不同数据流之间的详细架构特征，因此这些工作无法同时提供架构优化和高效的设计空间探索（DSE）。我们提出了 Rubick，一种空间架构的综合框架。 Rubick 将数据流分解为两个低级中间表示，包括访问入口和数据布局。访问入口指定数据如何从内存进入PE数组，而数据布局指定数据如何排列和访问。基于这种分解，Rubik提供了高效的DSE并生成优化的硬件。实验表明，DSE 时间加速了 1.1×10<sup>5</sup>X，FPGA 性能提高了 13%。

items.title: ML-CGRA: An Integrated Compilation Framework to Enable Efficient Machine Learning Acceleration on CGRAs.
items.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) can achieve higher energy-efficiency than general-purpose processors and accelerators or fine-grained reconfigurable devices, while maintaining adaptability to different computational patterns. CGRAs have shown some success as a platform to accelerate machine learning (ML) thanks to their flexibility, which allows them to support new models not considered by fixed accelerators. However, current solutions for CGRAs employ low level instruction-based compiler approaches and lack specialized compilation infrastructures from high-level ML frameworks that could leverage semantic information from the models, limiting the ability to efficiently map them on the reconfigurable substrate. This paper proposes ML-CGRA, an integrated compilation framework based on the MLIR infrastructure that enables efficient ML acceleration on CGRAs. ML-CGRA provides an end-to-end solution for mapping ML models on CGRAs that outperforms conventional approaches by 3.15× and 6.02 × on 4×4 and 8×8 CGRAs, respectively. The framework is open-source and available from https://github.com/tancheng/mlir-cgra.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）可以实现比通用处理器和加速器或细粒度可重构设备更高的能效，同时保持对不同计算模式的适应性。由于其灵活性，CGRA 作为加速机器学习 (ML) 的平台已经取得了一些成功，这使得它们能够支持固定加速器未考虑的新模型。然而，当前的 CGRA 解决方案采用基于低级指令的编译器方法，并且缺乏来自高级 ML 框架的专门编译基础设施，这些框架可以利用模型中的语义信息，从而限制了将它们有效映射到可重构基板上的能力。本文提出了 ML-CGRA，这是一种基于 MLIR 基础设施的集成编译框架，可在 CGRA 上实现高效的 ML 加速。 ML-CGRA 提供了一种用于在 CGRA 上映射 ML 模型的端到端解决方案，其在 4×4 和 8×8 CGRA 上的性能分别比传统方法高出 3.15 倍和 6.02 倍。该框架是开源的，可从 https://github.com/tan Cheng/mlir-cgra 获取。

items.title: FLNA: An Energy-Efficient Point Cloud Feature Learning Accelerator with Dataflow Decoupling.
items.abstract: Grid-based feature learning network plays a key role in recent point-cloud based 3D perception. However, high point sparsity and special operators lead to large memory footprint and long processing latency, posing great challenges to hardware acceleration. We propose FLNA, a novel feature learning accelerator with algorithm-architecture co-design. At algorithm level, the dataflow-decoupled graph is adopted to reduce 86% computation by exploiting inherent sparsity and concat redundancy. At hardware design level, we customize a pipelined architecture with block-wise processing, and introduce transposed SRAM strategy to save 82.1% access power. Implemented on a 40nm technology, FLNA achieves 13.4 − 43.3× speedup over RTX 2080Ti GPU. It rivals the state-of-the-art accelerator by 1.21× energy-efficiency improvement with 50.8% latency reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 基于网格的特征学习网络在最近基于点云的 3D 感知中发挥着关键作用。然而，高点稀疏性和特殊算子导致内存占用大、处理延迟长，给硬件加速带来了巨大挑战。我们提出了 FLNA，一种具有算法架构协同设计的新型特征学习加速器。在算法层面，采用数据流解耦图，利用固有的稀疏性和串联冗余，减少了86%的计算量。在硬件设计层面，我们定制了具有分块处理的流水线架构，并引入转置SRAM策略以节省82.1%的访问功率。 FLNA 采用 40nm 技术实现，与 RTX 2080Ti GPU 相比，速度提升了 13.4 – 43.3 倍。它能效提高 1.21 倍，延迟降低 50.8%，可与最先进的加速器相媲美。

items.title: Processor Vulnerability Discovery.
items.abstract: Processor security vulnerability discovery has drawn increasing attention since the disclosure of Meltdown, Spectre and other vulnerabilities. This paper presents a concise roadmap of this emerging research direction from the simple manual discovery to automated discovery methodologies, as well as the major challenges along the roadmap.
items.abstract_zh: 自Meltdown、Spectre等漏洞被披露以来，处理器安全漏洞发现越来越受到关注。本文提出了这一新兴研究方向从简单的手动发现到自动发现方法的简明路线图，以及该路线图中的主要挑战。

items.title: Return-to-Non-Secure Vulnerabilities on ARM Cortex-M TrustZone: Attack and Defense.
items.abstract: ARM Cortex-M is one of the most popular microcontroller architectures designed for embedded and Internet of Things (IoT) applications. To facilitate efficient execution, it has some unique hardware optimization. In particular, Cortex-M TrustZone has a fast state switch mechanism that allows direct control-flow transfer from the secure state program to the non-secure state userspace program. In this paper, we demonstrate how this fast state switch mechanism can be exploited for arbitrary code execution with escalated privilege in the non-secure state by introducing a new exploitation technique, namely return-to-non-secure (ret2ns). We experimentally confirmed the feasibility of four variants of ret2ns attacks on two Cortex-M hardware systems. To defend against ret2ns attacks, we design two address sanitizing mechanisms that have negligible performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: ARM Cortex-M 是最流行的微控制器架构之一，专为嵌入式和物联网 (IoT) 应用而设计。为了促进高效执行，它有一些独特的硬件优化。特别是，Cortex-M TrustZone 具有快速状态切换机制，允许从安全状态程序到非安全状态用户空间程序的直接控制流传输。在本文中，我们通过引入一种新的利用技术，即返回非安全（ret2ns），演示了如何利用这种快速状态切换机制在非安全状态下以升级的权限执行任意代码。我们通过实验证实了 ret2ns 攻击的四种变体对两个 Cortex-M 硬件系统的可行性。为了防御 ret2ns 攻击，我们设计了两种性能开销可以忽略不计的地址清理机制。

items.title: Fault Tolerance in Time-Sensitive Networking with Mixed-Critical Traffic.
items.abstract: As an Ethernet-based communication protocol with timing determinism, TSN (time-sensitive networking) has become a well-recognized promising in-vehicle network solution for increasingly automated automobiles. To satisfy the reliability requirement of safety-critical applications, existing works towards fault-tolerant TSN trade too much bandwidth for redundancy, limiting their scope of applicability. Targeting mixed-critical traffic, which is widely found in practice, we define a shared fault-tolerant segment that is compatible with the TSN standard. It serves the critical flows when faults occur, to improve their reliability and serves the non-critical flows when otherwise, to improve their quality of service (QoS). On top of this, we propose a space-time redundancy scheduling algorithm, aiming to make the most efficient use of bandwidth, i.e., to fulfill both the reliability as well as hard real-time requirements, and maximize the QoS with the least bandwidth. In essence, we formulate a bi-objective design space exploration problem with hundreds of thousands of decision variables and solve it with customized heuristics. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art methods, our reported work increases the number of critical flows that can be accommodated on a resource-constrained network by 3 to 4 times, and achieve the highest QoS with an average reduction of 60.3% in bandwidth. As the first work along sharing of bandwidth between mixed-critical traffic in fault-tolerant TSN, this idea can be further pursued towards higher efficiency and may be applied in general autonomous systems.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种基于以太网的具有定时确定性的通信协议，TSN（时间敏感网络）已成为日益自动化的汽车公认的有前途的车载网络解决方案。为了满足安全关键应用的可靠性要求，现有的容错 TSN 工作用过多的带宽换取冗余，限制了它们的适用范围。针对实践中广泛存在的混合关键流量，我们定义了一个与 TSN 标准兼容的共享容错段。它在发生故障时为关键流提供服务，以提高其可靠性；在故障发生时为非关键流提供服务，以提高其服务质量 (QoS)。在此基础上，我们提出了一种空时冗余调度算法，旨在最有效地利用带宽，即既满足可靠性又满足硬实时要求，并以最少的带宽最大化QoS。本质上，我们制定了一个具有数十万个决策变量的双目标设计空间探索问题，并用定制的启发式方法解决它。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们报告的工作将资源有限的网络上可容纳的关键流数量增加了 3 至 4 倍，并实现了最高的 QoS，平均减少了 60.3% 的带宽。作为容错 TSN 中混合关键流量之间共享带宽的第一个工作，这个想法可以进一步追求更高的效率，并可以应用于一般的自治系统。

items.title: TFix: Exploiting the Natural Redundancy of Ternary Neural Networks for Fault Tolerant In-Memory Vector Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) and quantization have emerged as promising techniques for edge-based deep neural network (DNN) accelerators by reducing their energy, latency and storage requirements. In pursuit of ultra-low precision, ternary precision DNNs (TDNNs) offer high efficiency without sacrificing much inference accuracy. In this work, we explore the impact of hard faults on IMC based TDNNs and propose TFix to enhance their fault tolerance. TFix exploits the natural redundancy present in most ternary IMC bitcells as well as the high weight sparsity in TDNNs to provide up to 40.68% accuracy increase over the baseline with < 6% energy overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (IMC) 和量化通过降低能源、延迟和存储需求，成为基于边缘的深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器的有前途的技术。为了追求超低精度，三元精度 DNN (TDNN) 在不牺牲太多推理精度的情况下提供了高效率。在这项工作中，我们探讨了硬故障对基于 IMC 的 TDNN 的影响，并提出 TFix 来增强其容错能力。 TFix 利用大多数三元 IMC 位单元中存在的自然冗余以及 TDNN 中的高权重稀疏性，以 < 6% 的能量开销提供比基线高达 40.68% 的精度提升。

items.title: Faster and Stronger Lossless Compression with Optimized Autoregressive Framework.
items.abstract: Neural AutoRegressive (AR) framework has been applied in general-purpose lossless compression recently to improve compression performance. However, this paper found that directly applying the original AR framework causes the duplicated processing problem and the in-batch distribution variation problem, which leads to deteriorated compression performance. The key to address the duplicated processing problem is to disentangle the processing of the history symbol set at the input side. Two new types of neural blocks are first proposed. An individual-block performs separate feature extraction on each history symbol while a mix-block models the correlation between extracted features and estimates the probability. A progressive AR-based compression framework (PAC) is then proposed, which only requires one history symbol from the host at a time rather than the whole history symbol set. In addition, we introduced a trainable matrix multiplication to model the ordered importance, replacing previous hardware-unfriendly Gumble-Softmax sampling. The in-batch distribution variation problem is caused by AR-based compression’s structured batch construction. Based on this observation, a batch-location-aware individual block is proposed to capture the heterogeneous in-batch distributions precisely, improving the performance without efficiency losses. Experimental results show the proposed framework can achieve an average of 130% speed improvement with an average of 3% compression ratio gain across data domains compared to the state-of-the-art.
