We embed SpMMPlu into MindSpore and do experiments on NVIDIA V100 GPU and Huawei Ascend 910 to verify its effectiveness and scalability. The results show that with SpMMPlu, MindSpore can support various sparsity patterns and deliver a 1.93× (on V100 GPU) and 2.21× (on AScend 910) speedup averagely compared to the dense counterpart.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型变得越来越大，稀疏性无疑正在成为探索效率和可扩展性的最关键维度。特别是，剪枝是减少基于注意力和基于卷积的模型中冗余计算的常用方法。诱导稀疏矩阵乘法（SpMM）通常需要特定领域的硬件架构（DSA）来消除不必要的零值计算。然而，在不改变硬件架构的情况下，在通用和基于ISA的空间加速器上生成SpMM的最佳内核代码仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为SpMMPlu的编译器插件，它可以扩展当前仅支持密集矩阵乘法的深度学习编译器框架中SpMM的表示和优化能力。 SpMMPlu的关键是一种灵活的中间表示——稀疏IR，以多级结构的元操作为基础，以各种稀疏模式表示SpMM。 Meta-op 以硬件内在的抽象作为其最小粒度，现有 NN 编译器后端的强大优化器（例如 TVM 中的 Auto-schedule、MindSpore 中的 AKG）可以轻松地重用于其计算调度和代码生成。此外，我们提出了一种两步（分割和分组）方法来为每个稀疏模式实现高效的稀疏 IR。 SpMMPlu 中仅添加了三遍，即可为 SpMM 内核代码生成提供自动解决方案。我们将SpMMPlu嵌入到MindSpore中，并在NVIDIA V100 GPU和华为Ascend 910上进行实验，验证其有效性和可扩展性。结果表明，借助 SpMMPlu，MindSpore 可以支持各种稀疏模式，与密集模式相比，平均加速速度为 1.93 倍（在 V100 GPU 上）和 2.21 倍（在 AScend 910 上）。

items.title: Pathfinding Model and Lagrangian-Based Global Routing.
items.abstract: Global routing is a critical step in VLSI physical design. This paper proposes a novel pathfinding model based on integer linear programming for VLSI global routing. The Lagrangian relaxation method combined with a direction-aware weighted A*-algorithm is developed to quickly solve the model to obtain a better initial routing solution, which is further optimized by a designed multi-stage rip-up & rerouting algorithm. In each stage of rip-up & rerouting, different routing algorithms and cost functions are used to optimize the overflow and wire length. SPRoute and CUGR are two state-of-the-art global routers. Our proposed global routing algorithm outperforms SPRoute 1.0 & 2.0 in both the wire length and the number of vias on the ISPD08 benchmarks. On the ISPD18 benchmarks, compared to CUGR, our algorithm has about 5.1% reduction in the number of vias, and the average runtime is 4.89× speedup; compared to SPRoute 2.0, our algorithm has about 1.7% reduction on the average wire length, and the number of vias is comparable.
items.abstract_zh: 全局布线是 VLSI 物理设计中的关键步骤。本文提出了一种基于整数线性规划的VLSI全局路径寻路模型。开发了拉格朗日松弛方法与方向感知加权A*算法相结合，以快速求解模型以获得更好的初始路由解决方案，并通过设计的多级撕裂和重路由算法进一步优化该解决方案。在剥离和重新路由的每个阶段，使用不同的路由算法和成本函数来优化溢出和线长。 SPRoute 和 CUGR 是两个最先进的全局路由器。我们提出的全局布线算法在 ISPD08 基准测试中的导线长度和过孔数量方面均优于 SPRoute 1.0 和 2.0。在ISPD18基准上，与CUGR相比，我们的算法过孔数量减少了约5.1%，平均运行时间加速了4.89倍；与SPRoute 2.0相比，我们的算法平均线长减少了约1.7%，并且过孔数量相当。

items.title: Graph Representation Learning for Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration.
items.abstract: Design optimization of modern microprocessors is a complex task due to the exponential growth of the design space. This work presents GRL-DSE, an automatic microarchitecture search framework based on graph embeddings. GRL-DSE uses graph representation learning to build a compact and continuous embedding space. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization using an ensemble surrogate model conducts microarchitecture design space exploration in the graph embedding space to efficiently and holistically optimize performance-power-area (PPA) objectives. Experimental studies on RISC-V BOOM show that GRLDSE outperforms previous techniques by 74.59% on Pareto front quality and outperforms manual designs in terms of PPA.
items.abstract_zh: 由于设计空间呈指数增长，现代微处理器的设计优化是一项复杂的任务。这项工作提出了 GRL-DSE，一种基于图嵌入的自动微架构搜索框架。 GRL-DSE 使用图表示学习来构建紧凑且连续的嵌入空间。使用集成代理模型的多目标贝叶斯优化在图嵌入空间中进行微架构设计空间探索，以高效、全面地优化性能功率面积 (PPA) 目标。在 RISC-V BOOM 上的实验研究表明，GRLDSE 在 Pareto 前沿质量上优于之前的技术 74.59%，在 PPA 方面优于手动设计。

items.title: RESPECT: Reinforcement Learning based Edge Scheduling on Pipelined Coral Edge TPUs.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have substantial computational and memory requirements, and the compilation of its computational graphs has a great impact on the performance of resource-constrained (e.g., computation, I/O, and memory-bound) edge computing systems. While efficient execution of their computational graph requires an effective scheduling algorithm, generating the optimal scheduling solution is a challenging NP-hard problem. Furthermore, the complexity of scheduling DNN computational graphs will further increase on pipelined multi-core systems considering memory communication cost, as well as the increasing size of DNNs. Using the synthetic graph for the training dataset, this work presents a reinforcement learning (RL) based scheduling framework RESPECT, which learns the behaviors of optimal optimization algorithms and generates near-optimal scheduling results with short solving runtime overhead. Our framework has demonstrated up to ∼ 2.5 × real-world on-chip inference runtime speedups over the commercial compiler with ten popular ImageNet models deployed on the physical Coral Edge TPUs system. Moreover, compared to the exact optimization methods, the proposed RL scheduling improves the scheduling optimization runtime by up to 683× speedups compared to the commercial compiler and matches the exact optimal solutions with up to 930× speedups. Finally, we perform a comprehensive generalizability test, which demonstrates RESPECT successfully imitates optimal solving behaviors from small synthetic graphs to large real-world DNNs computational graphs.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）具有大量的计算和内存要求，其计算图的编译对资源受限（例如计算、I/O 和内存限制）边缘计算系统的性能有很大影响。虽然计算图的高效执行需要有效的调度算法，但生成最优调度解决方案是一个具有挑战性的 NP 难题。此外，考虑到内存通信成本以及 DNN 大小的增加，在流水线多核系统上调度 DNN 计算图的复杂性将进一步增加。使用训练数据集的合成图，这项工作提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的调度框架 RESPECT，它学习最优优化算法的行为，并以较短的求解运行时间开销生成接近最优的调度结果。我们的框架在物理 Coral Edge TPU 系统上部署了 10 个流行的 ImageNet 模型，与商业编译器相比，实际片上推理运行时速度提高了约 2.5 倍。此外，与精确优化方法相比，所提出的 RL 调度与商业编译器相比，将调度优化运行时间提高了高达 683 倍的加速，并以高达 930 倍的加速匹配精确最优解。最后，我们进行了全面的泛化性测试，证明 RESPECT 成功模仿了从小型合成图到大型现实世界 DNN 计算图的最佳求解行为。

items.title: TF-MVP: Novel Sparsity-Aware Transformer Accelerator with Mixed-Length Vector Pruning.
items.abstract: We present the energy-efficient TF-MVP architecture, a sparsity-aware transformer accelerator, by introducing novel algorithm-hardware co-optimization techniques. From the previous fine-grained pruning map, for the first time, the direction strength is developed to analyze the pruning patterns quantitatively, indicating the major pruning direction and size of each layer. Then, the mixed-length vector pruning (MVP) is proposed to generate the hardware-friendly pruned-transformer model, which is fully supported by our TF-MVP accelerator with the reconfigurable PE structure. Implemented in a 28nm CMOS technology, as a result, TF-MVP achieves 377 GOPs/W for accelerating GPT-2 small model by realizing 4096 multiply-accumulate operators, which is 2.09 times better than the state-of-the-art sparsity-aware transformer accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 我们通过引入新颖的算法-硬件协同优化技术，提出了节能的 TF-MVP 架构，这是一种稀疏感知变压器加速器。在之前的细粒度剪枝图的基础上，首次提出方向强度来定量分析剪枝模式，指示各层的主要剪枝方向和大小。然后，提出混合长度向量剪枝（MVP）来生成硬件友好的剪枝变换器模型，我们的具有可重构PE结构的TF-MVP加速器完全支持该模型。 TF-MVP 采用 28nm CMOS 技术实现，通过实现 4096 个乘法累加算子，加速 GPT-2 小模型的速度达到了 377 GOPs/W，比最先进的稀疏感知 Transformer 加速器提高了 2.09 倍。

items.title: NetBooster: Empowering Tiny Deep Learning By Standing on the Shoulders of Deep Giants.
items.abstract: Tiny deep learning has attracted increasing attention driven by the substantial demand for deploying deep learning on numerous intelligent Internet-of-Things devices. However, it is still challenging to unleash tiny deep learning’s full potential on both large-scale datasets and downstream tasks due to the under-fitting issues caused by the limited model capacity of tiny neural networks (TNNs). To this end, we propose a framework called NetBooster to empower tiny deep learning by augmenting the architectures of TNNs via an expansion-then-contraction strategy. Extensive experiments show that NetBooster consistently outperforms state-of-the-art tiny deep learning solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 由于在众多智能物联网设备上部署深度学习的巨大需求，微型深度学习引起了越来越多的关注。然而，由于微型神经网络（TNN）模型容量有限导致的欠拟合问题，要在大规模数据集和下游任务上充分发挥微型深度学习的潜力仍然具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了一个名为 NetBooster 的框架，通过先扩展后收缩的策略来增强 TNN 的架构，从而增强小型深度学习的能力。大量实验表明，NetBooster 的性能始终优于最先进的微型深度学习解决方案。

items.title: Invited: Autonomous Driving Digital Twin Empowered Design Automation: An Industry Perspective.
items.abstract: Designing reliable computing systems for autonomous driving is extremely challenging, as the performance and reliability of the systems have to be thoroughly evaluated under an extremely large amount of driving scenarios. Physically constructing scenarios and conducting testing for autonomous driving systems is time-consuming and expensive. To minimize the need for physical testing and improve development efficiency, we developed a digital-twin-based simulation, which can generate an integral, precise, and comprehensive representation of physical scenarios. In this paper, we share our experiences with the digital-twin-based simulation for autonomous driving, particularly the design requirements and components demanded to facilitate virtual environment construction and design verification, which could greatly improve development efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 为自动驾驶设计可靠的计算系统极具挑战性，因为必须在大量驾驶场景下全面评估系统的性能和可靠性。物理构建场景并进行自动驾驶系统测试既耗时又昂贵。为了最大限度地减少物理测试的需要并提高开发效率，我们开发了基于数字孪生的仿真，它可以生成完整、精确、全面的物理场景表示。在本文中，我们分享了基于数字孪生的自动驾驶仿真经验，特别是促进虚拟环境构建和设计验证的设计要求和组件，可以大大提高开发效率。

items.title: EagleRec: Edge-Scale Recommendation System Acceleration with Inter-Stage Parallelism Optimization on GPUs.
items.abstract: Recommendation systems suggest items to users by predicting their preferences based on historical data. The industry traditionally handles large-scale recommendation requests by scaling the number of devices without much concern for a single device’s performance. However, there is a trend for recommendation systems to gradually move from a centralized service to an edge device. The edge-scale recommendation systems have distinct features that are different from traditional large-scale deployments, which poses different challenges to the acceleration of the recommendation system. In this paper, we focus on the edge-scale recommendation system and propose an inter-stage parallelism optimization method deployed on a single GPU. Experiments show that our framework could improve recommendation system throughput by 1.89×~2.2× for different datasets on the GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 推荐系统通过基于历史数据预测用户的偏好来向用户推荐项目。业界传统上通过扩展设备数量来处理大规模推荐请求，而不太关心单个设备的性能。然而，推荐系统有逐渐从集中式服务转向边缘设备的趋势。边缘规模推荐系统具有不同于传统大规模部署的鲜明特征，这对推荐系统的加速提出了不同的挑战。在本文中，我们专注于边缘规模推荐系统，并提出了一种部署在单个 GPU 上的级间并行优化方法。实验表明，对于 GPU 上的不同数据集，我们的框架可以将推荐系统吞吐量提高 1.89×~2.2×。

items.title: Lightning Talk: Private and Secure Edge AI with Hyperdimensional Computing.
items.abstract: As a lightweight and robust brain-inspired computing paradigm, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) serves as a promising solution for the next-generation edge AI. However, the basic form of HDC is vulnerable to privacy leaks and cyber attacks. In this paper, we breifly review and discuss the recent contributions to privacy and security of HDC. We first summarize existing HDC designs to protect against privacy leaks, such as differential privacy. Next, we review the data encryption techniques for collaborative learning using HDC based on Multi-Party Computation and Homomorphic Encryption. Finally, we discuss the HDC-based designs for combating cyber attacks in a malicious environment. More research on private and secure HDC-based methods are needed for future large-scale edge deployment.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种轻量级且强大的类脑计算范式，超维计算（HDC）是下一代边缘人工智能的有前途的解决方案。然而，HDC 的基本形式很容易遭受隐私泄露和网络攻击。在本文中，我们简要回顾并讨论了 HDC 最近对隐私和安全的贡献。我们首先总结现有的 HDC 设计，以防止隐私泄露，例如差分隐私。接下来，我们回顾一下基于多方计算和同态加密的 HDC 协作学习数据加密技术。最后，我们讨论了基于 HDC 的设计，用于对抗恶意环境中的网络攻击。未来大规模边缘部署需要对基于 HDC 的私有且安全的方法进行更多研究。

items.title: Automated Design of Complex Analog Circuits with Multiagent based Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Despite the effort of analog circuit design automation, currently complex analog circuit design still requires extensive manual iterations, making it labor intensive and time-consuming. Recently, reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been demonstrated successfully for the analog circuit design optimization. However, a robust and highly efficient RL method to design analog circuits with complex design space has not been fully explored yet. In this work, inspired by multiagent planning theory as well as human expert design practice, we propose a multiagent based RL (MA-RL) framework to tackle this issue. Particularly, we (i) partition the complex analog circuits into several sub-blocks based on topology information and effectively reduce the complexity of design search space; (ii) leverage MA-RL for the circuit optimization, where each agent corresponds to a single sub-block, and the interactions between agents delicately mimic the best design tradeoffs between circuit sub-blocks by human experts; (iii) introduce the multiagent twin-delayed techniques to further boost training stability and accomplish higher performances. Experiments on two different analog circuit topologies and knowledge transfers between two technology nodes are demonstrated. It’s shown that MA-RL framework can achieve the best FoM for complex analog circuits design. This work shines the light for future large scale analog circuit system design automation.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管在模拟电路设计自动化方面做出了努力，但目前复杂的模拟电路设计仍然需要大量的手工迭代，劳动强度大且耗时。最近，强化学习（RL）算法已成功用于模拟电路设计优化。然而，用于设计具有复杂设计空间的模拟电路的稳健且高效的 RL 方法尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，受多智能体规划理论和人类专家设计实践的启发，我们提出了一种基于多智能体的强化学习（MA-RL）框架来解决这个问题。特别是，我们（i）根据拓扑信息将复杂的模拟电路划分为多个子块，有效降低设计搜索空间的复杂度； (ii) 利用 MA-RL 进行电路优化，其中每个代理对应一个子块，代理之间的交互巧妙地模仿人类专家在电路子块之间的最佳设计权衡； (iii)引入多智能体双延迟技术以进一步提高训练稳定性并实现更高的性能。演示了两种不同模拟电路拓扑的实验以及两个技术节点之间的知识转移。结果表明，MA-RL框架可以为复杂的模拟电路设计实现最佳的FoM。这项工作为未来大规模模拟电路系统设计自动化带来了光明。

items.title: C2PI: An Efficient Crypto-Clear Two-Party Neural Network Private Inference.
items.abstract: Recently, private inference (PI) has addressed the rising concern over data and model privacy in machine learning inference as a service. However, existing PI frameworks suffer from high computational and communication costs due to the expensive multi-party computation (MPC) protocols. Existing literature has developed lighter MPC protocols to yield more efficient PI schemes. We, in contrast, propose to lighten them by introducing an empirically-defined privacy evaluation. To that end, we reformulate the threat model of PI and use inference data privacy attacks (IDPAs) to evaluate data privacy. We then present an enhanced IDPA, named distillation-based inverse-network attack (DINA), for improved privacy evaluation. Finally, we leverage the findings from DINA and propose C<sup>2</sup>PI, a two-party PI framework presenting an efficient partitioning of the neural network model and requiring only the initial few layers to be performed with MPC protocols. Based on our experimental evaluations, relaxing the formal data privacy guarantees C<sup>2</sup>PI can speed up existing PI frameworks, including Delphi [1] and Cheetah [2], up to 2.89× and 3.88× under LAN and WAN settings, respectively, and save up to 2.75× communication costs.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，私有推理 (PI) 解决了机器学习推理即服务中对数据和模型隐私日益增长的担忧。然而，由于昂贵的多方计算（MPC）协议，现有的 PI 框架面临着高昂的计算和通信成本。现有文献已经开发了更轻量级的 MPC 协议来产生更高效的 PI 方案。相比之下，我们建议通过引入经验定义的隐私评估来减轻它们。为此，我们重新制定了 PI 的威胁模型，并使用推理数据隐私攻击（IDPA）来评估数据隐私。然后，我们提出了一种增强的 IDPA，称为基于蒸馏的逆网络攻击 (DINA)，以改进隐私评估。最后，我们利用 DINA 的研究结果提出了 C<sup>2</sup>PI，这是一个两方 PI 框架，它提供了神经网络模型的有效划分，并且只需要使用 MPC 协议执行最初的几层。根据我们的实验评估，放宽 C<sup>2</sup>PI 的正式数据隐私保证可以将现有 PI 框架（包括 Delphi [1] 和 Cheetah [2]）的速度在 LAN 和 WAN 设置下分别提高 2.89 倍和 3.88 倍，并节省高达 2.75 倍的通信成本。

items.title: LRSDP: Low-Rank SDP for Triple Patterning Lithography Layout Decomposition.
items.abstract: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) has been widely adopted in advanced technology nodes to enhance lithography resolution. As layout decomposition for triple patterning lithography (TPL) and beyond is NP-hard, existing approaches formulate mathematical programming problems and leverage general-purpose solvers such as integer linear programming (ILP) and semidefinite programming (SDP) to trade off quality against runtime. With the aggressive increase in design complexity, existing approaches can no longer scale to solve complicated designs with high solution quality. In this paper, we propose a dedicated low-rank SDP algorithm for MPL decomposition with augmented Lagrangian relaxation and Riemannian optimization. Experimental results demonstrate that our method is 186×, 25×, and 12× faster than the state-of-the-art decomposition approaches with highly competitive solution quality.
items.abstract_zh: 多重图案光刻（MPL）已在先进技术节点中广泛采用，以提高光刻分辨率。由于三重图案光刻 (TPL) 及更高版本的布局分解是 NP 困难的，因此现有方法制定数学规划问题并利用整数线性规划 (ILP) 和半定规划 (SDP) 等通用求解器来权衡质量与运行时间。随着设计复杂性的急剧增加，现有方法无法再扩展以解决具有高解决方案质量的复杂设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种专用的低秩 SDP 算法，用于具有增强拉格朗日松弛和黎曼优化的 MPL 分解。实验结果表明，我们的方法比最先进的分解方法快 186 倍、25 倍和 12 倍，且解质量极具竞争力。

items.title: Contention-Free Configured Grant Scheduling for 5G URLLC Traffic.
items.abstract: 5G networks are being designed to support ultra reliable and low latency communication (URLLC) services in many real-time industrial applications. The conventional grant-based dynamic scheduling can hardly fulfill the URLLC requirements due to the non-negligible transmission delays introduced during the spectrum resource grant process. To address this problem, 5G defines a grant-free transmission scheme, namely configured grant (CG) scheduling, for uplink (UL) traffic to pre-allocate spectrum resource to user equipments (UEs). This paper studies CG scheduling for periodic URLLC traffic with real-time and collision-free guarantees. An exact solution based on Satisfiability Modulo Theory (SMT) is first proposed to generate a feasible CG configuration for a given traffic set. To enhance scalability, we further develop an efficient graph-based heuristic consisting of an offset selection method and a multicoloring algorithm for spectrum resource allocation. Extensive experiments are conducted using 3GPP industrial use cases to show that both approaches can satisfy the real-time and collision-free requirements, and the heuristic can achieve comparable schedulability ratio with the SMT-based approach but require significantly lower running time.
items.abstract_zh: 5G 网络旨在支持许多实时工业应用中的超可靠和低延迟通信 (URLLC) 服务。由于频谱资源授权过程中引入的不可忽略的传输延迟，传统的基于授权的动态调度很难满足URLLC的要求。为了解决这个问题，5G为上行链路（UL）流量定义了一种无授权传输方案，即配置授权（CG）调度，以将频谱资源预先分配给用户设备（UE）。本文研究了具有实时性和无冲突保证的周期性 URLLC 流量的 CG 调度。首先提出了基于可满足性模理论 (SMT) 的精确解决方案，为给定的流量集生成可行的 CG 配置。为了增强可扩展性，我们进一步开发了一种高效的基于图的启发式算法，其中包括用于频谱资源分配的偏移选择方法和多色算法。使用 3GPP 工业用例进行了大量实验，表明两种方法都可以满足实时和无碰撞的要求，并且启发式方法可以实现与基于 SMT 的方法相当的可调度性比率，但需要的运行时间显着缩短。

items.title: BP-NTT: Fast and Compact in-SRAM Number Theoretic Transform with Bit-Parallel Modular Multiplication.
items.abstract: Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) is an essential mathematical tool for computing polynomial multiplication in promising lattice-based cryptography. However, costly division operations and complex data dependencies make efficient and flexible hardware design to be challenging, especially on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing approaches either focus on only limited parameter settings or impose substantial hardware overhead. In this paper, we introduce a hardware-algorithm methodology to efficiently accelerate NTT in various settings using in-cache computing. By leveraging an optimized bit-parallel modular multiplication and introducing costless shift operations, our proposed solution provides up to 29× higher throughput-per-area and 10-138× better throughput-per-power compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 数论变换 (NTT) 是一种重要的数学工具，用于在有前途的基于格的密码学中计算多项式乘法。然而，昂贵的除法运算和复杂的数据依赖性使得高效、灵活的硬件设计变得具有挑战性，特别是在资源受限的边缘设备上。现有方法要么仅关注有限的参数设置，要么施加大量的硬件开销。在本文中，我们介绍了一种硬件算法方法，可使用缓存内计算在各种设置中有效加速 NTT。通过利用优化的位并行模乘法并引入无成本的移位操作，我们提出的解决方案与最先进的技术相比，每面积吞吐量提高了 29 倍，单位功率吞吐量提高了 10-138 倍。

items.title: AdaGL: Adaptive Learning for Agile Distributed Training of Gigantic GNNs.
items.abstract: Distributed GNN training on contemporary massive and densely connected graphs requires information aggregation from all neighboring nodes, which leads to an explosion of inter-server communications. This paper proposes AdaGL, a highly scalable end-to-end framework for rapid distributed GNN training. AdaGL novelty lies upon our adaptive-learning based graph-allocation engine as well as utilizing multi-resolution coarse representation of dense graphs. As a result, AdaGL achieves an unprecedented level of balanced server computation while minimizing the communication overhead. Extensive proof-of-concept evaluations on billion-scale graphs show AdaGL attains ∼30−40% faster convergence compared with prior arts.
items.abstract_zh: 对当代大规模、密集连接图的分布式 GNN 训练需要来自所有相邻节点的信息聚合，这导致服务器间通信的爆炸式增长。本文提出了 AdaGL，一种用于快速分布式 GNN 训练的高度可扩展的端到端框架。 AdaGL novelty lies upon our adaptive-learning based graph-allocation engine as well as utilizing multi-resolution coarse representation of dense graphs.因此，AdaGL 实现了前所未有的平衡服务器计算水平，同时最大限度地减少了通信开销。对十亿级图的广泛概念验证评估表明，与现有技术相比，AdaGL 的收敛速度提高了约 30−40%。

items.title: FSPA: An FeFET-based Sparse Matrix-Dense Vector Multiplication Accelerator.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix-dense vector multiplication (SpMV) is widely used in various applications. The performance of traditional SpMV accelerators is bounded by memory. In-memory computing (IMC) is a promising technique to alleviate the memory bottleneck. The current IMC accelerator cannot support sparse storage format and in-situ floating-point multiplication at the same time. In this paper, we propose FSPA, an ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET) based SpMV accelerator. FSPA integrates novel content-addressable memory (CAM) arrays and multiply-add computation (MAC) arrays to support sparse matrices represented in the floating-point format. FSPA achieves significant speedups and energy savings over CPU, GPU and two state-of-the-art IMC accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-密集向量乘法（SpMV）广泛应用于各种应用中。传统 SpMV 加速器的性能受到内存的限制。内存计算（IMC）是一种很有前景的缓解内存瓶颈的技术。目前的IMC加速器无法同时支持稀疏存储格式和原位浮点乘法。 In this paper, we propose FSPA, an ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET) based SpMV accelerator. FSPA 集成了新颖的内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 阵列和乘加计算 (MAC) 阵列，以支持以浮点格式表示的稀疏矩阵。与 CPU、GPU 和两个最先进的 IMC 加速器相比，FSPA 实现了显着的加速和节能。

items.title: Uint-Packing: Multiply Your DNN Accelerator Performance via Unsigned Integer DSP Packing.
items.abstract: DSP blocks are undoubtedly efficient solutions for implementing multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations on FPGA. Since DSP resources are scarce in FPGA, the advanced solution is to pack parallel multiplication operations into a single DSP. However, available methods are based on signed-type multiplication, leading to both loss of accuracy and increased area. To solve these issues simultaneously, we propose an unsigned integer DSP packing generalization model called uint-packing. Guided by this generalization model, we design the novel computational structure of the DNN accelerator. Our system design is state-of-the-art, with 2.8× throughput and 4× energy efficiency compared to the third-place DAC-SDC’22 design.
items.abstract_zh: DSP 模块无疑是在 FPGA 上实现乘法累加 (MAC) 运算的有效解决方案。由于FPGA中DSP资源稀缺，先进的解决方案是将并行乘法运算打包到单个DSP中。然而，可用的方法基于符号类型乘法，导致精度损失和面积增加。为了同时解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为 uint-packing 的无符号整数 DSP 打包泛化模型。在此泛化模型的指导下，我们设计了 DNN 加速器的新颖计算结构。我们的系统设计是最先进的，与第三名的 DAC-SDC'22 设计相比，吞吐量提高了 2.8 倍，能效提高了 4 倍。

items.title: ANAS: Asynchronous Neuromorphic Hardware Architecture Search Based on a System-Level Simulator.
items.abstract: Event-driven asynchronous neuromorphic hardware is emerging for edge computing with high energy efficiency. In order to obtain the architecture with the best hardware performance, we need to search both the numerical and non-numerical design space of asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. However, it is challenging to find an optimal hardware architecture from the non-numerical design space. To address this problem, we propose an asynchronous neuromorphic hardware architecture search (ANAS) method, which uses an evolutionary algorithm to optimize both the numerical and non-numerical design space. Besides, we introduce a configurable asynchronous neuromorphic hardware simulator (CanMore) to offer system-level modeling and performance estimation. Experimental results show that ANAS rivals the best human-designed architecture by 7 × EDP reduction, and offers 2.3 × EDP reduction than the methods that only optimize numerical design space.
items.abstract_zh: 事件驱动的异步神经形态硬件正在兴起，用于具有高能效的边缘计算。为了获得具有最佳硬件性能的架构，我们需要搜索异步神经形态硬件的数值和非数值设计空间。然而，从非数值设计空间中找到最佳的硬件架构具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种异步神经形态硬件架构搜索（ANAS）方法，该方法使用进化算法来优化数值和非数值设计空间。此外，我们引入了可配置的异步神经形态硬件模拟器（CanMore）来提供系统级建模和性能估计。实验结果表明，ANAS 可以减少 7 × EDP，与最好的人类设计架构相媲美，并且比仅优化数值设计空间的方法提供 2.3 × EDP 减少。

items.title: MixPipe: Efficient Bidirectional Pipeline Parallelism for Training Large-Scale Models.
items.abstract: The rapid development of large-scale deep neural networks has put forward an urgent demand for the efficiency of parallel training. Recently, bidirectional pipeline parallelism has been recognized as an effective approach for improving training throughput. This paper proposes MixPipe, a novel bidirectional pipeline parallelism for efficiently training large-scale models in synchronous scenarios. Compared with previous proposals, MixPipe achieves a better balance between pipeline utilization and device utilization, which benefits from the flexible regulating for the number of micro-batches injected into the bidirectional pipelines at the beginning. MixPipe also features a mixed schedule to balance memory usage and further reduce the bubble ratio. Evaluation results show that: for Transformer based language models (i.e., Bert and GPT-2 models), MixPipe improves the training throughput by up to 2.39× over the state-of-the-art synchronous pipeline approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模深度神经网络的快速发展对并行训练的效率提出了迫切的需求。最近，双向管道并行性已被认为是提高训练吞吐量的有效方法。本文提出了 MixPipe，一种新颖的双向管道并行性，用于在同步场景中有效训练大规模模型。与之前的提案相比，MixPipe在管道利用率和设备利用率之间取得了更好的平衡，这得益于一开始就注入双向管道的微批量数量的灵活调节。 MixPipe 还具有混合调度功能，以平衡内存使用并进一步减少气泡比率。评估结果表明：对于基于 Transformer 的语言模型（即 Bert 和 GPT-2 模型），MixPipe 的训练吞吐量比最先进的同步管道方法提高了 2.39 倍。

items.title: A Universal Method for Task Allocation on FP-FPS Multiprocessor Systems with Spin Locks.
items.abstract: Many complex real-time systems, such as increasingly automated vehicles and 5G wireless base stations, contain a large amount of shared resources that must be accessed in a mutually exclusive fashion. This leads to significant contention especially when resources are shared across processors. To reduce the contention, various resource-aware task allocation methods have been developed to localize the shared resources. Unfortunately, these existing methods either are tailored for specific scheduling and analysis approaches, or introduce runtime overhead that undermines their applicability. In this paper, we present a task allocation method for a mainstream type of real-time systems in practice: FP-FPS (fully-partitioned fixed-priority scheduling) multiprocessor systems with spin locks managing shared resources. Instead of relying on timing bounds as guidance, we utilize a model to approximate the degree of resource contention between tasks. The model is decoupled from priority assignment algorithms, resource sharing protocols and schedulability tests. Hence, our task allocation method can be applied without detailed knowledge of the underlying system, which is particularly useful during the initial design phase of the system. More detailed information about the system in the later phases of design will push up the approximation accuracy and further enhance the performance. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art by 13.6% on average (up to 24.2%) in system schedulability with a much less (57x on average) computation cost and negligible runtime overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 许多复杂的实时系统，例如日益自动化的车辆和 5G 无线基站，包含大量共享资源，必须以互斥的方式访问这些资源。这会导致严重的争用，尤其是在处理器之间共享资源时。为了减少争用，已经开发了各种资源感知任务分配方法来本地化共享资源。不幸的是，这些现有方法要么是针对特定的调度和分析方法量身定制的，要么引入了运行时开销，从而削弱了它们的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于实践中主流类型实时系统的任务分配方法：具有管理共享资源的自旋锁的 FP-FPS（完全分区固定优先级调度）多处理器系统。我们不依赖时间限制作为指导，而是利用模型来估计任务之间的资源争用程度。该模型与优先级分配算法、资源共享协议和可调度性测试分离。因此，我们的任务分配方法可以在不详细了解底层系统的情况下应用，这在系统的初始设计阶段特别有用。在设计的后期阶段，有关系统的更多详细信息将提高逼近精度并进一步提高性能。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在系统可调度性方面平均优于现有技术 13.6%（高达 24.2%），同时计算成本低得多（平均 57 倍）且运行时开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: Automatic End-to-End Joint Optimization for Kernel Compilation on DSPs.
items.abstract: Digital signal processors (DSPs) commonly adopt VLIW-SIMD architecture and are extensively applied in most compute-heavy embedded sensing applications. The performances for DSP kernels rely heavily on compilations and handwritten optimizations. Hand-crafted methods suffer from heavy burden on programmers, while state-of-the-art automatic compilation methods always focus more on a certain aspect (tiling or auto-vectorization), lacking of global and sequential vision on the intact compilation optimization process. It still requires empirical adjustments by programmers in the actual scenario.In order to release programmers from kernel tuning, we propose JOKer, an automatic end-to-end multi-level code generator for kernel joint optimization on DSPs. JOKer integrates means of optimizations in compiling process and provides an end-to-end workflow for performance tuning. It explores compilation configurations through a reinforcement learning based agent for global optimal solution and generates high performance kernel codes for DSPs automatically.
items.abstract_zh: 数字信号处理器 (DSP) 通常采用 VLIW-SIMD 架构，广泛应用于大多数计算密集型嵌入式传感应用中。 DSP 内核的性能很大程度上依赖于编译和手写优化。手工制作的方法给程序员带来了沉重的负担，而最先进的自动编译方法总是更多地关注某个方面（平铺或自动矢量化），缺乏对完整编译优化过程的全局和顺序视野。它还需要程序员在实际场景中进行经验调整。 为了将程序员从内核调优中解放出来，我们提出了JOKer，一种用于DSP上内核联合优化的自动端到端多级代码生成器。 JOKer在编译过程中集成了优化手段，并提供了端到端的性能调优工作流程。它通过基于强化学习的代理探索编译配置以获得全局最优解决方案，并自动为 DSP 生成高性能内核代码。

items.title: cVTS: A Constrained Voronoi Tree Search Method for High Dimensional Analog Circuit Synthesis.
items.abstract: A constrained Voronoi tree-based domain decomposition method for high-dimensional Bayesian optimization is proposed to solve large scale analog circuit synthesis problems, which can be formulated as high-dimensional heterogeneous black-box optimization. Hierarchical Voronoi tree progressively breaks down the design space into partitions with implicit performance boundaries such that promising regions are efficiently explored. Fast exploitation is ensured in Voronoi nest via local Bayesian optimization with a few observations. A slice-enhanced Gibbs sampling method is proposed to sample acquisition function cMES in irregular polyhedrons with design constraints. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, cVTS achieves significant speed up without loss of accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于约束Voronoi树的高维贝叶斯优化域分解方法来解决大规模模拟电路综合问题，该方法可以表示为高维异构黑盒优化。分层 Voronoi 树逐步将设计空间分解为具有隐式性能边界的分区，以便有效地探索有前途的区域。通过局部贝叶斯优化和一些观察，确保了 Voronoi 巢的快速开发。提出了一种切片增强吉布斯采样方法，用于在具有设计约束的不规则多面体中对采集函数cMES进行采样。与最先进的方法相比，cVTS 在不损失准确性的情况下实现了显着的加速。

items.title: Instant-NeRF: Instant On-Device Neural Radiance Field Training via Algorithm-Accelerator Co-Designed Near-Memory Processing.
items.abstract: Instant on-device Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) are in growing demand for unleashing the promise of immersive AR/VR experiences, but are still limited by their prohibitive training time. Our profiling analysis reveals a memory-bound inefficiency in NeRF training. To tackle this inefficiency, near-memory processing (NMP) promises to be an effective solution, but also faces challenges due to the unique workloads of NeRFs, including the random hash table lookup, random point processing sequence, and heterogeneous bottleneck steps. Therefore, we propose the first NMP framework, Instant-NeRF, dedicated to enabling instant on-device NeRF training. Experiments on eight datasets consistently validate the effectiveness of Instant-NeRF.
items.abstract_zh: 人们对设备上即时神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的需求不断增长，以释放沉浸式 AR/VR 体验的希望，但仍然受到其训练时间的限制。我们的分析揭示了 NeRF 训练中内存限制的低效率。为了解决这种低效率问题，近内存处理（NMP）有望成为一种有效的解决方案，但由于 NeRF 独特的工作负载，包括随机哈希表查找、随机点处理序列和异构瓶颈步骤，也面临着挑战。因此，我们提出了第一个 NMP 框架 Instant-NeRF，致力于实现即时设备上 NeRF 训练。对八个数据集的实验一致验证了 Instant-NeRF 的有效性。

items.title: Correlation-guided Placement for Nonvolatile FPGAs.
items.abstract: Nonvolatile FPGAs have advantages of high density and near-zero leakage power compared with traditional SRAM-based FPGAs. However, they have lifetime issue. To deal with this problem, a series of configuration files can be generated with various logical-to-physical mappings so that intensive writes can be distributed to different physical regions for wear leveling. Currently, the configuration files are independently generated, which is time-consuming. In this paper, we propose to investigate correlations between components and use them to guide the computer-aided design (CAD) flow to speed up the procedure of deriving configuration files. Specifically, we develop dynamic probabilities to drive the swapping of placement step in the CAD flow to push components to locate appropriate positions quickly. Evaluation shows that the proposed schemes can deliver 36.32% reduction in number of swappings when compared with existing strategies, while maintaining comparable performance and lifetime.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统基于 SRAM 的 FPGA 相比，非易失性 FPGA 具有高密度和接近零泄漏功耗的优势。然而，他们有终身问题。为了解决这个问题，可以生成一系列具有各种逻辑到物理映射的配置文件，以便将密集写入分布到不同的物理区域以进行磨损均衡。目前配置文件都是独立生成的，比较耗时。在本文中，我们建议研究组件之间的相关性，并使用它们来指导计算机辅助设计（CAD）流程，以加快派生配置文件的过程。具体来说，我们开发动态概率来驱动 CAD 流程中放置步骤的交换，以推动组件快速找到合适的位置。评估表明，与现有策略相比，所提出的方案可以减少 36.32% 的交换次数，同时保持相当的性能和寿命。

items.title: SaGraph: A Similarity-aware Hardware Accelerator for Temporal Graph Processing.
items.abstract: Temporal graph processing is used to handle the snapshots of the temporal graph, which concerns changes in graph over time. Although several software/hardware solutions have been designed for efficient temporal graph processing, they still suffer from serious irregular data access due to the uncoordinated graph traversal. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes SaGraph, a domain-specific hardware accelerator to support the efficient processing of temporal graph. Specifically, temporal graph processing shows strong data access similarity, i.e., most graph accesses of the processing of different snapshots are the same and usually refer to a small fraction of vertices. SaGraph can dynamically coordinate the graph traversals and adaptively cache the vertex states to fully exploit the data access similarity for smaller data access overhead. We implemented and evaluated SaGraph on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card. Compared with the cutting-edge software and hardware solutions, SaGraph achieves 8.5×-157.3×, 4.2×-16.1× speedups and 34.7×-423.6×, 5.3×-14.7× energy savings, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 时序图处理用于处理时序图的快照，涉及图随时间的变化。尽管已经设计了几种软件/硬件解决方案来实现高效的时态图处理，但由于不协调的图遍历，它们仍然遭受严重的不规则数据访问。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了 SaGraph，一种特定领域的硬件加速器，以支持时态图的高效处理。具体来说，时间图处理表现出很强的数据访问相似性，即不同快照处理的大多数图访问是相同的，并且通常涉及一小部分顶点。 SaGraph可以动态协调图的遍历并自适应地缓存顶点状态，以充分利用数据访问的相似性，从而实现更小的数据访问开销。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现并评估了 SaGraph。与前沿的软件和硬件解决方案相比，SaGraph分别实现了8.5×-157.3×、4.2×-16.1×的加速和34.7×-423.6×、5.3×-14.7×的节能。

items.title: Safe DNN-type Controller Synthesis for Nonlinear Systems via Meta Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: There is a pressing need to synthesize provable safety controllers for nonlinear systems as they are embedded in many safety-critical applications. In this paper, we propose a safe Meta Reinforcement Learning (Meta-RL) approach to synthesize deep neural network (DNN) controllers for nonlinear systems subject to safety constraints. Our approach incorporates two phases: Meta-RL for training the controller network, and formal safety verification based on polynomial optimization solving. In the training phase, we provide a training framework which pre-trains a unified meta-initial controller for control systems by meta-learning. An important benefit of the proposed Meta-RL approach lies in that it is much more effective and succeeds in more controller training tasks compared with existing typical RL methods, e.g., Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG). To formally verify the safety properties of the closed-loop system with the learned controller, we develop a verification procedure by using polynomial inclusion computation in combination with barrier certificate generation. Experiments on a set of benchmarks, including systems with dimension up to 12, demonstrate the effectiveness and applicability of our method.
items.abstract_zh: 由于非线性系统嵌入到许多安全关键应用中，因此迫切需要为非线性系统合成可证明的安全控制器。在本文中，我们提出了一种安全的元强化学习（Meta-RL）方法来合成受安全约束的非线性系统的深度神经网络（DNN）控制器。我们的方法分为两个阶段：用于训练控制器网络的 Meta-RL 和基于多项式优化求解的形式安全验证。在训练阶段，我们提供了一个训练框架，通过元学习为控制系统预训练统一的元初始控制器。所提出的 Meta-RL 方法的一个重要好处在于，与现有的典型 RL 方法（例如深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG））相比，它在更多控制器训练任务中更加有效并且成功。为了正式验证具有学习控制器的闭环系统的安全属性，我们通过使用多项式包含计算与屏障证书生成相结合来开发验证程序。在一组基准（包括维度高达 12 的系统）上进行的实验证明了我们方法的有效性和适用性。

items.title: Memory and Computation Coordinated Mapping of DNNs onto Complex Heterogeneous SoC.
items.abstract: The DNN models are now pervasively used for various applications. Meanwhile, the computing hardware has shifted towards heterogeneous system composed of various accelerators. The intertwined complexity of DNN models and hardware makes it challenging for mapping DNN models. Existing mapping frameworks suffer from inefficiencies due to under utilization of computation and bandwidth in heterogeneous SoC. In this paper, we propose COMB, a mapping framework that coordinates the memory and computation and data transfer overhead of heterogeneous accelerators to achieve latency improvement and energy efficiency with two optimizations: dataflow grouping and accelerator mapping. Dataflow grouping maps multiple independent DNN layers to the same accelerator at the same time to spatially share the hardware resources; accelerator mapping finds the optimized placement of the layer groups to accelerators to reduce data transfer overhead. These two optimizations provide a huge design space for heterogeneous DNN mapping. To explore the space efficiently, we present a hybrid scheduling algorithm by combining greedy algorithm and genetic algorithm. In evaluation, COMB achieves 1.28× and 1.37× speedup for latency compared to MAGMA and H2H; COMB also reduces 22.7% and 29.2% energy consumption compared to MAGMA and H2H.
items.abstract_zh: DNN 模型现在广泛用于各种应用。同时，计算硬件已转向由各种加速器组成的异构系统。 DNN 模型和硬件交织在一起的复杂性使得映射 DNN 模型具有挑战性。由于异构 SoC 中的计算和带宽利用率不足，现有的映射框架效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 COMB，一种映射框架，它协调异构加速器的内存、计算和数据传输开销，通过数据流分组和加速器映射两项优化来实现延迟改善和能源效率。数据流分组将多个独立的DNN层同时映射到同一个加速器上，在空间上共享硬件资源；加速器映射找到层组到加速器的优化放置，以减少数据传输开销。这两种优化为异构DNN映射提供了巨大的设计空间。为了有效地探索空间，我们提出了一种结合贪心算法和遗传算法的混合调度算法。在评估中，与 MAGMA 和 H2H 相比，COMB 在延迟方面实现了 1.28 倍和 1.37 倍的加速；与 MAGMA 和 H2H 相比，COMB 还降低了 22.7% 和 29.2% 的能耗。

items.title: TiPU: A Spatial-Locality-Aware Near-Memory Tile Processing Unit for 3D Point Cloud Neural Network.
items.abstract: Energy-efficient 3D point cloud neural network accelerators are desired for autonomous driving and AR/VR applications. This paper proposes TiPU, a spatial-locality-aware near-memory tile processing unit where the point clouds are partitioned into tiles to process spatial features locally. Intra-tile farthest point sampling and cross-tile neighbor search are employed to avoid unnecessary distance computing. To efficiently facilitate the tile operations, TiPU architecture consists of a tile-based unified distance computing unit, a near-CAM feature extractor, and a near-SRAM-computing MLP engine. The experimental results show that, compared to GPU implementation, TiPU achieves 15.7× processing speed and reduces 7308× energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶和 AR/VR 应用需要节能的 3D 点云神经网络加速器。本文提出了 TiPU，一种空间局部性感知的近内存瓦片处理单元，其中点云被划分为瓦片以在本地处理空间特征。采用瓦内最远点采样和跨瓦邻居搜索来避免不必要的距离计算。为了有效促进图块操作，TiPU 架构由基于图块的统一距离计算单元、近 CAM 特征提取器和近 SRAM 计算 MLP 引擎组成。实验结果表明，与GPU实现相比，TiPU实现了15.7倍的处理速度并降低了7308倍的能耗。

items.title: Primer: Fast Private Transformer Inference on Encrypted Data.
items.abstract: It is increasingly important to enable privacy-preserving inference for cloud services based on Transformers. Post-quantum cryptographic techniques, e.g., fully homomorphic encryption (FHE), and multi-party computation (MPC), are popular methods to support private Transformer inference. However, existing works still suffer from prohibitively computational and communicational overhead. In this work, we present, Primer, to enable a fast and accurate Transformer over encrypted data for natural language processing tasks. In particular, Primer is constructed by a hybrid cryptographic protocol optimized for attention-based Transformer models, as well as techniques including computation merge and tokens-first ciphertext packing. Comprehensive experiments on encrypted language modeling show that Primer achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and reduces the inference latency by 90.6% ∼ 97.5% over previous methods.
items.abstract_zh: 为基于 Transformer 的云服务启用隐私保护推理变得越来越重要。后量子密码技术，例如全同态加密（FHE）和多方计算（MPC），是支持私有 Transformer 推理的流行方法。然而，现有的工作仍然面临着令人望而却步的计算和通信开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Primer，为自然语言处理任务提供基于加密数据的快速、准确的 Transformer。特别是，Primer 由针对基于注意力的 Transformer 模型优化的混合密码协议以及计算合并和令牌优先密文打包等技术构建。加密语言建模的综合实验表明，Primer 实现了最先进的精度，并且比之前的方法减少了 90.6% ∼ 97.5% 的推理延迟。

items.title: Accelerating Sparse Attention with a Reconfigurable Non-volatile Processing-In-Memory Architecture.
items.abstract: Attention-based neural networks have shown superior performance in a wide range of tasks. Non-volatile processing-in-memory (NVPIM) architecture shows its great potential to accelerate the dense attention model. However, the unique unstructured and dynamic sparsity pattern in the sparse attention model challenges the mapping efficiency of the NVPIM architecture, as the conventional NVPIM architecture uses a vector-matrix-multiplication primitives. In this paper, we propose a NVPIM architecture to accelerate a dynamic and unstructured sparse computation in the sparse attention. We aim to improve the mapping efficiency for both SDDMM and SpMM by introducing two vector-based primitives with a reconfigurable NVPIM bank. Further, based on our reconfigurable NVPIM bank, we further propose a hybrid stationary data flow to hide the latency. Our evaluation result shows that, over previous NVPIM accelerators, our design could deliver up to 12.36× performance improvement and 3.4× energy efficiency improvement on a range of vision and language tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 基于注意力的神经网络在广泛的任务中表现出了卓越的性能。非易失性内存处理（NVPIM）架构显示了其加速密集注意力模型的巨大潜力。然而，稀疏注意力模型中独特的非结构化和动态稀疏模式挑战了 NVPIM 架构的映射效率，因为传统的 NVPIM 架构使用向量矩阵乘法原语。在本文中，我们提出了一种 NVPIM 架构来加速稀疏注意力中的动态和非结构化稀疏计算。我们的目标是通过引入两个基于向量的基元和可重新配置的 NVPIM 库来提高 SDMMM 和 SpMM 的映射效率。此外，基于我们的可重新配置的 NVPIM 库，我们进一步提出了一种混合固定数据流来隐藏延迟。我们的评估结果表明，与之前的 NVPIM 加速器相比，我们的设计可以在一系列视觉和语言任务上实现高达 12.36 倍的性能提升和 3.4 倍的能效提升。

items.title: Mitigating Distribution Shift for Congestion Optimization in Global Placement.
items.abstract: The placement and routing (PnR) flow plays a critical role in physical design. Poor routing congestion is a possible problem causing severe routing detours, which can lead to deteriorated timing performance or even routing failure. Deep-learning-based congestion prediction model is designed to guide the global placement process in previous work. However, the distribution shift problem in this method limits its performance. In this paper, we mitigate the distribution shift problem with a look-ahead mechanism inspired by optical flow prediction and an invariant feature space learning technique. With the proposed method, we can achieve better congestion prediction performance and less-congested placement results.
items.abstract_zh: 布局布线 (PnR) 流程在物理设计中起着至关重要的作用。不良的路由拥塞是一个可能导致严重路由绕行的问题，这可能导致时序性能恶化甚至路由失败。基于深度学习的拥塞预测模型旨在指导先前工作中的全局布局过程。然而，该方法中的分布偏移问题限制了其性能。在本文中，我们通过受光流预测和不变特征空间学习技术启发的前瞻机制来缓解分布偏移问题。通过所提出的方法，我们可以获得更好的拥塞预测性能和更少拥塞的放置结果。

items.title: ASMCap: An Approximate String Matching Accelerator for Genome Sequence Analysis Based on Capacitive Content Addressable Memory.
items.abstract: Genome sequence analysis is a powerful tool in medical and scientific research. Considering the inevitable sequencing errors and genetic variations, approximate string matching (ASM) has been adopted in practice for genome sequencing. However, with exponentially increasing bio-data, ASM hardware acceleration is facing severe challenges in improving the throughput and energy efficiency with the accuracy constraint.This paper presents ASMCap, an ASM acceleration approach for genome sequence analysis with hardware-algorithm co-optimization. At the circuit level, ASMCap adopts charge-domain computing based on the capacitive multi-level content addressable memories (ML-CAMs), and outperforms the state-of-the-art ML-CAM-based ASM accelerators EDAM with higher accuracy and energy efficiency. ASMCap also has misjudgment correction capability with two proposed hardware-friendly strategies, namely the Hamming-Distance Aid Correction (HDAC) for the substitution-dominant edits and the Threshold-Aware Sequence Rotation (TASR) for the consecutive indels. Evaluation results show that ASMCap can achieve an average of 1.2x (from 74.7% to 87.6%) and up to 1.8x (from 46.3% to 81.2%) higher F<inf>1</inf> score (the key metric of accuracy), 1.4x speedup, and 10.8x energy efficiency improvement compared with EDAM. Compared with the other ASM accelerators, including ResMA based on the comparison matrix, and SaVI based on the seeding strategy, ASMCap achieves an average improvement of 174x and 61x speedup, and 8.7e3x and 943x higher energy efficiency, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基因组序列分析是医学和科学研究的强大工具。考虑到不可避免的测序错误和遗传变异，基因组测序在实践中已采用近似字符串匹配（ASM）。然而，随着生物数据呈指数级增长，ASM硬件加速在精度约束下提高吞吐量和能源效率方面面临着严峻的挑战。本文提出了ASMCap，一种用于基因组序列分析的硬件算法协同优化的ASM加速方法。在电路层面，ASMCap采用基于电容式多级内容可寻址存储器（ML-CAM）的电荷域计算，并以更高的精度和能效优于最先进的基于ML-CAM的ASM加速器EDAM。 ASMCap 还具有误判校正功能，提出了两种硬件友好的策略，即用于替换主导编辑的汉明距离辅助校正 (HDAC) 和用于连续插入缺失的阈值感知序列旋转 (TASR)。评估结果表明，与 EDAM 相比，ASMCap 的 F<inf>1</inf> 分数（准确度的关键指标）平均提高 1.2 倍（从 74.7% 提高到 87.6%），最高提高 1.8 倍（从 46.3% 提高到 81.2%），加速 1.4 倍，能效提高 10.8 倍。与其他 ASM 加速器（包括基于比较矩阵的 ResMA 和基于种子策略的 SaVI）相比，ASMCap 平均分别实现了 174 倍和 61 倍的加速比提升，以及 8.7e3 倍和 943 倍的能效提升。

items.title: Physics-aware Roughness Optimization for Diffractive Optical Neural Networks.
items.abstract: As a representative next-generation device/circuit technology beyond CMOS, diffractive optical neural networks (DONNs) have shown promising advantages over conventional deep neural networks due to extreme fast computation speed (light speed) and low energy consumption. However, there is a mismatch, i.e., significant prediction accuracy loss, between the DONN numerical modelling and physical optical device deployment, because of the interpixel interaction within the diffractive layers. In this work, we propose a physics-aware diffractive optical neural network training framework to reduce the performance difference between numerical modeling and practical deployment. Specifically, we propose the roughness modeling regularization in the training process and integrate the physics-aware sparsification method to introduce sparsity to the phase masks to reduce sharp phase changes between adjacent pixels in diffractive layers. We further develop 2π periodic optimization to reduce the roughness of the phase masks to preserve the performance of DONN. Experiment results demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-arts, our physics-aware optimization can provide 35.7%, 34.2%, 28.1%, and 27.3% reduction in roughness with only accuracy loss on MNIST, FMNIST, KMNIST, and EMNIST, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 作为超越 CMOS 的下一代代表性器件/电路技术，衍射光学神经网络（DONN）由于极快的计算速度（光速）和低能耗而显示出优于传统深度神经网络的优势。然而，由于衍射层内的像素间相互作用，DONN 数值建模和物理光学设备部署之间存在不匹配，即显着的预测精度损失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种物理感知衍射光学神经网络训练框架，以减少数值建模与实际部署之间的性能差异。具体来说，我们提出在训练过程中进行粗糙度建模正则化，并集成物理感知稀疏方法，将稀疏性引入相位掩模，以减少衍射层中相邻像素之间的急剧相位变化。我们进一步开发 2π 周期性优化来降低相位掩模的粗糙度，以保持 DONN 的性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们的物理感知优化可以分别将 MNIST、FMNIST、KMNIST 和 EMNIST 上的粗糙度降低 35.7%、34.2%、28.1% 和 27.3%，而仅损失精度。

items.title: Fair Will Go On: A Collaboration-Aware Fairness Scheme for NVMe SSD in Cloud Storage System.
items.abstract: Since multiple flows (users) compete for a single, shared solid state drives (SSDs) concurrently in cloud environments, fairness has drawn great interest in recent years. Although many fair schemes are proposed on different modules of SSDs, such as resource allocation for the cache and chip queue reordering for the transaction scheduling unit (TSU), they fail to continue to provide fairness for the worse locality of I/O requests due to a deeper cloud storage stack that makes cache performance poor. Moreover, existing methods only treat back-end flash as a black box and do not exploit the differences in flash features across requests. This paper proposes CoFS, a novel coordinated SSD cache and TSU light-weight learning-based fair scheme to achieve complete fairness considering cache and bandwidth resources which are significant for fairness control. The key idea is to make the front-end SSD cache achieves fairness at the workload-level by recognizing dynamic I/O changes, while the back-end TSU achieves fairness at the flash-level by awareness of flash page-types, and finally CoFS collaborates with them to achieve fairness at the SSD device-level. Experimental results show that CoFS achieves significant fairness and performance gain of a wide range of the latest cloud block storage workloads, with an average improvement of 46.3% and 94.5% compared to state-of-the-art fairness policies, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于多个流（用户）在云环境中同时竞争单个共享固态硬盘（SSD），因此近年来公平性引起了人们的极大兴趣。尽管在SSD的不同模块上提出了许多公平方案，例如缓存的资源分配和事务调度单元（TSU）的芯片队列重新排序，但由于更深的云存储堆栈导致缓存性能较差，因此它们无法继续为I/O请求的较差局部性提供公平性。此外，现有方法仅将后端闪存视为黑匣子，并且没有利用跨请求的闪存功能的差异。本文提出了 CoFS，一种新颖的协调 SSD 缓存和 TSU 轻量级基于学习的公平方案，以实现完全公平，考虑到对公平控制至关重要的缓存和带宽资源。核心思想是让前端SSD缓存通过识别动态I/O变化实现工作负载级别的公平性，后端TSU通过感知闪存页面类型实现闪存级别的公平性，最后CoFS与它们配合实现SSD设备级别的公平性。实验结果表明，CoFS 在各种最新的云块存储工作负载上实现了显着的公平性和性能提升，与最先进的公平策略相比，平均分别提高了 46.3% 和 94.5%。

items.title: Hardware-Aware Graph Neural Network Automated Design for Edge Computing Platforms.
items.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a popular strategy for handling non-Euclidean data due to their state-of-the-art performance. However, most of the current GNN model designs mainly focus on task accuracy, lacking in considering hardware resources limitation and real-time requirements of edge application scenarios. Comprehensive profiling of typical GNN models indicates that their execution characteristics are significantly affected across different computing platforms, which demands hardware awareness for efficient GNN designs. In this work, HGNAS is proposed as the first Hardware-aware Graph Neural Architecture Search framework targeting resource constraint edge devices. By decoupling the GNN paradigm, HGNAS constructs a fine-grained design space and leverages an efficient multi-stage search strategy to explore optimal architectures within a few GPU hours. Moreover, HGNAS achieves hardware awareness during the GNN architecture design by leveraging a hardware performance predictor, which could balance the GNN model accuracy and efficiency corresponding to the characteristics of targeted devices. Experimental results show that HGNAS can achieve about 10.6× speedup and 88.2% peak memory reduction with a negligible accuracy loss compared to DGCNN on various edge devices, including Nvidia RTX3080, Jetson TX2, Intel i7-8700K and Raspberry Pi 3B+.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其最先进的性能，图神经网络（GNN）已成为处理非欧几里得数据的流行策略。然而，目前的GNN模型设计大多主要关注任务精度，缺乏考虑硬件资源限制和边缘应用场景的实时性要求。对典型 GNN 模型的全面分析表明，它们的执行特性在不同的计算平台上受到显着影响，这需要硬件意识来实现高效的 GNN 设计。在这项工作中，HGNAS 被提议作为第一个针对资源受限边缘设备的硬件感知图神经架构搜索框架。通过解耦 GNN 范式，HGNAS 构建了细粒度的设计空间，并利用高效的多阶段搜索策略在几个 GPU 小时内探索最佳架构。此外，HGNAS 通过利用硬件性能预测器在 GNN 架构设计过程中实现硬件感知，这可以根据目标设备的特性平衡 GNN 模型的准确性和效率。实验结果表明，与 DGCNN 相比，HGNAS 在各种边缘设备（包括 Nvidia RTX3080、Jetson TX2、Intel i7-8700K 和 Raspberry Pi 3B+）上可以实现约 10.6 倍的加速和 88.2% 的峰值内存减少，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

items.title: INVITED: Design Automation Needs for Monolithic 3D ICs: Accomplishments and Gaps.
items.abstract: In this paper, we provide an overview of design automation tools and methodology for Monolithic 3D ICs, focusing on the accomplishments in recent years and the gaps that remain to be filled. Monolithic 3D integration is an emerging technology with high 3D interconnect density and performance benefits, but it proposes new challenges for computer-aided design tools. In this paper, we first revisit the current status of design automation tools for Monolithic 3D and highlight the recent developments in tier partitioning, 3D placement and routing, inter-tier via controls, and power and thermal integrity analysis. Then, we discuss the gaps to be met for next-generation system-level heterogeneous Monolithic 3D IC design. Finally, we present our vision for the future of design automation developments for Monolithic 3D ICs.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们概述了单片 3D IC 的设计自动化工具和方法，重点介绍了近年来取得的成就以及仍有待填补的空白。单片3D集成是一种新兴技术，具有高3D互连密度和性能优势，但它给计算机辅助设计工具带来了新的挑战。在本文中，我们首先回顾了单片 3D 设计自动化工具的现状，并重点介绍了层分区、3D 布局和布线、层间过孔控制以及电源和热完整性分析方面的最新发展。然后，我们讨论下一代系统级异构单片 3D IC 设计需要满足的差距。最后，我们提出了对单片 3D IC 设计自动化开发未来的愿景。

items.title: Processing-In-Hierarchical-Memory Architecture for Billion-Scale Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search.
items.abstract: Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) algorithms achieve the best accuracy for fast high-recall searches on billion-scale datasets. Because of the irregular and large-volume data access, existing CPU-based systems suffer from heavy data movements when dealing with graph-based ANNS algorithms. Near-memory-computing (NMC) architectures have demonstrated great potential in boosting the performance of big-data processing. However, existing NMC architectures face two serious problems when processing graph-based ANNS algorithms: (1) the memory capacity of main memory level NMC (e.g., 64GB) cannot meet the storage requirement of ANNS on billion-scale datasets (e.g., 800GB), resulting in heavy data transfers between main memory and storage; (2) the contradiction between the irregular and fine-grained graph access and the page-level read granularity hinder the throughput of storage level NMC.This paper proposes Pyramid, the processing-in-hierarchical-memory architecture for graph-based ANNS on billion-scale datasets. Pyramid combines the internal bandwidth benefits of main memory level NMC with the capacity benefits of storage level NMC. A hierarchical graph-cluster-based ANNS is also proposed for Pyramid. It transforms the irregular data access on large-scale graphs into the irregular access on small-scale graphs at the main memory level and regular sequential in-cluster access at the storage level. Experimental results show that with the same recall of 0.9, Pyramid improves the throughput by 21.1~72.8× and 26.0~50.7× compared with existing CPU/GPU-based ANNS systems on million-scale and billion-scale datasets, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 算法可在十亿级数据集上实现快速高召回率搜索的最佳准确度。由于不规则且大量的数据访问，现有的基于 CPU 的系统在处理基于图的 ANNS 算法时会遭受大量数据移动的困扰。近内存计算 (NMC) 架构在提升大数据处理性能方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的NMC架构在处理基于图的ANNS算法时面临两个严重的问题：（1）主存级NMC的存储容量（例如64GB）无法满足ANNS对十亿级数据集（例如800GB）的存储要求，导致主存和存储之间的数据传输量很大； (2)不规则、细粒度的图访问与页级读取粒度之间的矛盾阻碍了存储级NMC的吞吐量。本文提出了Pyramid，一种针对十亿级数据集的基于图的ANNS的分层内存处理架构。 Pyramid 结合了主内存级 NMC 的内部带宽优势和存储级 NMC 的容量优势。还为 Pyramid 提出了基于分层图簇的 ANNS。它将大规模图上的不规则数据访问转化为主存层面上小规模图上的不规则访问和存储层面上规则的顺序簇内访问。实验结果表明，在相同的召回率 0.9 下，Pyramid 与现有基于 CPU/GPU 的 ANNS 系统在百万级和十亿级数据集上的吞吐量分别提高了 21.1~72.8 倍和 26.0~50.7 倍。

items.title: ChaosINTC: A Secure Interrupt Management Mechanism against Interrupt-based Attacks on TEE.
items.abstract: For Trusted Execution Environment (TEE), interrupt-based side-channel attacks are becoming significant threats. Malicious supervisors use interrupts to perform single-step side-channel attacks or to improve the accuracy of existing side-channel attacks. This paper proposes a secure interrupt handle mechanism dedicated to TEE, named ChaosINTC. (1) To prevent frequent interrupts, a dynamic interrupt response delay mechanism delays the interrupt delivery with a variable time. (2) To prevent maliciously modifying ISRs, an interrupt handler protecting mechanism performs isolation and integrity checking. We deployed ChaosINTC on an open-source RISC-V core and evaluated its performance via FPGA. Our design provides strong security with marginal hardware and performance costs.
items.abstract_zh: 对于可信执行环境（TEE）来说，基于中断的旁道攻击正在成为重大威胁。恶意监控程序使用中断来执行单步旁路攻击或提高现有旁路攻击的准确性。本文提出了一种专用于TEE的安全中断处理机制，命名为ChaosINTC。 (1) 为了防止频繁中断，动态中断响应延迟机制以可变时间延迟中断传递。 (2)为了防止恶意修改ISR，中断处理程序保护机制执行隔离和完整性检查。我们在开源 RISC-V 内核上部署 ChaosINTC，并通过 FPGA 评估其性能。我们的设计以边际硬件和性能成本提供强大的安全性。

items.title: A Database Dependent Framework for K-Input Maximum Fanout-Free Window Rewriting.
items.abstract: Rewriting is a widely used logic optimization approach incorporated in most commercial logic synthesis tools. In this paper, we present a new rewriting method based on And-Inverted Graph (AIG). Rather than focusing on cut rewriting, it considers a novel sub-structure called Maximum Fanout-Free Window (MFFW) and rewrites with a more compact implementation. Both exact synthesis and heuristic methods can be adopted to optimize MFFWs. A database dependent framework is proposed to store the optimal sub-structures to accelerate the processing. We further propose the semi-canonicalization to reduce the scale of the database, which could reduce more than 98% of the 4-input MFFW database. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate both the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed framework.
items.abstract_zh: 重写是大多数商业逻辑综合工具中广泛使用的逻辑优化方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于与倒转图（AIG）的新重写方法。它不关注剪切重写，而是考虑一种称为最大无扇出窗口（MFFW）的新颖子结构，并使用更紧凑的实现进行重写。可以采用精确综合和启发式方法来优化 MFFW。提出了一个依赖于数据库的框架来存储最佳子结构以加速处理。我们进一步提出半规范化来减少数据库的规模，这可以减少4输入MFFW数据库98%以上的规模。对基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性和效率。

items.title: Mckeycutter: A High-throughput Key Generator of Classic McEliece on Hardware.
items.abstract: Classic McEliece is a code-based quantum-resistant public-key scheme characterized with relative high encapsulation/decapsulation speed and small ciphertexts, with an in-depth analysis on its security. However, slow key generation with large public key size make it hard for wider applications. Based on this observation, Mckeycutter, a high-throughput key generator in hardware, is proposed to accelerate the key generation in Classic McEliece based on algorithm-hardware co-design. Meanwhile the storage overhead caused by large-size keys is also minimized. First, compact large-size GF(2) Gauss elimination method is presented by adopting naive processing array and memory-friendly scheduling strategy. Second, an optimized constant-time hardware sorter is proposed to support regular memory accesses with less comparators and storage. Third, algorithmlevel pipeline is enabled for high-throughput processing, allowing for concurrent key generations. Our FPGA implementation results achieve around 4× improvements in throughput with 9~14× less memory-time product compared with the existing FPGA solutions.
items.abstract_zh: Classic McEliece是一种基于代码的抗量子公钥方案，具有较高的封装/解封装速度和较小的密文，对其安全性进行了深入分析。然而，由于公钥大小较大，密钥生成速度较慢，因此很难得到更广泛的应用。基于这一观察，提出了一种硬件高吞吐量密钥生成器 Mckeycutter，以基于算法-硬件协同设计来加速 Classic McEliece 中的密钥生成。同时，大尺寸密钥带来的存储开销也被最小化。首先，采用朴素处理阵列和内存友好的调度策略，提出了紧凑的大尺寸GF(2)高斯消除方法。其次，提出了一种优化的恒定时间硬件排序器，以支持使用更少的比较器和存储的常规内存访问。第三，算法级管道可实现高吞吐量处理，从而允许并发密钥生成。与现有 FPGA 解决方案相比，我们的 FPGA 实现结果将吞吐量提高了约 4 倍，内存时间乘积减少了 9~14 倍。

items.title: PIM-HLS: An Automatic Hardware Generation Tool for Heterogeneous Processing-In-Memory-based Neural Network Accelerators.
items.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have shown great abilities for neural network (NN) acceleration on edge devices that demand low latency under severe area constraints. Heterogeneous PIM architectures with different PIM implementation approaches such as RRAM-based PIM and SRAM-based PIM can further improve the performance. However, the automatic generation of heterogeneous PIM architectures faces the following two unresolved problems. First, existing work has not considered the design for heterogeneous PIM-based NN accelerators with multiple memory technologies. Second, for PIM with insufficient memory on edge devices, it is challenging to find the optimal runtime weight scheduling strategy in an O(L!) optimization space for the NN with L layers.In this paper, we propose PIM-HLS, an automatic hardware generation tool for heterogeneous PIM-based NN accelerators. Aiming at the problems above, we first point out that heterogeneous PIM can improve the performance under severe area constraints. Then we optimize the architectures for each NN layer by taking the advantage of different memory technologies. We also define the optimization problem of runtime weight scheduling and mapping for the first time, and propose a dynamic-programming-based weight scheduling algorithm to reduce the optimization space to O(L<sup>2</sup>). We implement PIM-HLS to automatically generate the hardware code and the instructions. Results show that we achieve an averagely 5.9× speedup with 72.8% less area compared with state-of-the-art PIM designs.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构在边缘设备上显示出强大的神经网络 (NN) 加速能力，这些设备在严格的面积限制下需要低延迟。具有不同PIM实现方法（例如基于RRAM的PIM和基于SRAM的PIM）的异构PIM架构可以进一步提高性能。然而，异构PIM架构的自动生成面临以下两个未解决的问题。首先，现有的工作没有考虑采用多种内存技术的基于 PIM 的异构神经网络加速器的设计。其次，对于边缘设备上内存不足的 PIM，在具有 L 层的 NN 的 O(L!) 优化空间中找到最佳运行时权重调度策略具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 PIM-HLS，一种用于基于异构 PIM 的 NN 加速器的自动硬件生成工具。针对上述问题，我们首先指出异构PIM可以在严重的面积限制下提高性能。然后，我们利用不同的内存技术来优化每个神经网络层的架构。我们还首次定义了运行时权重调度和映射的优化问题，并提出了一种基于动态规划的权重调度算法，将优化空间减少到O(L<sup>2</sup>)。我们实现PIM-HLS来自动生成硬件代码和指令。结果表明，与最先进的 PIM 设计相比，我们实现了平均 5.9 倍的加速，并且面积减少了 72.8%。

items.title: High Performance, Low Power Matrix Multiply Design on ACAP: from Architecture, Design Challenges and DSE Perspectives.
items.abstract: As the increasing complexity of Neural Network(NN) models leads to high demands for computation, AMD introduces a heterogeneous programmable system-on-chip (SoC), i.e., Versal ACAP architectures featured with programmable logic(PL), CPUs, and dedicated AI engines (AIE) ASICs which has a theoretical throughput up to 6.4 TFLOPs for FP32, 25.6 TOPs for INT16 and 102.4 TOPs for INT8. However, the higher level of complexity makes it non-trivial to achieve the theoretical performance even for well-studied applications like matrix-matrix multiply. In this paper, we provide AutoMM, an automatic white-box framework that can systematically generate the design for MM accelerators on Versal which achieves 3.7 TFLOPs, 7.5 TOPs, and 28.2 TOPs for FP32, INT16, and INT8 data type respectively. Our designs are tested on board and achieve gains of 7.20x (FP32), 3.26x (INT16), 6.23x (INT8) energy efficiency than AMD U250, 2.32x (FP32) than Nvidia Jetson TX2, 1.06x (FP32), 1.70x (INT8) than Nvidia A100.
items.abstract_zh: 随着神经网络（NN）模型日益复杂，对计算的要求越来越高，AMD推出了异构可编程片上系统（SoC），即具有可编程逻辑（PL）、CPU和专用AI引擎（AIE）ASIC的Versal ACAP架构，其理论吞吐量（FP32）高达6.4 TFLOP，INT16为25.6 TOP，INT8为102.4 TOP。然而，较高的复杂性使得即使对于矩阵乘法等经过充分研究的应用程序而言，实现理论性能也并非易事。在本文中，我们提供了 AutoMM，一个自动白盒框架，可以在 Versal 上系统地生成 MM 加速器的设计，对于 FP32、INT16 和 INT8 数据类型分别实现 3.7 TFLOP、7.5 TOP 和 28.2 TOP。我们的设计经过板上测试，能效比 AMD U250 提高 7.20 倍 (FP32)、3.26 倍 (INT16)、6.23 倍 (INT8)，比 Nvidia Jetson TX2 提高 2.32 倍 (FP32)，比 Nvidia A100 提高 1.06 倍 (FP32)、1.70 倍 (INT8)。

items.title: Optimal Synthesis of Multi-Controlled Qudit Gates.
items.abstract: We propose a linear-size synthesis of the multi-controlled Toffoli gate on qudits with at most one borrowed ancilla. This one ancilla can even be saved when the qudit dimension is odd. Our synthesis leads to improvements in various quantum algorithms implemented on qudits. In particular, we obtain (i) a linear-size and one-clean-ancilla synthesis of multi-controlled qudit gates; (ii) an optimal-size and one-clean-ancilla synthesis of unitaries on qudits; (iii) a near-optimal-size and ancilla-free/one-borrowed-ancilla implementation of classical reversible functions as qudit gates.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在最多一个借用辅助设备上对多控制 Toffoli 门进行线性尺寸综合的方案。当qudit维度为奇数时，这一辅助甚至可以被保存。我们的综合导致了在 qudits 上实现的各种量子算法的改进。特别是，我们获得了（i）多控制 qudit 门的线性尺寸和一次性辅助合成； (ii) qudits 上酉式的最佳尺寸和 one-clean-ancilla 综合； (iii) 作为 qudit 门的经典可逆函数的近乎最佳尺寸和无辅助/单借用辅助实现。

items.title: Toward Optimal Filler Cell Insertion with Complex Implant Layer Constraints.
items.abstract: Modern circuits often contain standard cells of different threshold voltages (multi-VTs) to achieve a better trade-off between timing and power consumption. Due to the heterogeneous cell structures, the multi-VTs cells impose various implant layer constraints, further complicating the already time-consuming filler cell insertion process. In this paper, we present a fast and near-optimal algorithm to solve the filler insertion problem with complex implant layer rules and minimum filler width constraints. We first propose an inference-driven detecting algorithm to identify each design rule violation accurately. Then, a dynamic-programming-based insertion method is developed to reduce the implant layer violations. Finally, we design a contour-driven violation refinement strategy to further improve manufacturability. Experimental results show that our algorithm can reduce the number of violations significantly compared with state-of-the-art works. Besides, with our identifier in the legalization stage, we can avoid conflicts in advance and solve almost all violations after filler insertion in industrial cases.
items.abstract_zh: 现代电路通常包含不同阈值电压的标准单元（多VT），以实现时序和功耗之间的更好权衡。由于异质单元结构，多VT单元施加了各种植入层限制，使本已耗时的填充单元插入过程进一步复杂化。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且近乎最优的算法来解决具有复杂植入层规则和最小填充物宽度约束的填充物插入问题。我们首先提出一种推理驱动的检测算法来准确识别每个设计规则违规。然后，开发了一种基于动态编程的插入方法来减少注入层违规。最后，我们设计了一种轮廓驱动的违规细化策略，以进一步提高可制造性。实验结果表明，与最先进的算法相比，我们的算法可以显着减少违规次数。此外，通过我们在合法化阶段的标识符，我们可以提前避免冲突，并解决几乎所有工业案例中填充后的违规行为。

items.title: RL-MUL: Multiplier Design Optimization with Deep Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Multiplication is a fundamental operation in many applications, and multipliers are widely adopted in various circuits. However, optimizing multipliers is challenging and non-trivial due to the huge design space. In this paper, we propose RL-MUL, a multiplier design optimization framework based on reinforcement learning. Specifically, we utilize matrix and tensor representations for the compressor tree of a multiplier, based on which the convolutional neural networks can be seamlessly incorporated as the agent network. The agent can learn to adjust the multiplier structure based on a Pareto-driven reward which is customized to accommodate the trade-off between area and delay. Experiments are conducted on different bit widths of multipliers. The results demonstrate that the multipliers produced by RL-MUL dominate all baseline designs in terms of both area and delay. The performance gain of RL-MUL is further validated by comparing the area and delay of processing element arrays using multipliers from RL-MUL and baseline approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 乘法是许多应用中的基本运算，乘法器广泛应用于各种电路中。然而，由于设计空间巨大，优化乘法器具有挑战性且并非易事。在本文中，我们提出了 RL-MUL，一种基于强化学习的乘法器设计优化框架。具体来说，我们利用矩阵和张量表示来表示乘法器的压缩树，基于此，卷积神经网络可以无缝地合并为代理网络。代理可以学习根据帕累托驱动的奖励来调整乘数结构，该奖励是定制的以适应面积和延迟之间的权衡。对不同位宽的乘法器进行了实验。结果表明，RL-MUL 产生的乘法器在面积和延迟方面主导了所有基线设计。通过使用 RL-MUL 乘法器和基线方法比较处理元件阵列的面积和延迟，进一步验证了 RL-MUL 的性能增益。
